Hey friend,

I just checked in with my team, and they told me we’re still falling short of our mid-month goal by $2,365.

[If everyone reading this email chipped in $5, we’d reach our goal in no time. Can you pitch in $5 or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127342859/607740778/-4170759?amount=5&refcode=jbfc_20260314_emdf_e2_t0_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFkMTMzYTAtMDIyMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jca4u2s-j3k-kfyNV_9dycdgUSuVRbqDonkQ8g8CoVM=)

This race is going to come down to who has the most grassroots support, who has the resources to reach more voters, and who is able to spread their message the most.

[That’s where you come in, friend. name: Justice Democrats
subject: They’re paying influencers to lie about our candidate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s bad enough that AIPAC is spending millions of dollars through shell
PACs to mislead voters in IL-09 and attack our candidate, Kat Abughazaleh.

Now, another dark money group is offering influencers $1,500 to malign
Kat:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260314-3-ka.pkU9nG&refcode=em20260314-37565&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37565%2E1203867%2E97siuz ]Tweet by Brandy Zandrozny: EXCLUSIVE: A secretive dark money group is
offering influencers $1,500 for posts attacking Chicago Democratic primary
candidate Kat Abughazaleh.

And of course, we have no way of knowing who is funding this group... until
after the election is over. Nothing shadier than this sort of dark money
pay-to-play scheme.

AIPAC and corporate interests are using every dirty trick in the book to
buy this House seat and defeat the most progressive candidate in this
competitive Democratic primary.

And there’s a reason for it: Kat doesn’t take a cent from AIPAC or
corporate PACs, she’ll vote to end U.S. funding for Israel’s genocide in
Gaza, and she’ll truly fight for the working-class and the bold change we
deserve.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260314-3-ka.pkU9nG&refcode=em20260314-37565&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37565%2E1203867%2E97siuz ]This election is just three days away. Can you split an urgent donation
to Kat’s campaign and Justice Democrats to hand AIPAC and other dark money
groups a massive loss this Tuesday?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260314-3-ka.pkU9nG&refcode=em20260314-37565&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37565%2E1203867%2E97siuz ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260314-37565-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37565_1203867_97siuz&akid=37565%2E1203867%2E97siuz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37565%2E1203867%2E97siuz

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Katie Porter
subject: Eric Swalwell voted to thank ICE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40983%2E3422442%2E_3uzDk)
Peter,
The ACLU just put out its voter guide in the race for California Governor and there’s a BIG difference between myself and the other two top Democrats. Take a look ⤵️
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260314_2_ak.y3vrYV&refcode=em20260314-40983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40983%2E3422442%2E_3uzDk)
The other leading candidates in this race couldn’t be bothered to denounce ICE’s immoral, unconstitutional attacks on our communities.
As a leader, I’ve always put my values first. That’s why in the face of ICE attacking communities across California and the country, _**I called to abolish ICE.**_
Meanwhile, even after Donald Trump unleashed federal agents on Los Angeles, my opponent **_Eric Swalwell voted to thank ICE._**
And the billionaire in this race, Tom Steyer, **_made his billions investing in the same private prisons that ICE is using right now to detain thousands of immigrants._**
_That’s BS._
I have consistently stood up for California’s immigrant community. I don’t change my voice depending on how the political winds blow, because what is right is right, always. **ICE needs to be abolished, not thanked.**
California’s next governor needs to be clear eyed about protecting our communities from Donald Trump’s thugs. That’s exactly the type of governor I will be.
**[But with just 51 days until ballots drop, I need your help to win this primary election. If you also believe California needs a governor with consistent values, I hope you’ll chip in to my campaign today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260314_2_ak.y3vrYV&refcode=em20260314-40983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40983%2E3422442%2E_3uzDk)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260314_2_ak.y3vrYV&refcode=em20260314-40983&t=23&akid=40983%2E3422442%2E_3uzDk)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260314-40983&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40983_3422442__3uzDk&akid=40983%2E3422442%2E_3uzDk)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40983&t=25&akid=40983%2E3422442%2E_3uzDk)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40983)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40983&t=26&akid=40983%2E3422442%2E_3uzDk)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

Peter, I want to tell you something I don’t talk about much.
When you’re deployed to a combat zone, you get phone calls home. Not many. And they’re short. The connection is bad, the timing is worse, and you spend half the call pretending everything is fine so the people you love don’t worry.
**_My mom knew I wasn’t telling her the true situation._**
She knew that “I’m fine, mom” meant rockets had targeted the base that week. She knew that “it’s quiet here” meant I couldn’t tell her what was actually happening. And she knew that every time I said “I’ll be home soon,” there was a chance I wouldn’t be.
That’s the part of military service that doesn’t make the campaign ads.
We talk about the soldier. We don’t talk about the mom who can’t sleep. The dad who checks his phone every 30 minutes. The family who has to wonder if their loved ones will be home for Christmas this year.
My family lived that. For nine months while I was in Iraq, they carried the weight of not knowing if I’d make it home.
And they’re not special. They’re one of thousands of military families across this country who sacrifice in silence while politicians in Washington use the troops as props in photo ops and then forget they exist the second the cameras turn off.
I’m running for Congress because military families deserve more than a yellow ribbon magnet on someone’s bumper.
They deserve a representative who actually understands what it’s like. Who’s been on both sides of that phone call. Who knows that “supporting the troops” doesn’t mean clapping at an airport — it means fixing the VA, fighting for military spouse employment, making sure no veteran sleeps on a park bench, and making sure the men and women we send into harm’s way have a government that’s worthy of their sacrifice.
_**That’s what this campaign is about.**_
_**Not me. Not my Bronze Star. Not my resume.**_
_**The families.**_
Every mom who can’t sleep. Every kid who doesn’t understand why their parent is gone. Every veteran who comes home to a system that doesn’t care.
I’m fighting for them. And I’m asking you to fight with me. **Please, chip in whatever you can.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I want to tell you something I don’t talk about much. When you’re deployed to a combat zone, you get phone calls home. Not many. And they’re short. The connection is bad, the timing is worse, and you spend half the call pretending everything is fine so the people you love don’t worry. My mom knew I wasn’t telling her the true situation. She knew that “I’m fine, mom” meant rockets had targeted the base that week. She knew that “it’s quiet here” meant I couldn’t tell her what was actually happening. And she knew that every time I said “I’ll be home soon,” there was a chance I wouldn’t be. That’s the part of military service that doesn’t make the campaign ads. We talk about the soldier. We don’t talk about the mom who can’t sleep. The dad who checks his phone every 30 minutes. The family who has to wonder if their loved ones will be home for Christmas this year. My family lived that. For nine months while I was in Iraq, they carried the weight of not knowing if I’d make it home. And they’re not special. They’re one of thousands of military families across this country who sacrifice in silence while politicians in Washington use the troops as props in photo ops and then forget they exist the second the cameras turn off. I’m running for Congress because military families deserve more than a yellow ribbon magnet on someone’s bumper. They deserve a representative who actually understands what it’s like. Who’s been on both sides of that phone call. Who knows that “supporting the troops” doesn’t mean clapping at an airport — it means fixing the VA, fighting for military spouse employment, making sure no veteran sleeps on a park bench, and making sure the men and women we send into harm’s way have a government that’s worthy of their sacrifice. That’s what this campaign is about. Not me. Not my Bronze Star. Not my resume. The families. Every mom who can’t sleep. Every kid who doesn’t understand why their parent is gone. Every veteran who comes home to a system that doesn’t care. I’m fighting for them. And I’m asking you to fight with me. Please, chip in whatever you can. For God and Country, Mike Bouchard Army Paratrooper | Bronze Star Recipient | | Friends of Michael Bouchard, Inc. | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Friends of Michael Bouchard.

Peter ,
Republican senators are panicking.
Here's what they’ve been caught saying just over the last week:
Sen. Kevin Cramer (R-ND): "I'm glad I'm not on the ballot."
Sen. Ron Johnson (R-WI): "Do I feel confident? I never feel confident. It's going to be a tough midterm."

name: JD Vance
subject: Friend, I need you on the front lines.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Do you want the good news or the bad news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
There's a lot happening – and I've got some big updates:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15503?t=2&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)
---
null, it's Haley.

There's a lot happening – and I've got some big updates:
**The good news:** My team and I just launched a brand-new social media ad, and we're already pushing it out all over Michigan.
**The bad news:** Americans for Prosperity Action – Charles Koch's super PAC – is spending BIG MONEY to prop up my opponent. The newest report says at least _$1 million_ , and that's just so far.
They're not the only ones, either.

GOP megadonors are throwing everything they've got at our battleground race because they know we've got a real shot at sending Mike Rogers back to his mansion in Florida.
**That's why I had to reach out before tomorrow's mid-month deadline and ask:_[Will you rush $5 now to help us reach our $200,000 goal so we can keep them from drowning us out and win this thing in November?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15478?t=3&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)_**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15549?t=4&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15550?t=5&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15551?t=6&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15552?t=7&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)
---
I know I can count on you, null.

With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15483?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&%3Bzip=18326&t=8&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15503?t=9&akid=2451%2E49239%2EpLKC5j)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Birmingham, MI 48009

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: please read this today, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
A longer note on the state of campaign funding in our country – and why we are counting on your help to elect Democrats + turn things around.
#
Peter,
Across the country right now, there are incredible Democratic candidates running for office — up and down the entire ballot, in every single state.
They’ve got organizers knocking on doors. Volunteers making calls. These candidates are tirelessly showing up for their communities day after day.
The energy is there. The people are there.
**Money is the factor that is too often missing.**
**[ELECT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101888?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP)**
Here's the reality we’re facing right now: **The Republican Party is propped up by a network of billionaires and special interest groups who can write massive checks without giving it a second thought.** Dark money flows freely – funding attack ads, voter suppression efforts, and GOP candidates who answer to their donors instead of the people they were elected to serve.
**Democrats are doing things differently.** Our power comes from real people like you – grassroots donors who give what they can, when they can, because they believe that our country can do better than it’s doing right now.
And that matters enormously. But it also means we face hard choices.
**Right now, we’re working to support Democratic candidates in all 50 states.**
We all know there is no shortage of fights worth having – and no shortage of dedicated leaders who are ready to have them. But without adequate resources, we are forced to make impossible decisions about where to invest, which races to prioritize, and which communities we simply cannot reach.
**Every state matters. Every election matters. Every constituent matters.**
**[ELECT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101888?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP)**
We know what happens when Democrats show up everywhere: We win.
And we know what happens when we give up ground: Republicans entrench themselves for decades, gerrymander maps, restrict voting rights, and make it harder to fight back the next time. _We cannot afford to let that happen._
**If you've been waiting for the right moment to give – this is it.** Your donation today helps us support good candidates running in red and purple states across the country – where the odds are long but the stakes are even higher.
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us show up everywhere and WIN in 2026, Peter?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101888?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101889?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101889?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101889?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101889?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101889?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101889?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101888?refcode=em20260314-10181&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP)
---
No billionaire is going to fund this fight. It's up to us – all of us – together.
Thank you for being part of this.
– SDC HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20260314-10181-footer&t=11&refcode2=10181_614464_vuAjqP&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=12&akid=10181%2E614464%2EvuAjqP).

body:
We’re sounding the alarm: If the 2026 election were held today, Republicans would LOSE.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znjn1srltui45kn8lt4mmirlkt915akbub4oelu8_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs) Friend,

We’re sounding the alarm:

**If the 2026 election were held today,_Republicans would LOSE._**

That’s not spin. That’s what the polls, fundraising totals, organization, and momentum are ALL telling us.

If we’re serious about DEFEATING the Democrats in November and building a durable America FIRST majority in 2026, 2028, and beyond... [we have to prepare right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi14emn2m911lqt23vhmbjqb460mdj844rpk013o_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs)

Charlie Kirk’s dream was never about just one election.

It was about building a permanent America First movement capable of winning again and again.

But Charlie would be the first to tell you: **winning requires resources.**

Right now, **Turning Point PAC is building a MASSIVE war chest** to support America First candidates across the country.

Our goal? [Raise $147,000 before the critical FEC Reporting Deadline on March 31.

Do it for Charlie, Friend... and help Turning Point PAC ensure Republicans WIN on November 3 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmi6gugh4u2vo7a0u6e9pkermos0375q6rib3evg_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0f40a7eu535a21jr9ja0elqc4pa2khk100v8ce0_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z28o301b9nagl5tiqi0p201nuq27lkpj67mcloj8_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zalllbmr3r6rrool1iefll88u5a51hlqqldb6ing_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs)

[Any Amount Helps >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z413dumi2rd00nv6abujukb3952rg43nri63o6b0_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs)
Democrats will PORE over our FEC report because they’ll be asking one question:

_**Is Turning Point PAC still a serious force heading into 2026?**_

We need to show them the America First movement is organized, disciplined, and ready to fight.

**We need to show them our ability to organize voters and win elections did NOT end with Charlie Kirk.**

That’s why we’re asking you to step up immediately and make sure Turning Point files an FEC report that sends a clear message to the Left and ensures we have the resources to fund this fight between now and November.

[Even just a few dollars helps us move the needle, Friend. Just make sure to give before March 31.

Pitch in any amount >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuqgrje1dkll7r05j99cro45pve26r6oc1ciipq8_rp22sh2s8i6epr6cljm1pr4clh2bs)

Your gift could not come at a more critical time because it helps us:
* BUILD on President Trump and Turning Point PAC’s successful 2024 victory blueprint,

* SUPPORT America First candidates in KEY races,

* COUNTER Democrat dark money from Big Tech, woke corporations, and public-sector unions,

* EXPAND our best-in-America ground game across key battleground states.

Friend, Charlie believed in building something bigger than one person. He believed in the power of the American people to save this nation.

Thanks for your help!

Tyler Bowyer
Executive Director
Turning Point PAC
Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Ken Paxton
subject: Talarico would be a disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Paxton for Senate

# Sunday, March 15, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1820, [Maine became the 23rd U.S. state](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUBeCnwRsWfzbNwNDFW7p2tLC5DrfFEMFtLL99lahv0O1In3SOdD6v89Vjwnz78Ds42sqc4WgJiKDOjSp-QysZq8-tYCp3qJ6wzEqokQvN5TAHj-mcTRfcBqBAd-CktXoYL6NWXXSLV0MQQlu_SbN6r-xlGdfVbNK8baP1Hbpnm9BykELqQfZiUaDCok0I9rIsKzMCAlKp_VfBTBG2dJYH1H4te5dcJLo3pt-ZmpiajuPoIzYq9Xw6UxNFbDz4k2Pmf8LUtPu6Ri6HV8QMHDJBbZwi8J-MJXfVhfuBKWEbLTPitntMr0n6108Pp34DAAD__4W7fq4) after separating from Massachusetts through the Missouri Compromise, which allowed it to enter as a free state in exchange for the entrance of Missouri as a slave state. Australian singer Olivia Newton-John enjoyed worldwide appeal in the 1970s and '80s, first with wholesome ballads, then later with more risque pop songs. In between, her star power skyrocketed, playing opposite John Travolta in the film musical _Grease_ , as shown in today's ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGvozAQBOBfY7ogswZMChcnRem4SNdcaRl2CXtxcGRvgvLvT3nla1_7jTQjzd_Rj4Ejb9ff4U5OluQ32kskEcq-SOYblbRxDltJHNODchBOHjT0B20OTecxcHz7tkK3EAGZilxjren6Y2-gWl2w7TIggF1gPraA_dCS0TRYi9YOOFXsPm3aNF2jG9M1tZ6AACfTItrjNM2q1YQsKdf_Em-y0hLf6UW5ntO9im4VeRRlfik4Kzjv-16_01OeE33yjwSZV2XOL2VOmHHs8HK7yKigj1xEmdOfb1wkZPE5ICdlTk2VHT52jpFLb1Wrr_fA8WtbfnTYy8H_AAAA__-m03-D) Today's sponsor, [United States Tungsten Corp](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdA_ZHjBQuIi0et2mTWkZPMAkxkb28Fb79xGbKD-Qdu7R3Kvz4929e4qUtu_-QMtrdgk_akRmLK5yoV9Yc6LiU80U84nFM2WnpTYPCQ_Vu-ApfrquCXZF1AgNWjUM0JvJgG52i9NoVDf7SXU6wNDLaZBGQdAG53WBtSF7f5OgeiUV9KqVs0YdZuhCGKZ5XkQnMRDn0v7MlHjHNX7mF5Z2yUcT7c58VgHfhH4K_aT0wsrtlYgxVPaMla-0VcZ08zcEz4sPV_NVFhTwhoenKLS5jwcGug4Bb6en8Dh94YSl7nT-zRd_nJ629EX8C9UoH9CD-yPkrvYOjAQ5diDV2BQbzg-KkaoZRCe3u_BrPP-X8ZfVvwMAAP__4CWW5g), is giving investors early access to America's largest historic tungsten mine as the U.S. looks to secure a domestic supply of this critical defense metal amid rising prices and reduced reliance on China.
|
---
## US Forces Strike Iran's Oil Operations
U.S. forces carried out "large-scale" [strikes on Kharg Island](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOpDAQRb8GMiM_eAYONumsN90QlXEBtW3sll3TqP9-xMz8wUQlnZKu7rn_7vMdKFDc_sKBltc0RzxLQGbMc-FMDywpUoZYEoX0xAxMadZS90IaobrZA4X33NberogaTY1WDYPp-qk3ut6tkevYTTiNU-ec9NoMShkcJ1jcCB7XmuyVJo3qlFSmU410GrV3pvV-mJxbqlaiJ065-Z8o8o5reKcX5mZJRx3szvwslflT6Vulb-d5NtEtl8X1v0jKwVf6dkn8HMF7RmCMRXw7ikRBrLBQICYs4qOInbiI4wKQ34Ihb8hFPHbIm6Ai8hJB96btTJ2tf54UApV-qFq5HUDhqxv_atCX1Z8BAAD__0GOjd0), a critical hub of Iran's Gulf oil operations. U.S. Central Command said Saturday that naval mine storage facilities and missile storage bunkers were among targets destroyed, hitting 90 Iranian military targets while "preserving the oil infrastructure." The island, which is about the size of New York City's Central Park, has a loading capacity of [about 7 million barrels per day](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQBeCngc7IHvOTFC62ocu2WyIbj8NsDEb2JCxvv-LeR7j1kY7Od_48poelSNvzt13RcEjThkeJyIx5KpzphSVtlO1WEsW0Y7ZMaQIJvZBaqG7yluI5tbU3ARFQ12jUMOiuv_ca6sW0cg42qM4rqXoX5htAe_euVwr62-DnmszVJrXqlFS6U410gOCdbr0f7s7NVSvRE6fc_E208YIhnumDuZnTWkezMO-l0r8qGCsYj-NoQvp3Ka68gnFPkZjmUsHI-b3uotiziLcoIrlIfInQC7b5iVzEt1m88BSXmuwmEkWxvF2djd8PipFKP1StfK6W4tcG_tFxHwP_AwAA__-E6IXt), and roughly 90% of Iran's crude oil exports pass through it. Most of those exports are shipped to China and India. Meanwhile, the Pentagon is [deploying the _USS Tripoli_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGynDAMRb_GdN6xZRaGwkUaupc2JSOwACXGZmztbvj7DPmF16jRzLn3nl9f0xdy5LT9xIO8rHlK9KmRRKhMVQr_oZoTF0w1c8wnFRTOExjotHHaPqeAHK-pbYJfiYBcQ972vXt2Q-eg2f1qu2Fw64JoOgMW-hVbsy6D7duhcwM17G-acfZpjXVP-zAzEITZtSH0wzwvqjUUWHJ5_M6cZKc1XvlN5bHko4l-Fzmrcj8UjArGdJ25yv1SMN5gBaNxCkZ7n1fV9z4F40lJcMtJV0qB06axVnxF0XXnUx9YOJGmv-edzDlhufQrsWjJHyxB30YUjE3x4fxwjFy7XrVmO5Dj_17yLZlvD_8CAAD__94Zig0), an amphibious assault ship, and thousands of military service members to break Iranian influence over the vital Strait of Hormuz as global oil prices spike. The expected two-week voyage from East Asia could [help re-open the crucial waterway](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGngc0RHwaSgaGLt3TtaGFzCbfFxoLbROnTV-krdD7STzr_j-t8DVhwv72HDTylOu_w6AWIoM2dGn5Brzu2sPeKpR7QAmGdlVB2EHqQZo4By3MeefQJQIHm4KVz2tiL1YpnH8dRBymNiMK6FexZJAtgUgIrwmIkR__ShJZGCqmNPIlFgYqLHmN0l2VZ2SggItV2-qy4U4ZUnvUO7bTWjRefiY7O9BtTE1MTZchYymtjajpqwfXJ1BQhwd6Bqcm4s3bSDa9PA-UGgfrQqQWkIde2ff8wNfHm4_HAUrBbx0Zx2wL-mZz-Fenu1W8AAAD__0GNfEo) by the end of the month.
## Meta Planning Layoffs Over AI Costs
Tech giant Meta is planning sweeping [layoffs that could affect 20% or more](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb9GOx14KKwFRRq7TZvSAXmsL0FwgOzGv8-YX0h3izv3zjkf9-VuKFB8vJsddfVpifgqAWvFvJSa6QtLipRNLIlCOjCbSmkBBrJjouPj4gyFcxlapz0ioGhRc6XEKCcpoN20xHG4TUbc5CQZ2GFlFrzxyKVSTFnekr7WmOAjZ1yMvGcWEJwVg3NqsnZtBoaOasr9Z6JYN_ThTE_M_Zr2Nuit1qM04q2BuYHZUzRxxf40W0pXo4H5Qmpgxp81fBd6YrdjNd0RTIwUH115IR5XCOZM3peOMa7YOIzQb3UPbdbueFEIVKRqBvbYDYW_7_ovYU8NvwEAAP__MwqAxQ) of the company as it looks to offset rising artificial intelligence costs. The company aims to offset the cost of AI infrastructure and prepare for [greater efficiency brought about by AI-assisted workers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O2zAQxfHTSB0NirS-ChVp3G3alAJFDu3JUhxjZmTFtw82QE6w_cPDH79fH-tHwIL1_jPssGimtcIpBVSBV1HGTxCqyKEKYaEncFCk1Vk3GOtN168pYHmv1zYtGcCBb2HpxtH3wzx41z6WKdtpm2H08wTzNPadnyY_bzBkH3xnU4vL15v1Xd_ZzvfdxW4OXNr8NaVx3rbYXC0kVOLLb8KqD8jlTS_gS6S9LctD9SmN_9G4W-Nu53leMv3ZDsEKIl-bxt0U4qNSofu7cbcdNBh4g5g9iOALjLPmJP7MxBFMPNQENFgzB1E-oh4MJpKomEhVsR5ghAKbEJlEzH-VKobhSawtL-l5Yikow9hc7X0PWP7V6reIX4v7GwAA___slJY8). The company has [committed $600 billion to build data centers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb2OpEAMhJ8GMqP-4WcICC6ZbC-9EJluA95pukfd3h1xT39idG-wiSXbpSp9qj8f8wdy4Lj9xoMmWdMc6VUCiVCei2R-UEmRM8aSOKQnZRROs1GmB2VBd7NHDufc1n5aiQzZmiY9DLbrx96aep-MpXFofasMjsO4ELbt4DR1eBvQ4W2sebrclNWdVtp2ulGLIeMX23o_jMviqlaRZ0m5-UwcZac1nOmbcuPSUYdpF3mWyv6qzL0yd-GDSlo5esbmPd-XS3t9ye0xhbSd_xe4cCtzPzA_4O-Xe1BeKG8FDhKEZ8BYYOFtoyIQ8EzrWoAjsBTYuUjKJ7xYdtCdUgo-0wLuSwpg9CA7QSYsKQJfEZiFXaCyp1dl7tqMXX-7jX3jjlLnyT9fHAKXfqhatR3I4Y0nP-rkezL_AgAA__9dqaUA) by 2028. Its 2026 capital expenditure is expected to reach as high as $135 billion, after spending $72 billion last year. With a workforce of nearly 79,000, the cuts could potentially affect 15,800 jobs.
## List: Best, Worst States for Tipping
South Carolina checks in as the only state that [averages better than 20% for tips](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuxCAQBNCvwZ0tWGwsFxRp3F3alBaY5W4TDixYnXV_Hzm_kHZGmifN1227OUqU75_uiZZj2TKeLSEz1q1xpR9sJVN1uRVK5cDqmMoGEkwvda-mLThK723sgo2IgLpDq-ZZT2YxGrqH9aOKMxhc1BjMgnExcp_AaxnRI2jTkb3WpFaTkkpPapAeEILXYwjz4v0uRomBuNThu1DmB8b0Li-sw16eXbIP5qMJ_SFgFbCe5znUcFUCVleZ9oRXXGrjvrFjbH0stWc6Dsr3_rIFrF214TgpJWpmFqO8Px2lP4D_9crLwm8AAAD__zhKdw0). Payment app JIM evaluated nearly 90,000 point-of-sale [tipping transactions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyrCAUgOGnwU4HDiJrQXEbu71tSgfkuJ4ExcGTZfbtM5tXSP3PfMX_cZ_vnhIdj_9-R8drng-sV0JmLPPFhb7wygcVf1yZUj6xeKY8g4ShlbpVZo6e0mvum-hWREDdoFPWajOMg4Zmc6GHKBdjrIZxscrIaG_WgwfEcFuH0JB7a1Iro6TSRnUyAEIMuo_RjiEsopcYiXPpPjMdvOGaXvmJpVvy3iS3MZ-X0P8ETAKmWmtX4jsJmHxhWhIKmLZc2_172VrOLdMpYGqKi2ellOgarOjlY_eUfkn-04eng58AAAD__8i1ciQ) across all 50 states in 2025. After the Palmetto State (20.71%), the top five included Wisconsin (19.15%), Connecticut (18.43%), (Maryland 18.40%), and Nevada (16.88%). Which states have skimpiest tippers? Oregon doles out an average tip of 13.10%, followed by Virginia (13.58%), New York (13.72%), Alaska (14.11%), and Illinois (14.37%). The likelihood of [tipping generally increases with age](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAUhJ_GdCD_YBMKF9vQZdstkbEPcDaOjeyToLz9FXmF2898o_n-3ee7w4hp--ueYGnNc4KzRiCCMlcq-ICaExaXasaYDyiOMM-SS9Ny1Qo9B4fxM_dNsCuABNWAFcOgtBmNks1uuRci3LwetRkH7rm76d4ZJdWqjZchNGgvGldCCy6UFh1fJMiwqD6EYVwWz3oOASmX7n_GRDus8ZPfUDqfn020O9FRmfrD5MTkdJ5nt7j0KI7gCjA5-XLVW-9KqExO10EmJ8LjwLS1_hXpVaCtr_KGzxeiMFXcdqpNseE4MUasZmA9354O43eWfuXqbeVPAAAA___g8H-o). Gen Zers and Millennials stand out as the least frequent tippers, while Gen Xers and Boomers are more likely to tip.

This is a huge opportunity for [United States Tungsten](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdA_ZHjBQuIi0et2mTWkZPMAkxkb28Fb79xGbKD-Qdu7R3Kvz4929e4qUtu_-QMtrdgk_akRmLK5yoV9Yc6LiU80U84nFM2WnpTYPCQ_Vu-ApfrquCXZF1AgNWjUM0JvJgG52i9NoVDf7SXU6wNDLaZBGQdAG53WBtSF7f5OgeiUV9KqVs0YdZuhCGKZ5XkQnMRDn0v7MlHjHNX7mF5Z2yUcT7c58VgHfhH4K_aT0wsrtlYgxVPaMla-0VcZ08zcEz4sPV_NVFhTwhoenKLS5jwcGug4Bb6en8Dh94YSl7nT-zRd_nJ629EX8C9UoH9CD-yPkrvYOjAQ5diDV2BQbzg-KkaoZRCe3u_BrPP-X8ZfVvwMAAP__4CWW5g). They hold the lease to the "Tungsten Queen," once America's largest tungsten mine. It's a massive asset containing 1 million tons of minerals worth an estimated $450M. And as the U.S. moves to ban mineral imports from China in 2027, it's expected to only get more valuable. Plus, the White House just proposed raising the military budget to $1.5T next year. A bigger budget means more spending on the hardware that requires tungsten. As new laws require that money be spent on American-mined minerals first, United States Tungsten is positioned to become a supplier for one of the world's most reliable customers. **Whatever happened to Olivia Newton-John?** Olivia Newton-John's career followed a familiar arc in pop music: a fast rise, a spectacular peak, then a gradual fading as tastes changed. Yet unlike many, the late star remained beloved long after the hits stopped coming. Born in England in 1948 and raised in Australia, Newton-John began performing as a teenager and broke through internationally in the early 1970s. Her soft, country-tinged pop sound produced a string of hits, including _Let Me Be There_ , _Have You Never Been Mellow_ , and the Grammy-winning ballad [_I Honestly Love You_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvwyAQBeBfg7dYwBlbHhgqRdnSoUtHBOYcX0uMBZdY_vdVOnbt-j3pPel9Xt3VU6L19u7vaHnObsW9JmTG4ioX-saaVyp-rZlS3rB4puy01P1JwkkZFz2lw3VNtDOiRmjQqmEA04896GaxnVbTiHIIkzc-zDP0wRgz6rHzBoYwNmRfbRKUUVKBUa0MGnUM0MU4jCFMopMYiXNpvzKtvOCcjvzE0k753iS7MG9VwJvQF6Ev-763R37wI-Arf4nnaRFweQo4HzAtW4yLO2Wh-0SVBZw__nBlX9gVHykLOKum2LjtlBLVfhCdvN09pd9t_tdhT6t_AgAA___txH_t). With her clear voice and wholesome image, she quickly became one of the decade's most recognizable singers. Her career reached another level in 1978 when she starred opposite John Travolta in the film musical _Grease_. Here's a live version of their massive hit, _[You're the One That I Want](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGL4zAQBeBfI3cxksaWz4WKg5Aud3BwpBSyNI5nV7GCNLE3_37Jlttu-z14D97l7M6eEq3XP_6GlufsVtxrQmYsrnKhd6x5peLXminlOxbPlJ2W2hwkHFTvoqf0dF0T7YyoERq0ahigN6MB3SxWhnmOo4FhGn_FYMKAJmoEFbuotJ9lQ_bVJkH1SiroVSsnjTpO0MU4jNMURCcxEufSvmVaecE5PfOGpQ351iS7MN-rgN9Cn4Q-7fvePvODHxO-8pd4DouA0ybgeNn-XvKHzn34L7RJVFnA8d83ruwLu-IjZQFH1RQb7zulRNUMopPXm6f0tc0_Omyz-jMAAP__WtGAKQ)_. The movie became a cultural phenomenon and turned Newton-John into a global superstar. Three years later, she reinvented herself with the hit single _Physical_ , an upbeat, slightly risque anthem that spent 10 weeks at No. 1 in the United States. But pop music was changing quickly. By the late 1980s, younger artists and new sounds dominated radio, and Newton-John's brand of polished pop began to feel dated. She also stepped back from the spotlight to focus on family life. A far more serious turning point came in 1992, when she was diagnosed with breast cancer. The illness shifted the focus of her life and career. Newton-John became a prominent advocate for cancer awareness and fundraising while continuing to record music and tour occasionally. When she died in 2022 at age 73, she left behind more than chart hits. She left the memory of a star who adapted, endured, and remained admired long after her pop-chart reign ended. [Here are photos from her career](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQQL_GbI7sM5gweOjClq4d0YGPcKnjQ8ZNlL-v0l_o_KT3pPd1mS7IifP1E-8U6ipTpueRqFYq01ELf9MhmQvmQzjJTgUrywQGvDZO226KyOk1tU0MKxGQayjYvnedH7yDZgseYSVE32I3LysutHRz7wbrYXH-3A4Nh7fNONtZY11nT2YGgji7NsZ-mOdFtYYiVymnm3CuG63pJQ8qp0XuTQpbrfuh3IeCUcEYCWPiTG-oYFwJ608hBaMkfjDqTM8qWd9ky3rBQlT0vkmVQ18xJSovbcF15tx71yoYmxLi_uSU-PC9as31jpz-wvVftx4BfgMAAP__VJZ_ug). _Were you a fan of Olivia Newton-John and Grease? Thanks to President Trump's Executive Order 14155, you are entitled to a new health benefit. . | Whatever happened to Olivia Newton-John? Olivia Newton-John's career followed a familiar arc in pop music: a fast rise, a spectacular peak, then a gradual fading as tastes changed. Yet unlike many, the late star remained beloved long after the hits stopped coming. Born in England in 1948 and raised in Australia, Newton-John began performing as a teenager and broke through internationally in the early 1970s. Her soft, country-tinged pop sound produced a string of hits, including Let Me Be There , Have You Never Been Mellow , and the Grammy-winning ballad . With her clear voice and wholesome image, she quickly became one of the decade's most recognizable singers. Her career reached another level in 1978 when she starred opposite John Travolta in the film musical Grease. Here's a live version of their massive hit, . The movie became a cultural phenomenon and turned Newton-John into a global superstar. Three years later, she reinvented herself with the hit single Physical , an upbeat, slightly risque anthem that spent 10 weeks at No. 1 in the United States. But pop music was changing quickly. By the late 1980s, younger artists and new sounds dominated radio, and Newton-John's brand of polished pop began to feel dated. She also stepped back from the spotlight to focus on family life. A far more serious turning point came in 1992, when she was diagnosed with breast cancer. The illness shifted the focus of her life and career. Newton-John became a prominent advocate for cancer awareness and fundraising while continuing to record music and tour occasionally. When she died in 2022 at age 73, she left behind more than chart hits. She left the memory of a star who adapted, endured, and remained admired long after her pop-chart reign ended. . ## Nine Antifa Members Convicted in Terror Case
Nine people linked to a [North Texas Antifa](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAQhp8GO24QFbyCIo3dpU3pgCze3iDewHqeb58xyRuk_-bb_f6v23izGDHNn3YBQ--wjgn2EoEI8mgTYbALLA5ymdb0wonAY_KjFFJx0fC6G73FeIxt5Y0T_lpXYGqtm05Lde2qu5GNCFOvvFO9BSemru-tgzqozmvpp7ZCc8pEU3d1LdquubgATimhQYP0vXSsFeCR1nyhOxC8bQnxWF-QL9O6VNHciZ6FNR9MDkwO-76f3GwJdns8t-SRTpDJ4bzD5CAaJofHVog_tnzwgMkXnjAB_-3lf8F83jDSwQlyXjOWU1Fl4587xohFadaKebEYf_6g_633MvI7AAD__8KLhlo) cell were found guilty by a federal jury on terrorism-related charges, including rioting, attempted murder, and providing material support to terrorists. The case stems from a July 4, 2025, ambush attack at the Prairieland ICE Detention Center in Alvarado that left a police officer wounded. Federal prosecutors say the [defendants used weapons](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1y6yAQhuGrQR0eWAkhFxSnUefTptQgsUhkEDiw8s_dZ-zkDlLvzDv7fB-X6WJDDGn9b3c09PB5SnivEYmwTDZR8HbHfcZSl5xuYSF0IbkJBPRctFyqydkQn1PXODMLd5YNGql1qzT0Z9VsZtBDp6Wy_iyHVtlOwYAWADvoBwleNsG8YqKVSkrRqfY0e5z7XmjUCG6AmXUCXaBcTrQh4cNWH5_5huW05L2JZiO6Vtb-YzAyGD-PSrThS_G6MxiTpZATg7GSJawMxgUTYeH167AFGYw-lEo8hYT83ec_cP4r5z4fyfH1CJGe3KPDYiMnLCUXvmy2rFibYtz1HmIMtdesE-tuQ3w_SH-b9WbgOwAA___N25AB) and tactical gear during the attack. Several now face decades in prison, and one defendant faces a possible life sentence.

## Dallas 11-Year-Old Chasing $450K Motorsports Dream
Dallas [racer Liam Nachawati, 11,](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO8yAUBODT4A4LnsHEBcXfuMvfbmlheE7QPkMEyE5uv_JeYeuRPs3M1325u0gxPf67HW17b3lJeFbC1rAsLrW4uR33FUv1OR3RNwwxhQUEjFwMXOoluEifRXXBriJMskMrjRm0gXHS3dNK0OgkIPppUsoEL4UWRqthvSF6obtoL0wMUksplB76dcN1HIVBgxBusDIlMMSWS9-e2PDt6kaffGDpfd47ss_WXpUN_xjMDObzPPu0-rCdV8xgvvYwmCl7Rwzm4Ihc5VLyD7rCMwVO8YjpwZUW33zPLZf6yqVVHgq6SximSavbyGDuig2vMxLFOhqmxGN3kX5rtL-dd1j4CQAA__9zl4L4) is traveling the world chasing a professional motorsports career after beginning go-kart racing at age six and now competing internationally. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Most retirees miss out on bigger Social Security checks—leaving billions unclaimed. Only 4% of retirees time it right, yet 34% depend on it for nearly all their income. Smart timing—like one spouse claiming at 62, others waiting ‘til 68 or 70. Outdated advice costs thousands. Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Peter, believe it or not:
The one state MAGA fears most isn't California.
It's not New York. It's not Virginia or Maryland either.
It's Colorado.
And here's why that should terrify them:
California was the opening salvo. They proved Democrats could fight back against gerrymandering and WIN. The Supreme Court just confirmed it. Five GOP seats gone. MAGA's plan dealt a serious blow.
But California was expected. It's the biggest blue state in the country. Of course they were going to fight back. Trump's team had months to prepare, millions in legal fees ready to go, and a full-court press to try and kill it in the courts.
Colorado is different.
We're the state they didn't see coming. We're the state that's going to flip 3-4 seats they thought were SAFE. We're the state that could single-handedly destroy their entire election rigging scheme--and we're doing it while they're still reeling from the California loss.
That's the nightmare scenario for Trump. And Colorado is the state that makes it happen.
But here's the problem: MAGA just figured this out too.
Right now, Republican operatives are scrambling. Dark money groups are being activated. Trump's legal team is studying our ballot initiative looking for any angle to kill it before it reaches voters.
They know Colorado is the tipping point. They know we're the state that ends their dreams of permanent one-party rule.
And they're about to throw EVERYTHING they have at us to stop it.
We're talking millions in attack ads. Legal challenges. Astroturf campaigns. Intimidation. Every dirty trick in the MAGA playbook deployed against our initiative before we even get it on the ballot.
This is the moment where we either rise to meet them or we let them crush us before we get started.
We need to build a war chest right now--before they hit us, before the attacks start, before we're playing defense instead of offense.

clean_body: The answer may actually surprise you, it is [READ MORE TO FIND OUT!] | | | | | == Peter, believe it or not: The one state MAGA fears most isn't California. It's not New York. It's not Virginia or Maryland either. It's Colorado. And here's why that should terrify them: California was the opening salvo. They proved Democrats could fight back against gerrymandering and WIN. The Supreme Court just confirmed it. Five GOP seats gone. MAGA's plan dealt a serious blow. But California was expected. It's the biggest blue state in the country. Of course they were going to fight back. Trump's team had months to prepare, millions in legal fees ready to go, and a full-court press to try and kill it in the courts. Colorado is different. We're the state they didn't see coming. We're the state that's going to flip 3-4 seats they thought were SAFE. We're the state that could single-handedly destroy their entire election rigging scheme--and we're doing it while they're still reeling from the California loss. That's the nightmare scenario for Trump. And Colorado is the state that makes it happen. But here's the problem: MAGA just figured this out too. Right now, Republican operatives are scrambling. Dark money groups are being activated. Trump's legal team is studying our ballot initiative looking for any angle to kill it before it reaches voters. They know Colorado is the tipping point. They know we're the state that ends their dreams of permanent one-party rule. And they're about to throw EVERYTHING they have at us to stop it. We're talking millions in attack ads. Legal challenges. Astroturf campaigns. Intimidation. Every dirty trick in the MAGA playbook deployed against our initiative before we even get it on the ballot. This is the moment where we either rise to meet them or we let them crush us before we get started. We need to build a war chest right now--before they hit us, before the attacks start, before we're playing defense instead of offense. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Colorado is the knockout punch they never saw coming. body:
#

!!️ _This is a message for everyone in Georgia and across the country who understands the stakes of the upcoming midterm elections._ !!️
**We are humbly asking you to make a donation to Jon Ossoff's reelection campaign today.**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260315-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=1851%2E5691347%2EyOjJxR)**
Here's why we're asking:
For just 5 or 10 bucks, you can have a _direct impact_ right now on the most important Senate race in the country.
And frankly, there is nobody better prepared to take your $5 or $10 and put it to work effectively to win in Georgia than this campaign.
**We did it before in 2021, and we'll do it again this November.**
Every voter we talk to, door we knock on, or television ad we're able to air brings us one step closer to reelecting Jon and striking a real blow against MAGA here in Georgia.
But that all takes resources, and with a critical FEC deadline quickly approaching, we have to ask:
**[Can you chip in $5, $10, or any amount to Jon's reelection campaign today? Our average donation is about $26, but we're just asking you to give whatever feels right to you:](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260315-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=1851%2E5691347%2EyOjJxR)**

name: Dr. Zuhdi Jasser
subject: We've been busy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | Friends,
It's been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail, and I wanted to give you an update on the exciting momentum we're building to bring real, common-sense leadership back to AZ-04.
Here's what I've been up to:
---
| We are on the ballot! This Friday, I went down to the Secretary of State's Office with my daughter Zania and, with the help of incredible volunteers and members of the AZ-04 community, secured our place on the 2026 ballot by submitting over 2,200 signatures! THANK YOU!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | | | Around the District
---
| |
---
I joined the Tempe Republican Women's club for their February meeting to discuss top issues including affordability and health care.
---
| |
---
I was welcomed by the LD 12 Republican Committee at their meeting last week where I discussed the importance of this campaign and the path to victory in November.
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Friends, It's been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail, and I wanted to give you an update on the exciting momentum we're building to bring real, common-sense leadership back to AZ-04. Here's what I've been up to: | We are on the ballot! This Friday, I went down to the Secretary of State's Office with my daughter Zania and, with the help of incredible volunteers and members of the AZ-04 community, secured our place on the 2026 ballot by submitting over 2,200 signatures! THANK YOU! | | | | | | | | Around the District | | I joined the Tempe Republican Women's club for their February meeting to discuss top issues including affordability and health care. | | I was welcomed by the LD 12 Republican Committee at their meeting last week where I discussed the importance of this campaign and the path to victory in November. | | | | | | In the News | | == == | == == | | == == | == == | | | YOU'RE INVITED! UPCOMING EVENTS: We couldn't have built all of this momentum without YOU. THANK YOU! Please join us at our next event where we will discuss a range of current issues from healthcare to Iran. With your support, we can beat Greg Stanton and give AZ-04 a voice in Congress! Tuesday, March 24th, 2026 at 11:30AM in Central Phoenix Steve Twist • Radio Talk Show Host Seth Leibsohn • The Hon. JD Hayworth Join them for a Special Lunch Event: >>America At A Crossroads: From Healthcare To Iran -- Solutions From A Leader with Dr. Zuhdi Jasser == \--- Sunday, March 29th, 2026 at 1:30pm in Paradise Valley Judy & Warren Levenbaum • Vicki & Vernon Vaughn >>Invite you to join them for a Sunday Afternoon Lunch Reception with Dr. Zuhdi Jasser == Thank you for your continued support! I look forward to seeing you around the district! - Dr. Zuhdi Jasser | | == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR. name: Katie Britt
subject: I couldn’t sleep last night…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
This kept me up all night.
|
---
| | | | [](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend -
It’s Katie Britt. I couldn’t sleep last night... my mind was racing about what’s at stake if we let this slip through our fingers.

I had to sit down and write you a personal message. It’s important, and I need you to read it right now.
---
|
---
[Read my note now >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
This isn’t something I share lightly. **[Please take a minute to read it—it really matters:](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**
|
---
[See my note before it's too late >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
Thank you,
Katie Britt
|
---
| | ****

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
|
---
[STAND WITH KATIE >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This kind of blatant power grab can’t go unanswered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
Trump and his allies are worried that Americans will vote them out.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260315-322&t=1&akid=322%2E12592%2EXyypEM)
It's Elizabeth Warren.
Look: Trump and his allies are worried that Americans will vote them out.
But instead of offering up better, more popular ideas, they’ve decided to redraw Congressional maps in their favor instead.
This kind of blatant power grab can’t go unanswered.
That’s why I’m supporting Virginians for Fair Elections. Their emergency constitutional amendment on the ballot will give voters the final say on redistricting in the Commonwealth, leveling the national playing field and protecting every Virginian’s right to a fair vote.
**April 21 is the last day we can stop Trump’s redistricting power grab in Virginia, and we need to do everything we can to connect with voters and ensure they turn out to vote for this democracy-saving proposal.**
Every dollar Virginians for Fair Elections raises now will go straight into reaching voters before it’s too late. Through calls, texts, ads, and outreach your support can make sure voters know **their voice matters, and their vote counts.**[**Can you donate today to help protect our elections and spread this important message across the Commonwealth?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260315_1.MmV3VL&amount=3&refcode=20260315-322&t=2&akid=322%2E12592%2EXyypEM)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260315_1.MmV3VL&amount=3&refcode=20260315-322&t=21&akid=322%2E12592%2EXyypEM)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260315_1.MmV3VL&amount=3&refcode=20260315-322&t=22&akid=322%2E12592%2EXyypEM)

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=23&refcode2=322_12592_XyypEM&akid=322%2E12592%2EXyypEM)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

clean_body: Trump and his allies are worried that Americans will vote them out. It's Elizabeth Warren. Look: Trump and his allies are worried that Americans will vote them out. But instead of offering up better, more popular ideas, they’ve decided to redraw Congressional maps in their favor instead. This kind of blatant power grab can’t go unanswered. That’s why I’m supporting Virginians for Fair Elections. Their emergency constitutional amendment on the ballot will give voters the final say on redistricting in the Commonwealth, leveling the national playing field and protecting every Virginian’s right to a fair vote. April 21 is the last day we can stop Trump’s redistricting power grab in Virginia, and we need to do everything we can to connect with voters and ensure they turn out to vote for this democracy-saving proposal. Every dollar Virginians for Fair Elections raises now will go straight into reaching voters before it’s too late. Through calls, texts, ads, and outreach your support can make sure voters know their voice matters, and their vote counts. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

This has marked your survey file as UNCONFIRMED. Your approval response is one of the final outstanding submissions--and without it, we cannot finalize our report. We are counting on you to close this gap and deliver the clarity we need. ⬇️⬇️⬇️ President Trump: Approve? | EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice. Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee: Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee: Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable. Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Joe Jaworski
subject: Please watch and share this video

body:
I want to share a video with you that captures exactly why I’m running for Texas Attorney General. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14193432?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=086b38a918&e=5d8d80652b)

| | , **I want to share a video with you that captures exactly why I’m running for Texas Attorney General.** In this video, you’ll see the story of the Norwood family and the level of care I brought to them during a time of great need. It’s a real example of how I approach the law and the people I serve. That same commitment, attention to detail, and determination to stand with people when it matters most is exactly what I will bring to all **32 million Texans** as your Attorney General. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to watch it today. [](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=fa954bb5aa&e=5d8d80652b) More importantly, I’m asking you to [**share this video with other voters across Texas**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=a7c950115c&e=5d8d80652b). Send it to friends and family. Post it on social media. Forward it by text.

**Runoff elections are decided by turnout and by people spreading the word.** And remember that any registered Texas voter can vote in the Democratic runoff as long as they did not vote in the Republican primary. Early voting begins **May 18th** and runs through **May 22nd**. Election Day is **Tuesday, May 26thh**. Please watch the video and then share it with other Texans who believe the law should work for the people. Together, we can win this. Onward,

**
**

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: Record-breaking numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
**2,312,586**
That’s how many Texans voted in the Democratic Senate primary. It is officially the record for most votes cast in any primary for statewide office in Texas history.
It is a testament to the movement we’ve built and the unprecedented number of young and new voters who showed up to make their voice heard.
**$100 million+**
That’s how much has already been spent by Republicans and their super PACs on this race. Texas broke the record for the most expensive Senate primary in U.S. history.
The data is very clear that Texas is in play in November. From record-breaking Democratic turnout to new polling that shows James leading both Paxton and Cornyn, we are making clear that we are going to take back Texas.
But we will be outspent. Billionaires and corporate mega-donors are making clear that there is no limit to what they will spend to ensure a corrupt puppet politician wins this seat.
**$5**
So this is the donation we are asking you to make to help us fight back.
The truth is, we need to rebuild our resources. We spent to zero to win the primary. It may not seem like enough when our opponents are flooding Texas with millions in dark money, but if lots and lots of people are chipping in, it adds up quickly.
**[Please consider making that $5 contribution today to send James to the U.S. Senate. This is a people powered movement — not a dime from corporate PACS because James’ vote will never be for sale.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-general-launch.jRB70q&refcode=em260315-1-ak&t=1&akid=508%2E1347274%2ESKLsxL)**
