name: Steve Kerr
subject: Humbly asking for Gabby Giffords
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We have a decision to make.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=1&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)
---
Hello --
This is Steve Kerr, reaching out about an issue that is near and dear to my heart: _Ending gun violence in America._
I lost my father to gun violence when I was 18 years old. I know the pain people feel when they get that call. I don’t wish that on anyone.
I am sick and tired of our politicians offering their “thoughts and prayers” but doing nothing to actually stop gun violence. There’s so much more we can and need to do to stop this epidemic in our country.
**[Gabby Giffords has helped lead the fight to save lives from gun violence, but she can’t do it alone. Will you make your first contribution of the year to my friends at GIFFORDS before their critical mid-month deadline?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=2&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=3&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)**
Give me a minute to explain why your donation to GIFFORDS is so important, especially today.
The amount of lives lost from gun violence is heartbreaking. Every time you see another mass shooting on the news, it should be a reminder that there are tools to help stop this.
80% of people want universal background checks. That alone could save hundreds, if not thousands, of lives every year. But right now, the gun lobby is spending millions to fearmonger and stop that progress from happening.
We have a decision to make: _Are we going to continue to let the gun lobby run us over? Will we continue letting our children go to school terrified every day? Or do we want to actually take action to protect each other?_
That’s what democracy is about. We must demand that our representatives listen to us and fight to save lives. If they don’t, then we need to replace them with leaders who actually give a damn.
**So team, I am asking:** **[Will you rush in a donation to GIFFORDS PAC before their mid-month deadline? Your donations will help GIFFORDS get the resources to stand up against the gun lobby ahead of the midterm elections.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=4&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&amount=3&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=23&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q12026.GT2W2m&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=24&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q12026.xIe8uE&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=25&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q12026.rrR0ZT&refcode=em260315-1-b&t=26&akid=11309%2E3935704%2EzvXbt7)**
---

This can’t wait. It’s on all of us to take action. Thank you for standing with me and the GIFFORDS team.
Steve Kerr
Gun Violence Survivor & Coach of the Golden State Warriors

name: Democrats.org
subject: Here’s what we have on record for you:
body:
If you’ve been looking for the right moment to help, this is it.
---
Derek, The midterms might seem far off, but the work we’re doing at the DNC to elect Democrats across the country in November is well underway. Our records show that you haven’t chipped in yet this year, and we’re asking for a chance to change that. We’d like to explain why your support is so important right now. **But first, here’s what we have on file for you:** **_Democratic National Committee 2026 Supporter Record_** **Name:** Derek
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2026 Donor:** No — Not Yet ❌
**Suggested Donation:** $7 _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260315_6386_fr&refcode2=6386_22930333_hDHal0&akid=6386%2E22930333%2EhDHal0)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?refcode=em_20260315_6386_fr&refcode2=6386_22930333_hDHal0&akid=6386%2E22930333%2EhDHal0)**
---
****
Here’s why we’re asking for your support today:
* In January, we launched _When We Count_ , our largest-ever initiative to register new Democrats in key battleground states.
* We’re also reaching over a million infrequent voters by having direct conversations about what matters to them. We’re prioritizing a grassroots, listening-first approach to organizing ahead of the midterms.
* And we’re suing the Trump administration as part of our efforts to ensure that every American has the right to vote without fear of intimidation.

Derek, we know we have an uphill battle in front of us. The DNC is the only organization working day in and day out to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in every corner of the country _every year_. **And this work is only possible with the support of our grassroots team.**
With both the House and the Senate majorities on the line this November, the stakes couldn’t be higher. So if you’ve been looking for the right opportunity to make your first contribution this year to the DNC, that time is now.
[**Will you pitch in $7 to the DNC today to help us organize across the country and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year and beyond?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260315_6386_fr&refcode2=6386_22930333_hDHal0&akid=6386%2E22930333%2EhDHal0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260315_6386_fr&refcode2=6386_22930333_hDHal0&akid=6386%2E22930333%2EhDHal0)**

clean_body: If you’ve been looking for the right moment to help, this is it. Derek, The midterms might seem far off, but the work we’re doing at the DNC to elect Democrats across the country in November is well underway. Our records show that you haven’t chipped in yet this year, and we’re asking for a chance to change that. We’d like to explain why your support is so important right now. But first, here’s what we have on file for you: Democratic National Committee 2026 Supporter Record Name: Derek Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2026 Donor: No — Not Yet ❌ Suggested Donation: $7 If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** | Here’s why we’re asking for your support today: In January, we launched When We Count , our largest-ever initiative to register new Democrats in key battleground states. We’re also reaching over a million infrequent voters by having direct conversations about what matters to them. We’re prioritizing a grassroots, listening-first approach to organizing ahead of the midterms. And we’re suing the Trump administration as part of our efforts to ensure that every American has the right to vote without fear of intimidation. Derek, we know we have an uphill battle in front of us. The DNC is the only organization working day in and day out to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in every corner of the country every year. And this work is only possible with the support of our grassroots team. With both the House and the Senate majorities on the line this November, the stakes couldn’t be higher. So if you’ve been looking for the right opportunity to make your first contribution this year to the DNC, that time is now. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

list, please click here.

Friend, this is a longer email than I usually send. But before I ask you to chip in $5, I'd like to tell you about my race in Michigan, why I'm running, and why I'm asking for your support.

https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14022?t=1004&akid=2452%2E49239%2EsqUsxP

I'm running because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. Now, I'm ready to bring this fight to the Senate at this critical moment for Michigan and the country.

Flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.

MAGA Republicans know this too, and that's why they're laser-focused on this race. After spending nearly $80 million here last cycle, they're gearing up to spend even more in 2026, putting this on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – races in the country.

That's why I urgently need your help, null. My crucial mid-month deadline is tonight, and right now, we're pacing behind where we need to be.

https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14022?t=1005&akid=2452%2E49239%2EsqUsxP

This is a really important moment for our grassroots campaign. This is our chance to show the strength of our movement to my opponent and his megadonors. I hope I can count on your support.

https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14022?t=1006&akid=2452%2E49239%2EsqUsxP

The bottom line is I can't run the most competitive campaign, win this seat, and take our fight for working families to the Senate if I don't have the resources to keep up with GOP spending and fight back against their attacks.

So please, friend, I have to ask: Will you rush $5 or more to help us reach our $175,000 goal before 11:59 p.m. tonight?

https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14022?t=1007&akid=2452%2E49239%2EsqUsxP

Thanks for reading to the end of this longer email, and thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means everything to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens

body:
A very good friend of mine is running for a very important post in Texas, and I’m asking you to help him reach his goal. |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=031ec5c2de3345e28ee5e7081ed10666&_e=57a_EZxoiTGpXwKIPVZAhaG98L-67h4Gzijx0XAap1KBYO-0J3qLJocDOXWNbIH2E5wDRuXqyloCi-3NF3PmPK1Hw_yfkjL0LYQ-8YICqtG6apQibd_2vkiHU9l0Xi4rS2OgRy7uwb45VEeesgkDnp4bZwQvTxdXcOmL535m6lmM6EJ1Rps4h-1u861_zSgCue2XMl9x7xTwMu8355eoSmS6atvD-BPHUzsiGPbc0sV-kW6UHBbF0R2RTHs1qP2MJPmj2s4QZM3uhy4KQfU5M3hEpyFo76oeYN_OKHdl_mq3AMtePDlply22B_r7NrKaE7PMNwwRr2oIrsrYSi09hk58xENWqsXzvzNshbjKDq1KJz-DPI13ZKG5CA_PAMcuFKaIyfo76aMMsvGl7seeLPKnvVlCjj0hHXBjsmUdDz4JXfHL25z6zL_dgZ39kUNqjWMCvbOie6XFkGV97M_Cdm5aWNL2JgZC5lciBrfNb9uSPV2Z7IrbOqYEclCotlxUdQSz97xnvRMZaW-OD6KNU35f5ck3sFDBoUQ6Qj4ZDUacYvUPqqnHgUnzYddPX270aSnUR-2O9YoYvdQH16zYBxPkMr-ILgEQ3AuYGgQvWUYl4hv2TeW2nX8szoBNt7KtiOT-m5X2quk7GHUcLnDIfeJWM-3YroWJK2UBijFB-9o%3D)
Peter,

My very good friend, Chip Roy, is running for Texas Attorney General.

I've known Chip for a long time, and I can tell you with 100% certainty that there has been no fiercer fighter for the America First agenda than Chip.

No one - _and I really mean it_ - has fought harder to help President Trump scrap the policies of the Biden years and put our country on a path toward prosperity.

**In Congress, Chip has been a relentless voice for the conservative principles Texans believe in.**

He's fought to stop the cartels that are flooding our communities with drugs and crime.

He's the leading voice in Congress fighting to protect the integrity of our elections and end voter fraud.

And most importantly, he's working with President Trump to secure the border.

Given that Texas is the crown jewel among Republican-leaning states, we need to ensure that we don't just elect any 'ole Republican to be their next Attorney General.

**Texas - and America - needs a fighter. And that fighter is Chip Roy.**

[**STAND WITH CHIP**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=031ec5c2de3345e28ee5e7081ed10666&_e=57a_EZxoiTGpXwKIPVZAhaG98L-67h4Gzijx0XAap1KBYO-0J3qLJocDOXWNbIH2E5wDRuXqyloCi-3NF3PmPK1Hw_yfkjL0LYQ-8YICqtG6apQibd_2vkiHU9l0Xi4rS2OgRy7uwb45VEeesgkDnp4bZwQvTxdXcOmL535m6lmM6EJ1Rps4h-1u861_zSgCue2XMl9x7xTwMu8355eoSmS6atvD-BPHUzsiGPbc0sXbp2h0uK-uycxtTSs2ppyXJe6KZJMamwT57CPj1P-SAbSdnX27l5aShubYJduYs9uUpQgvN_LvBosXruq8nw29vrGwshgvAMmVA9fHLgtZ95MfRXE80CJ76v_ZkncSVRHEzahaXnI3J_noSZb5P_h1uaMw2mATgmRJrhEhvcgBdfO0QdEzj7xvuZ5a-eldM17wh2sBg2l3f4c_O29_Dvvmxfq7V5Cnc6nlfufTIDxCtcpS5TbmI2Ur3HTNa4vYuOeYkRWOCreg-ztpVM_ga_vCRg09aN5YdNonJ-WwhvDymjDqI5vxqaK-15KiAvXB0ewCEA3uvGcuHgNKYzc7gs2iqkd_zNC23a3O-4ttLY1pG1t0xEltlutORc83Mp3V5v4XdqL4NY8l5EOHjbowoXinWrjttzFDCushOMKe25pwdFgl55Z9aBESXqhiVcOAe2I%3D)
We need someone who will stand up to the liberal activists on the coasts who are eager to file lawsuits the moment Congress or the Trump Administration passes meaningful conservative reforms.

There is ZERO doubt in my mind that with Chip Roy as the next Texas AG, conservative principles will not only be preserved, but we will have the fiercest warrior of them all to ensure that compliance, order, and the rule of law rule the day.

So I'm asking you personally:

**[Please do me a favor and chip in $15 or even $25 today to help my friend Chip Roy win this critical race.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=031ec5c2de3345e28ee5e7081ed10666&_e=57a_EZxoiTGpXwKIPVZAhaG98L-67h4Gzijx0XAap1KBYO-0J3qLJocDOXWNbIH2E5wDRuXqyloCi-3NF3PmPK1Hw_yfkjL0LYQ-8YICqtG6apQibd_2vkiHU9l0Xi4rS2OgRy7uwb45VEeesgkDnp4bZwQvTxdXcOmL535m6lmM6EJ1Rps4h-1u861_zSgCue2XMl9x7xTwMu8355eoSmS6atvD-BPHUzsiGPbc0sU76i1uGxiJ_ybG3xqKancf4l_TpYqVRUxATOflnwuzt4r9TsFg2Ev6M31td-MuW-Tzu9KVg27ZQ7wGKjif1iH2QgvtODfKGsvOvU0YywvEl7AxXWda3kTB0nHhrPzGLX9jo-Ki1-Qckj1ZdLpCA06hlR1akmre8Z0m1FOOcaWJqakM2GSvd98y1AhTm6G76j2L5zw0on8GwlJy3nD31RH0hQrL4JdYAh7jDOcpeFpVFj726oXe4vOrVuzDL9ELECy3hM0rFlqfhYOdrtAKe7XxSYoG7D4XxYRLO28xvKLfs7VAA3qGcXDg3_-eYZilfplX7cl4h8fNg_c7dXzk1MDNfiBfE1yUsT2MHuboYva40ka7mOUrIUPNNA2sK5v0VZKXlMfuqnyrsHbi47ArLy5hTGcE3cf8pUetoASHe1r0kUJPA8NFUgNGTNPt2cF_0XE%3D)**

Washington might be losing a conservative fighter, but Texas needs him.

And I'm proud to stand with Chip Roy.

— Ted Cruz

Fellow Conservative,

I know how it feels right now. As a guy who's stared down impossible odds overseas, I can sense when fellow patriots get that mix of complacency and doubt creeping in. Minnesota hasn't sent a Republican to the U.S. Senate since 2002. We haven't voted Republican for president since 1976. The polls say it's a long shot, but the Democrats have deep pockets and a messy, well-funded primary between Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan and Rep. Angie Craig. It's easy to think:

_**"Why pour money into this when the deck's stacked?"**_

But Fellow Conservative, that's exactly when the left wins – when good people like you sit on the sidelines, figuring someone else will carry the load. With Tina Smith retiring, this seat is truly open for the first time in a generation. No incumbent shield. A volatile national environment. And on our side, I'm stepping up as a former Navy SEAL and Marine veteran – not a polished politician, but a regular Minnesotan from a working-class family who enlisted right after 9/11 at 18, deployed nine times to over 70 countries, and never backed down when the fight got hard.

Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the Guard before his unit deployed for Iraq, I answered the call and kept serving through the toughest missions. _**I've got the credentials to match the grit: A master's from Harvard, a Johns Hopkins certification in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA.**_ But what drives me most is making my mom proud – and now, making Minnesota proud again by fighting for the values we grew up with: law and order, lower taxes for families and retirees, secure borders, Second Amendment rights, and stopping the radical agenda that's defunded police, let our streets burn in 2020, and crushed us with inflation.

[**elect a navy seal→**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1ab1244736ea4b4cb9c38def45e73743&_e=XhD56Zk4WMrjv_mIP9Cugt7lstLtjYoy8kD-iFkYx8H_g8MCo4Wpy4-lVYcNaldXYLn7l8CZOTG-9vvpSBSH5GHj0Pc_bq5MTGcdnT7W5FrWRYo8knsGkLsB0_FbYA3vmDwKfck_d2tW69Qw3uDRL1hdJQVT_TgfocXreQWi8nKF5Vt3qXik8iFrW0hEc_ZfWnCZWJN1Dja6go0_caU_WCFqtODCsmeq2dF7S9XCAcbCkITm3tmDPduanguDA_TEnVyz5AwQ8qMOwpmcqFoVCM1ztHTpQHJtPs66cXUveMRmlp6qbrnCSnCr4yWbJivbDCtNFKbU5Rn98VZK8sdHc6hJyQDocFPi4TSXPPlhwIl5msKtDWOI7rlBYJ2Qhu3jN9hGfDKpS7l0l0A1Zt7DS3gJ5thyaoBJZ47CSUt0L83mMNFIo6KyFhUYa-MvjUp7FAjeOSVS8ubxL1oIXunHXXgXvkIzw_i0K_6VcJIZIIB5bTBTrbjoA3FSmDxGBEwqs-N25lb268oMn-shI0qtFGnM6hXsQ6HSDXSGCshq0yX4EjKhUAORGJeC4NOjJv6hG95fZuwlVpstJ6u1w3tWX6gtJBu0NTbg8TpL_YGe2nKbchNGtxJ3B7dNrrXRgxw59u13CGf_FsTy-yAzHepnj-NnmQn4onHaTEICM7q6xhUdkoSMs-d8K4XKN5VpH9Mnpo0iXCwAAqbZZ1RhZLmq0M6uvVoaJZaa-Ug9NyMFlWU%3D)
And if we don't act, it gets worse – nationally, with another Democrat vote to block real border security, raise taxes, and erode freedoms.

Just like I told folks early on: this ends one of two ways. Either you help elect a combat-tested SEAL to the Senate, or you read this and know who I am... but the regret of not acting lingers.

Think about 2008: that Senate race came down to 312 votes after a 47-day recount. Every dollar mattered then. It will now. **[Your support – even $25, $50, or $100](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1ab1244736ea4b4cb9c38def45e73743&_e=XhD56Zk4WMrjv_mIP9Cugt7lstLtjYoy8kD-iFkYx8H_g8MCo4Wpy4-lVYcNaldXYLn7l8CZOTG-9vvpSBSH5GHj0Pc_bq5MTGcdnT7W5FrWRYo8knsGkLsB0_FbYA3vmDwKfck_d2tW69Qw3uDRL1hdJQVT_TgfocXreQWi8nKF5Vt3qXik8iFrW0hEc_ZfWnCZWJN1Dja6go0_caU_WCFqtODCsmeq2dF7S9XCAcbCkITm3tmDPduanguDA_TEwzEflXxqEqB70utkWvxhZUe6a2-KfwAGRmepwTazHIPtvb7aID1EEstXENQPrhx61Z5GL3V-aPYclK4moSZDg8eThmQTcyWi2B_vChubFB9XZO630DI_HPCPX1o3De3lEwl0_HOKEGyhpuRVFkexBR4rDram_7CFdbVqrR-OtCaOQOaghDIlpAn9DLQkzgsIdOM3lT3KIRerlLTFD22u-7m1NbPKLjyjDOFT01Ka6dsRRzNRSA840FjQmZB-9hDm3_N9SEIHaxAbYQv9KHtTrcjXBNonJJZZX1hHKsRxD_KsbzwAoC2REMp-ObnVwPbBB8j8cj_D5FqabSp83Wd298AmR8Ik-gA3kHwne2laE8E0G1RKTdXIFSzDLgGT5TzJbFvcb321KLyif0gm2p-x6jbUfQjpZwyb0j7D17yXpLh9-3nuOHYlBiTO-e6OBKBB9Pv3rom7waXjKBa8tnx8d3_JXxHeJJCbeuWX0Xvd5C4%3D)** – funds the ads to build name ID, the ground game to turn out conservatives in the suburbs and Iron Range, and the fight to get through our primary (**where I'm up against other Republicans but focused on uniting the party around proven values**).

Fellow Conservative, I've faced worse odds in places most people can't imagine. I thrive in tough fights. But I can't do this alone. Imagine looking back after November 2026, knowing you could have helped flip this seat, secure our Senate majority, and send a warrior to Washington – but complacency won instead. Get excited with me. We need to fight back in these final two days and ramp up our voter mobilization efforts — ASAP. We’re running out of time, so every minute counts.

Fellow Conservative,

A recent headline captured it perfectly: “Republicans Face a Tough Fight to Defend the Senate Majority in 2026.”

Here’s the reality I see every day: If we lose the Senate, our opponents will push their agenda forward without effective checks — and that would hurt Montana families, our borders, our energy security, and so much more.

**As a Navy SEAL who served overseas to protect this country, and now as your Senator fighting for Montana in Washington, I’m committed to doing everything I can to prevent that outcome. **

That’s why I’m personally reaching out today with an opportunity to make your support go further.

I’m asking you to consider a split contribution across three critical Senate campaigns that will help determine control of the chamber in 2026. Your gift will be divided equally among them through a secure, efficient platform — **[multiplying your impact without extra effort. Here are the three strong Republicans on the front lines:
* **Ashley Moody in Florida:** former Attorney General, appointed to the Senate by Gov. DeSantis after Marco Rubio became the Secretary of State. She’s proven she can take on tough fights in court and win for conservative principles. Democrats are targeting this seat hard — we can’t let them flip it.

* **Michael Whatley in North Carolina:** As former RNC Chairman, he helped secure major victories in 2024. Now he’s running for an open seat that Democrats view as their top target. Winning here keeps momentum on our side.

* **Ashley Hinson in Iowa:** A dedicated congresswoman stepping up for an open seat. After recent Democratic gains in the state, she needs strong support to hold this line for Republicans.

These three are proven fighters, and the Senate majority runs through them. They need reinforcements from patriots like you right now.

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Coffee?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I’m sorry to email so early over the weekend

Hey Derek — I’m sorry to email over the weekend. But I’m just finishing up a cup of coffee, and I thought I’d use this moment to reach out with an update. My team and I have been spending the morning digging through the numbers ahead of tonight’s big fundraising deadline. I don’t want to throw a million spreadsheets and data points at you this early, especially over the weekend — but here’s the takeaway: **I was hoping we’d be in a stronger position by now.** Since last night, a lot of folks have stepped up and chipped in. If that’s you, I’m extremely grateful. **But we’re still not there yet, Derek.** We’re still tracking to fall thousands of dollars short of our goal — and we have less than a day to turn things around. So today, I’m reaching out with a different kind of request: [_**Can you chip in just $5 — the price of your morning coffee shop run — to help us close the gap, reach our goal, and hold the line here in battleground Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127370782/607836488/1751931448?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_031526_coffee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWVmNDNjOS03YTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6ZQoiQ8nnYJd4hnOmdO2E0Es_7f_zSzpJLXg4g4h54=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127370783/607836489/1751931448?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_031526_coffee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWVmNDNjOS03YTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6ZQoiQ8nnYJd4hnOmdO2E0Es_7f_zSzpJLXg4g4h54=)
---
I know the price of a coffee doesn’t sound like much in a state as hard-fought as Pennsylvania. But by the time you read this, lots and lots of folks will have already pitched in. And now? **They’re hoping you’ll do the same.**
Because that’s how you win a campaign as competitive as this one, Derek. No, five bucks on its own doesn’t go as far as it used to. But when you, your neighbors, your loved ones, and your coworkers all chip in and do their part?
**Those donations add up quickly — and it builds a real, grassroots movement the far-right can’t even begin to imitate.**
[_**So what do you say? Will you chip in just five bucks or whatever you can afford before tonight’s huge fundraising deadline? clean_body: I’m sorry to email so early over the weekend Hey Derek — I’m sorry to email over the weekend. But I’m just finishing up a cup of coffee, and I thought I’d use this moment to reach out with an update. My team and I have been spending the morning digging through the numbers ahead of tonight’s big fundraising deadline. I don’t want to throw a million spreadsheets and data points at you this early, especially over the weekend — but here’s the takeaway: I was hoping we’d be in a stronger position by now. Since last night, a lot of folks have stepped up and chipped in. If that’s you, I’m extremely grateful. But we’re still not there yet, Derek. We’re still tracking to fall thousands of dollars short of our goal — and we have less than a day to turn things around. So today, I’m reaching out with a different kind of request: = | | = I know the price of a coffee doesn’t sound like much in a state as hard-fought as Pennsylvania. But by the time you read this, lots and lots of folks will have already pitched in. And now? They’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because that’s how you win a campaign as competitive as this one, Derek. No, five bucks on its own doesn’t go as far as it used to. But when you, your neighbors, your loved ones, and your coworkers all chip in and do their part? Those donations add up quickly — and it builds a real, grassroots movement the far-right can’t even begin to imitate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Grateful for your help this morning, Josh Shapiro | By participating, you consent to receive donation asks, voter contact, and informational messages from Shapiro for Pennsylvania. subject: Elizabeth Warren’s HUGE warning >>
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24024%2E4449941%2Ese7fWJ) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24024%2E4449941%2Ese7fWJ) Team, we need you to see this:

[**FIRST:**]() Donald Trump ADMITTED his horrifying _SAVE Act_ is about keeping Republicans in power. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73362?t=3&akid=24024%2E4449941%2Ese7fWJ) [**NOW:**]() Elizabeth Warren just broke her silence – and SLAMMED Trump for attacking our rights. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73362?t=4&akid=24024%2E4449941%2Ese7fWJ) [ **Team, we’ll get right to the point. We need 100,000 signatures by midnight to stand with our beloved Democratic leaders like Senator Warren, demand the Senate BLOCK the _SAVE Act,_ and protect our Democracy from every single one of Trump and his MAGA allies’ attacks. Will you take 30 seconds and add your name to our petition? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73362?t=5&akid=24024%2E4449941%2Ese7fWJ) | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73362?t=6&akid=24024%2E4449941%2Ese7fWJ)
---
Team, let’s walk you through what the _SAVE Act_ would do.

\- Block nearly 140 MILLION Americans from voting

\- Target every woman who took her spouse’s name

\- Steal elections for Trump and his MAGA Republicans – he even admitted Democrats “won’t win an election for 50 years” if it passes!

[**Team, we can’t let them get away with this. We need to put MASSIVE pressure on the Senate to block this disgusting bill – otherwise, this could be the death of our Democracy. So we’re turning to you in our hour of need. Please, will you join 100,000 fellow grassroots Democrats and DEMAND the Senate BLOCK the _SAVE Act_ and defend our voting rights? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73362?t=7&akid=24024%2E4449941%2Ese7fWJ)

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Take a look at your supporter record, Peter
body:

# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
We’re quickly approaching our mid-month deadline.
I asked my team to pull the latest supporter records, and here’s what we have on file for you:
GINA FOR TEXAS SUPPORTER RECORD **Supporter record for:**
Peter / [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260315_1_supporter._aZ41O&refcode=em20260315-762&amount=5&t=1&akid=762%2E299639%2EWHjGNO) **Donor:**
No, not yet!* **Suggested Action:** [ Donate $5 now » ](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260315_1_supporter._aZ41O&amount=5&refcode=em20260315-762&t=4&akid=762%2E299639%2EWHjGNO) _Our records aren’t perfect – if you’ve donated with a different email address or by check, that may not be reflected here. But our team still greatly appreciates all of your support for electing Gina as the next Governor of Texas!_
---
Our mid-month goal is $25,000. Greg Abbott doesn’t have to worry about these deadlines. He has friends he can call up, happy to line his pockets for political favor and tax cuts.
I don’t work for billionaires or corporations. **I work for you.**
This campaign is powered by individual donations. This means we have to keep our numbers up if we want to put up a fight against Abbott’s warchest.
**[We're so close to hitting our target, Peter. Will you make your very first donation of $5 today to help us meet this goal and keep Texas competitive?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260315_1_supporter._aZ41O&refcode=em20260315-762&amount=5&t=5&akid=762%2E299639%2EWHjGNO)**

Every dollar we raise now goes directly to the field program, ads, and yard signs in all 254 counties.
Thank you,
Gina

body:
I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email ‐‐ but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's mid‐month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22982?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260315-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260315-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=23050%2E9716520%2E5oL6zP)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires ‐‐ even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate ‐‐ but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

It'll be a tough fight, but I know it can be done. We can only beat the odds if grassroots Democrats like you step up. **So please:**

**[We _NEED_ to fight back and act with urgency, so before today's mid‐month deadline, will you give $5 _(becomes $15!)_ to win back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22982?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260315-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260315-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=23050%2E9716520%2E5oL6zP)**

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: Republicans are on the run

body:
---
| | Peter, Republicans are on the run. They cannot win a free and fair election, so they’ve adopted voter suppression as an electoral strategy. Donald Trump wants to nationalize our elections because he intends to steal them. He can get lost. We will never let that happen. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: The dark history behind “equity” and “social justice”
body:
Marxism began with promises of a perfect world—and ended in fear, famine, and death.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/AHlNifmbMs2SIYhQEnjtjqDCVBIYopWLSBScpT2xqnAtQCBrH-e4n5_zN1sgfIUq--yJ-he2fELP13F-zd3_dP0CpK9QcGj-rgBLYr4v44u7qujvYOTPHEiHNfjaGKcDzuYwVwTtCnkcGN3Ucp5vk-Ko52QNGKGUeqxRIILAczugsBgSpPekU9wh/BYPBQDStD70Ck5UkZvwq8MfaecVqMuim/18)_
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/XMW4Ofb2NXP7dhCZ5CcQNjSTcwmrBarQKYN5La5cHcMEFs5MHtak0MnLV4utKWfx-8xagrLT3_b_yEfDO7F1VtTLwNljrAHYAd2da3y6NBePzmdcdSjgBKYBRz17ycXOnsiV-xRl_D8MRwZiaZOWRSLcWh0PC_80oZjAq0MVC_dvGIgTks_aRiqIqWcfxTIN88SzgLFWc8X63_R0KVobMC5AvFRDtjUAz27bULoiM-bSYg0inCXc4sq6o-di2-0Ul_UEVd6y_D9P79nZ1kN8wOjPRwl9eAsVU_IwiPn1y3tYc0B7FrFMZ7syhLBSUPx4j6S9tgPzI7Nil3QO3VxlX-_2w3-AMIruEqa3yHpurJoUOCH0q8IE7Q1oCxsl1xacJ89m7wEcC2wnn-zSkZsSxm0EF_6-96alVaPy5jogQ2pxUt-K-OhLFRWB-RMZGiFJNpC9fRc4-vtQIS4QtkRLFQ9byuLQmS7pQKsGP6fmNuSSae6acDGwLT8W5iqsybbP165Ihmtm5jk3ZjzppMVwEW0Jq0bSa1f4300OBV57A972pn4pv5KSrf8fO_-0AZpIgUzNzFnAYS6Ju0V0km0ilrVXn38H0HnmwR4b8j90yy0mxkBxJZsY-7ObuyAn0Td1TdwggLO-fWfCTRpe37G0-Jb-lVyjoMb2-GrofO5Rsi-Ct-_J1m1_IVB51Qw0VSUo7Lp2/YiaFw5s5ejFCteGPPa1IT9UYJy_yJGdb/18)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Here's a story I'll never forget, once I learned the truth behind it.

In 1917, a small group of revolutionaries led by Vladimir Lenin seized power in Russia. They promised a better, fairer world...sound familiar?

But soon after taking control, they began rounding up and executing anyone who stood in their way. Lenin even ordered his followers to hang landowners and seize their crops--so that for miles around, "people see, and tremble..."

Marxism began with promises of a perfect world--and ended in fear, famine, and death.

You may be familiar with that dark history, but too many Americans aren't. How do I know?

Because a century later, these dangerous ideas have been repackaged and rebranded. They're taught in schools and promoted by celebrity politicians using words such as "equity," "diversity," and "social justice."

The words sound harmless, but the ideas behind them are the same. Will they end up with the same terrifying results?

That's why Hillsdale College has created the National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism, and I'd love for you to take it.

You can complete your National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism using this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxism-quiz-tf](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Ola6lEqXm6BMsZz9G0RjeQZYgARlU9yOzyRSckNl1jxFRzWrRScl2YTBvrZzTf7YDWtIsSJo7eYwoHiqF1iB140dCKLInsno25p1HC6y35evRN-k3Lacr2hMM53VJ1RkyQ2IBjUrV1g8UXb3f2DKtsFUBw8gfeO6q4y2nEHgsYMpSgUFvvRyfrpGBK_lko9OQ97W2_4MsJNfn-Hiq5s_2EmE3YFZipBZv3xsQN-zA3LtPso0hmT_hAG8IpDjPxwAMTbvm-LL_JVKJ8qv2gfzpNZuIsj2Mfk-HKviF7p3q2-yI64cVwO_PMlQ4y5NBzIE-4lolvoz7kEhpSlxRDtLf2hwuj3kuPtPGCIUnESNwlwwhciN3iL-QVCRSvc0TKut_XQ4DDHPzJusAr-2WJdv53fjA6OwOL2yoqqbOhqYKgl-DR9zRsF91NWJyfFQ4bKqUu25SLtUcpfid1KL5XJTvNVv3vC_ORCIMYaqaryAZO7d1VC2yVwET531QjEWjK2mCDsYGxOpr4KBxPRrd395sC_cM9Wuo_uv5ah0sBSm9rrhOqkJZ9d7TmtEbury8_J__Oc5u3CxAcCkraTiS6j3LiWhCWQLM4Ay6cALekEgyLYvb5yJRd7SvUyaGPYsAvBYO6p0BXJAdcRy7Y1bwfzqnYxkM5kzJFsVqnqlveG3PvPt6oxorOoig5WK75NgXiOn8zCt/GhahlfW7ojTJSrB7z-dy1tPC9iMo5NMW/18)

This short quiz will test your knowledge of the history and real-world consequences of dangerous ideologies like Marxism and socialism.

And when you finish, we'll email you the answers, and you can watch our free online documentary-style course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," which tells the whole story--from Lenin's Red Terror to today's Cultural Marxism.

Most young Americans have never learned this history. I know I didn't in high school. But you can help change that with your financial support today.

[After you take your quiz, please also consider giving a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or even $100 to help us share this free course with millions of Americans](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/irIiOD4V8-SaQmNQASnldjejaICYsi0VBtM5d2gvNiZHM-IE_N8nJPAH3OEqBFnauFcaHVXN6MYPKsXxsYvB2AY-e6c9QPcB4OJjlVyz9q5Ei5Zn55-UbelvDxX6XjE4jeRpSG0dnwqzv6_vq9B4Bd4HAM0xqTyUx0SXbjsPKOFdSZh3-rIqg2Mu_FTS_HQKyvtWR7WhM3zmxMbXBFbenkoEYx65vQEObH_XdasWL4aseVHMFczi18mscx7YrTProenHT9FZ-XhIjWxiSNGy1oZvDZliVQTcm-CyD2dNIbKPx4a3HvxXsXtqkbzv7a_zvY-98_04s4SS-1G1I5Dp4kgIxPvADiDMuci_bb_WK25N4yVUZtTKs9I7UZFVtsoEl2596JOm559zvqNtWWZMkqDAE69kRWv6ITYG6yx-k0jj_PWHiY4arXEbOafPvIUuHaPoOAOxg2Vddi_r_5HVzL2AxCk1MhYPAcphJpHxQWD5S4NguznpVkSkm5YR710ia_kKjnq8x1s7LXnvmLDYiQesQ_mxB_V7DWy3QaHe7o5sgIZiXnC5fhEI-orfZPj1iDxV-ettsSI2iRQqn9BO6zDyNMx22m790IHMFQg8qXRifJKx0wCeT8aSv6V34ZhoGtBaFfuyxRFog2sEBuJNvMRhFXH_AJV-1t6_GrCkuY82DfM12hzIfeNJKXEaq_8SFN-Q/Rb5O5EgYES6r4L0pF1HeadUAws7eru9p/18)--especially young people who are misled by the same false ideas that once brought such misery to Russia and the world.

Because of you, more Americans will learn that the principles of liberty in the Declaration of Independence--not Marxism--are the true path to ordered freedom and human flourishing.

Good luck on the quiz.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Lenin's revolution began with promises of equality but ended with terror. The same ideas are spreading again today under new labels.

Please take your National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism now using the secure link below--and, if you can, include a gift to help us reach and teach millions about the principles of liberty and limited government.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxism-quiz-tf](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/YZ3xkRIeZ_-MozPaGLaKQ_Kyw7LhWue9gQuTw-p7VKqj1GAcPmJGV7Z_idrxzb_umPCiuoL1R8rvYoAbxkONFqkh9PWmwe2DHviDvf6a6BJa_l4ALYzUn_rt6hpznjppNVzwnvGZzAVSMZlausm-pFRxKW9V7yHMILoHNtbQDilkh_qBzzwpUWYWo78zLulQ5yjbv3IQkWNUUgdxXxz-L6V1XP5aBJo_UEsDQpToHTx4d-Uw2OisMkdgM7HZf54qk9t5ch2vQthWUCF47hYZ2oBCjinGuENqohKEBXQ04injoGu1N3aU9Ywa-jhbudaKYzow0a8CBYi5U-7HWTGd7FYZCTpsWCgjD0FCTQrM7VxBofHtMv_8wa91kcSxdiE0y7cmSbJNazn1gQw1ULlNycSVqU-MSFVZdd1o9DQffe5441Zf76W0HR7QmUpjcOStIsIkZ3zzi3kNZaVaztIndNzL_9B5f-wzuOyQZeyzjLpgJxFtzuxVGOjzfiOMKrYMI8uuExYrcmTYRC3XqHDiMfqkfJpnQi7PbKOI0xsiCOl36pOKbG7RxeoJC11BuyxGmhY2P2Q5b1FrtxhDWNtAm626zN3pPAwwBVn7PGkxcmyPafZdI7qNh_JjQ34yuSZ7CAwUUbWqCdwduhMa1TiZVbbaSp8e0yZEOq226gP0bczz_HwemFiPic_835jcgD8zq80-/bKtBdk1GollksoZOFPIY-rPovz8R_gG-/18)

name: Team Kelly
subject: A fundamentally important deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends,
In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make a donation to Mark Kelly before midnight tonight. It’s the halfway point to our first FEC deadline of the year.
Please, let us explain why that deadline and your donation are so important.
We all know what Trump and Hegseth put Mark through over the past few months. But this was never just about Mark, or what might happen to him. It’s part of a broader pattern we’ve seen throughout Trump’s term. It is a concerted effort to stamp out and shut up any and all opposition to his pursuit of power.
They thought they could make an example out of Mark and use him to scare others into silence and obedience.
That’s not what happened, and that’s why we’re writing to you with this request. On March 31st, we hit our first, official FEC deadline of 2025. After that, we’ll be legally required to report how many donations Mark received, how many people chipped in, and how much we’ve raised.
When that report hits, we will show everyone from Trump down the true strength of this movement.
[**If you want to send a loud message to Trump, please make a donation. The amount really isn’t as important as the donation itself — they add up fast when a ton of people chip in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mar26.Zy8qu0&refcode=em260315-1-90&t=1&akid=6390%2E6688874%2ErjCFxg)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-mar26.TgVnIR&amount=5&refcode=em260315-1-90&t=2&akid=6390%2E6688874%2ErjCFxg)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-mar26.TgVnIR&refcode=em260315-1-90&t=3&akid=6390%2E6688874%2ErjCFxg)**
---
****
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=6390%2E6688874%2ErjCFxg).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: I don't take you reading our emails for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
Peter,
I don't take you reading our emails for granted, especially on a Sunday.
I know that some campaigns use them to shamelessly guilt people into donating, and others keep people in a never-ending loop of unsubscribing by selling their data to other candidates.
And I know that because I've gotten those shitty "5x DONATION MATCH" emails before too, and I've had to hit unsubscribe 20 times to finally get a break.
**Which is why I wanted our program to be different.**
While I use our emails and texts to ask for help with our campaign, I'll also send a picture of my cat Heater to people who donate or sometimes pretend to be her while I write about the importance of grassroots support, because why not?
**Peter, our election is 2 days away** , and with early voting open and millions in outside spending being dumped in this race, it might be hard to believe, but our silly little emails and texts are what will make the difference.
**[Thanks for being a part of this, and PLEASE, if you're in a position financially where you're able to support our campaign, consider donating to help us counter AIPAC's spending in this race and gather the resources we need to knock on every door in our district.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260315-1-ka.MKWNv2&refcode=em20260315-37563&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=37563%2E1203867%2EAMjQot)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260315-1-ka.MKWNv2&refcode=em20260315-37563&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=21&akid=37563%2E1203867%2EAMjQot)**
In solidarity,
Kat Abughazaleh
P.S. Here's the surprise: a picture of Heater : )
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260315-1-ka.MKWNv2&refcode=em20260315-37563&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=37563%2E1203867%2EAMjQot)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260315-37563-footer&t=23&refcode2=37563_1203867_AMjQot&akid=37563%2E1203867%2EAMjQot)**

clean_body: Peter, I don't take you reading our emails for granted, especially on a Sunday. I know that some campaigns use them to shamelessly guilt people into donating, and others keep people in a never-ending loop of unsubscribing by selling their data to other candidates. And I know that because I've gotten those shitty "5x DONATION MATCH" emails before too, and I've had to hit unsubscribe 20 times to finally get a break. Which is why I wanted our program to be different. While I use our emails and texts to ask for help with our campaign, I'll also send a picture of my cat Heater to people who donate or sometimes pretend to be her while I write about the importance of grassroots support, because why not? Peter, our election is 2 days away , and with early voting open and millions in outside spending being dumped in this race, it might be hard to believe, but our silly little emails and texts are what will make the difference. In solidarity, Kat Abughazaleh P.S. Here's the surprise: a picture of Heater : ) Paid for by Justice Democrats Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. ---
Peter, This is a five-alarm emergency that requires your immediate attention.
---
**With a full-scale war now underway in Iran, we have received dozens of urgent requests from countries in the region to help evacuate U.S. citizens.**
---
Airspace is rapidly being closed down and many of your fellow Americans require safe passage. **Fortunately, Heroes for Humanity was built for moments like this.** We have been preparing for weeks and are asking you right now for your urgent help to fund rapid evacuation capability, medical response, logistics, open source intelligence (OSINT), assets on the ground, and strategic planning, support, and assistance in order to provide life-saving humanitarian relief.
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/c_FiX0-PTkMcvQFJZjMe_X6MzIdjD0LM_ACh6pq7IQw5LBjKDRAL8zW2mKMZkYsPHE8vazInSiCzb8XX0pDmKd7k385x9uy4wx8JBHw32H8K36cAFbLTyQNroYr0ZZyMWF5BGhZKkQvTvDrkTX7j2tn5COdbT2s4BmcwikMm-_OoQpVXihkgX_Zck4uAFu8wbbYCT16k5_NPbM1GY5FcghHAy9Yz1TXOfc0rbeuvErZjrrkHAATBapag2Px12Bs-X7M1YpEMTvVA0uVRyaZ1bqrbMkDRtp9dr4ztg7cOu6LDADy0f4OzpCxjqEFeHCwwlC-DnzcBDPxyiWoC1zG8jLIaxX9hCs7R7Uy-w7c6e8aMN-dtYyhW6PH_epBre8qzNh28wVI1lf-t0spPRJWpzWmRDVCqrpRoznGcNOm--30VFw9E1nWaH6WzUCMIqc6-KNIVS1KYsV3O8oIVAOPmV6mT_BRk5iT81FvekZBgUMeIuAGKFJA6LFMsvk3JSzE_AdQ3ubX1byGRaVUHTu0ydel9t6kf1kBwCuK-QtVYIjLZzq5Lg-eaB9DcAiH1IlE-RKasc3fOKjXTz5cFic9C563fU4323i6VWUzm/A34LVQYESuvgaxIAigUlCUgkXukFBE0D/18)
---
This is Dennis Price. I'm a Marine Special operator and private military contractor with over 15 deployments who now leads rescue operations, humanitarian and medical aid - all led by the Holy Spirit "to free the oppressed, so others may live." **Since 2022, I've been the founder and leader of Heroes for Humanity - a network of special operators, veterans, first responders, medical professionals, and everyday people committed to being the hands and feet of Jesus.** We were born in the chaos of Afghanistan's fall in 2021 - where I personally helped evacuate 77 Americans and vetted Afghan allies, even swimming the Panjshir River behind enemy lines to pull people out. And just the other day, we rescued 8 families from the chaos and violence in Mexico. But our story goes much deeper than even that.
---
---
In 2022, we **deployed to Ukraine for nine months** during the invasion, **delivered medical aid to orphanages** , **supported 65 wounded veterans** , and **ran precision rescues and logistics.** And between 2023 and 2025, we **rescued trafficked children stateside** (including a 12-year-old trapped 45 days in California and a 16-year-old in Virginia), **aided persecuted Christians in China** , **responded to the Texas floods and hurricanes in North Carolina and Florida** , **evacuated 92 American families from Israel** during the 12-Day War, and provided aid after earthquakes and crises in Thailand, Burma, Cuba, Zambia, and more. As you can see, we've been busy all across the globe, _**but right now our only focus is getting Americans out of harm's way in the Middle East where things can go very wrong very quickly.**_ [**Our urgent goal is $1,000,000 and your immediate support enables rescue, medical aid, and protection for the vulnerable. Will you rush in an emergency, time-sensitive donation right now?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/gDTbKkQqzgYyJYLeTPlhmvX9A2PD8AHv_B1ng7SZXccn71tFTLPzSFVLs0ANr9g6MiHf6BFzM-NW-8CMJqZ4uUV2sNckuiUYK1KuUwlKcI2Ah9CkdbRxjpDkm_vmnXF4PZx86-a3qmFJ5Ydp0DKy2q6MF_HTqZ7TIDxXeaCb61CUL_a7wra48WU5WswAVR2A1mZIPV2SlzCJXh6mNljYZtRTPhBlg7eUB-gaA_DDob5nJrOEtB6ijwApWmoVEmgLK2b55Bf4vllKhvAaHBdL5c_pDh-4ZN1A0vJT4TrABRi9EXTgIWlZqokmj-dfTC1BiERW0Sx8i3Vqcj8HEPSAdG2FnyDWqc0ydjMS7C6JIyBqHCKMgZd7dvqIQzqdAZ7JkFUdVvXMmmQTl326IjmOzd_SiUS0ozX94uslKFoJ04roaLRjVIl0FHJN0kowR9m88r45j_YxKcLnXdrFe0K6-GlirGN_Lhq87VJm2E1UpaFTwvjbDGi1JMhhPhZETKSkSiKjQUyoR5mwq1x134CWvXHgbJK5NJ_RLQoIbVGhr9hnlmc7nVlW4saPSboNDlWR_eMB32bjIl5NGzvybCW94oWTmD4Kzg4dNzdw/Q-EvEzIYqv2OqEWvpSeLh75FHZT4rTaz/18) **Lives hang in the balance and you can make the difference.**
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/DjP-XgkAR0IfZdRPCl43lTQzKiqQfJoQ6u9YjB1dHUElsVl4MvsEPkCyp98FzDcuNRxi0sYXsyqNQkQKW2hfBjK0TlFlVYbD8EE4e_AhLFrgFQ_TwUBkXjBbJwqdFWYmUzoI1yq8l6Zesu_rZGhahAVnMPW5-1thgNLe-uq5HtM9EWfY_1d7lsxjD5OCBkw0qZKce8TxNH7_NWmWZZ4WcipUF1tzHuUIrIKnmgFy38jryumNdjHIEE-tAQz1XV0VKSO61O9DuDuepWDuigg-c-E0s8PDqtMsOm-kxZDAY_ZneNZoThsoPti30x9SU2XXB85tAzL6J-tUdP0GRTOLguqyU5kF9VI6en2vck409rsYX1hP5ELahzWztBFk_nOsIW4igqYN1mReppBUChUk_0Hj6kol7U0v69P5gfeP5ccLKfGvfFMUcxBs5qQGXZ0OO6QIvq-XXTWAEztCSUxf72ZFaRwQv4OjTkz8VP99p2SImMnlb-MLihcmhKTKYd7s6TUtvMz1E3QJT4iSHNTXeTGAafRuv0nvjhry0uFMY24_vFGpxnSnBaS2mpN-02zi2MGnl-O8PfucmRLBwJ2dXlISX_UEuQBYj7tA/tPy4Qvv8S7HBpUrrOO1eCFXaIK2MrOm9/18)
---
Beyond your support, we ask for prayer, wisdom, protection for the innocent, and strength for those making difficult decisions.

**Our mission remains clear:_protect the vulnerable, serve with integrity, and act with faith._** Thank you for your time, and further updates will be provided as the security environment allows. Respectfully submitted,

Dennis Price
CEO & Founder
Heroes for Humanity

_" In order for evil to prevail, good men must stand by and do nothing."_

## **CONGRATULATIONS Friend,**

There is no greater honor in the world to me than serving as President of the United States. Every day, I work tirelessly to **[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.-Q/sek72137f50)**
I would not have been able to do any of this without you, and I want to share a very special honor with you!
**This is why I have decided to present you with the****Trump Patriot Medal:**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.-Q/s3ka000123b)
This is one of the greatest honors in the Trump World. JD Vance, Marco Rubio, and Karoline Leavitt have this award.
**_[To claim this honor, simply contribute before my critical mid-month fundraising deadline.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.-Q/s8t88fb68b5)_**

[CLAIM TRUMP PATRIOT MEDAL](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.-Q/sbs8d435fa2)
I cannot thank you enough for your unwavering support. Together, we will continue to usher in a new era of **AMERICAN GREATNESS!**

Thank you for everything, and congratulations!
President Trump

name: Jasmine Clark
subject: We are officially on the ballot for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?]
I have some big news — and I wanted you to hear it from me first: We’re officially on the ballot for Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?]
This race just went from hope to reality — and the work begins right now.
But to pull off a victory against the political establishment, I’m going to need all hands on deck. That’s why I’m asking you personally to chip in $25 or more right now. Can I count on your support to get this campaign in fighting shape to win the primary and deliver for the people of Georgia? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?]
When I first ran for the Georgia House, I flipped a seat Republicans held for over 20 years. I won because we were bold, unwavering, and willing to stand up for what’s true, even when it was hard.
Despite being outspent and redistricted three times, we refused to back down. Now we’re taking that same fight to Congress — because Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans aren’t just threatening our rights, they’re attacking our democracy, our schools, our healthcare, and the very facts we depend on.
Families in Georgia deserve leaders who defend the truth, protect our kids’ future, and build an economy where everyone has a fair shot, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
But getting on the ballot is just step one. Going forward, we need the resources to expand our outreach, mobilize voters, and fight back against millions of outside dollars pushing extreme agendas.
That’s why I’m asking you to help fuel this campaign right now. Donate $10, $25, or more right now to help me seize the momentum and prepare for the fight ahead before it’s too late. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?]
Thank you,
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District

name: Adem T. Bunkeddeko
subject: In Memory of Sulaiman “Sully” Bunkeddeko, 1957-2026
body:
Reflecting on the life of Sully Bunkeddeko.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | Friends,
Over the past week, my family and I have been mourning the sudden loss of my father, whose example has long been the North Star guiding my path.
He came to this country from Uganda, fleeing a tumultuous civil war. Like so many immigrants, he arrived with very little but a deep belief in the promise of America and a determination to build a better life.
His journey was not easy. At one point he was held in an immigration detention center. Later, he worked at McDonald’s to save enough money to bring my mother to the United States.
Over time, he built a career as a caregiver, helping others live with dignity while raising our family in a small one-bedroom apartment in Queens.
Through every hardship, he carried himself with a warm smile, quiet strength, and an unwavering sense of responsibility to others.
Everything I believe about service, grit, and community comes from his example.
This week has reminded me how grateful I am for the kindness and support so many of you have shown. Your messages, encouragement, and prayers have meant more than I can say.
In the coming days, I will be traveling to Uganda to lay my father to rest and to be with our extended family during this time.
I’m carrying my father’s example with me as we continue this campaign. He believed deeply that New York should be a place where working families from across the world can build a life with stability, opportunity, and dignity.
That is the New York we are fighting to build together.
Thank you for standing with us.
With gratitude,
Adem
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, this is it. Radical Islamists and Sharia Law aren't politely knocking on America's front door... They're blowing it right off the hinges! Last week, New York City elected radical Islamo-Marxist Zohran Mamdani as Mayor. Like many Christians, I was devastated to hear that we’d fallen so far as to allow a Radical Leftist to remake our nation’s most powerful city in the image of Islam. The spread of Islam means Sharia Law can’t be far behind. Decades of cultural rot and decay in America bore the poisonous fruit of Zohran Mamdani. So where do you and I go from here? CHRISTIANS MUST ACT! Our country was founded to be one nation under God, and we MUST return to that founding principle. That’s why I’m running for Congress – to serve as an unapologetic voice for Christianity. As a pastor, I’ve spent my life fighting for the Kingdom. I know firsthand how much the demonic Democrat Party wanted to shut down our churches during COVID. But I didn’t yield one inch. And I’ve fought in the legislature for Biblical values protecting the sanctity of life and traditional marriage, while fighting to keep biological men out of women’s sports. If God sends me to Washington, D.C. with your support, you can have faith that I will be the bastion for Christianity that sends shivers down Zohran Mamdani’s spine. Democrats will do ANYTHING to silence Christian values. The Radical Left wants to stamp out Christians’ fighting spirit. They want us to roll over and accept defeat so Democrats can seize power in 2026 and launch the third impeachment hoax against President Trump. But you and I can’t let them win. With your support and by the grace of God, I’ll win this election and lead the fight to take back our country! In faith, Rep. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

body:
MAGA billionaires are trying to stop our momentum. The polls show they're failing.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.u56M4T2Zn0XCS9rl9sfvwNoV2MttK5EgqQlaP9jba4s?) for more

# [The fight ahead](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=188926340&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4OTI2MzQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM1OTA1NzQsImV4cCI6MTc3NjE4MjU3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Xop9LLXEMYX__GLUsl5nuuu3qSjgsFULcuY5zXIkgIE)
### MAGA billionaires are trying to stop our momentum. The polls show they're failing.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Mar 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..PCeRWYb9Rd4pWixOucZ3GxjvbF6uUhsPA3vUhgIL2O4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/the-fight-ahead?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hi friends,
Our country is going through a difficult time - brought on by the chaos and cruelty of Donald Trump's agenda.
But through it all, **I 'm hopeful.**
Good folks are raising their voices, fighting back, and showing up. I see it every day in the Michiganders I talk to - people are ready for a change. Working families are tired of being pushed aside. They want a government that sees them and actually works _for_ them.
**[That's why I'm more fired up than ever. We're going to win this battleground race, and we're going to flip the Senate. I can feel it.](https://substack.com/redirect/fe7f0149-90da-4ba3-97d0-6cd8d7baef16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
And a brand-new poll confirmed what we've known all along: I'm statistically tied with my MAGA opponent Mike Rogers, Trump's handpicked candidate.
Also, among independent voters - _the folks who will ultimately decide this race_ - I'm neck-and-neck with Rogers again. **Meanwhile, both of my primary opponents are deeply underwater with independents.**
So what does that data actually mean? **It means I 'm the Democrat with the best shot to win this seat.**
I can't tell you how proud I am of what we're building together. This campaign is powered by grit, fueled by people, and grounded in Michigan values - hard work, community, and always standing up for what's right.
And believe me, the fight ahead won't be easy.
MAGA Mike Rogers has billionaires lining up behind him, including a Texas oil megadonor who's already poured $5 million into a super PAC supporting his campaign. These folks aren't shy about spending tens of millions to turn Michigan red and help Trump's agenda.
But our grassroots campaign has momentum. And with our mid-month fundraising deadline in just a few hours, we're falling short of reaching our critical $200,000 goal.
**[So if you're in a position to give, even a few dollars, it would mean the world to me. Let's win this race and flip the Senate, and together, we'll shut down Trump's agenda for good.](https://substack.com/redirect/fe7f0149-90da-4ba3-97d0-6cd8d7baef16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/fe7f0149-90da-4ba3-97d0-6cd8d7baef16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's keep going.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/fe7f0149-90da-4ba3-97d0-6cd8d7baef16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The polls show they're failing. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more MAGA billionaires are trying to stop our momentum. The polls show they're failing. | | | Mar 15 | | | | | | Hi friends, Our country is going through a difficult time - brought on by the chaos and cruelty of Donald Trump's agenda. But through it all, I 'm hopeful. Good folks are raising their voices, fighting back, and showing up. I see it every day in the Michiganders I talk to - people are ready for a change. Working families are tired of being pushed aside. They want a government that sees them and actually works for them. And a brand-new poll confirmed what we've known all along: I'm statistically tied with my MAGA opponent Mike Rogers, Trump's handpicked candidate. Also, among independent voters - the folks who will ultimately decide this race - I'm neck-and-neck with Rogers again. Meanwhile, both of my primary opponents are deeply underwater with independents. So what does that data actually mean? It means I 'm the Democrat with the best shot to win this seat. I can't tell you how proud I am of what we're building together. This campaign is powered by grit, fueled by people, and grounded in Michigan values - hard work, community, and always standing up for what's right. And believe me, the fight ahead won't be easy. MAGA Mike Rogers has billionaires lining up behind him, including a Texas oil megadonor who's already poured $5 million into a super PAC supporting his campaign. These folks aren't shy about spending tens of millions to turn Michigan red and help Trump's agenda. But our grassroots campaign has momentum. And with our mid-month fundraising deadline in just a few hours, we're falling short of reaching our critical $200,000 goal. Let's keep going. With grit and gratitude, Haley A personal note from Haley 👋 I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love. But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican. I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win. If you're with me, will you chip in today? Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan. | | | (C) 2026 Haley for MI 33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009 ? ?

I’ll be blunt: nobody’s ever guaranteed an election win. Especially not a grassroots campaign like this one. _But our movement is growing every day._
**Phil puts Coloradans over everything else.** That’s why he decided to run this campaign for governor the right way and has never accepted corporate PAC donations.
That’s why Phil takes every chance he can to show up and listen to Coloradans in cities and rural counties alike. Even when he’s the only candidate willing to attend. (And, if I can be blunt again? Between forums, town halls, and the local caucuses that just wrapped up, _Phil’s been the only gubernatorial candidate to show up at more than a few events this cycle — even during congressional recesses._)
**[Look, every day and every dollar counts when you’re building a real, unshakeable movement by and for everyday Coloradans. So if we want to win in June, we’ve got to pull together now. Ordinarily, a small percentage of folks donate when we ask, but today I’m checking in with everyone on this team: can you add your $3 toward our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127377091/607858763/2079489136?amount=3&refcode=ea.6c87fa0d-8820-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.6c87fa0d-8820-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yzg3ZmEwZC04ODIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rvOzwPS-8Acxr6nYEU7HhgE_iaTvFBcs25EbLfr6xUw=)**

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: I’m running for re-election to fight for you and our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I need your support, not just to power our movement to stand up to Trump, but to prepare for the re-election fight ahead. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW_Gm1-a0sURwz-dp8-AYHm-1G5gw8EyDk_L8ZUKZapE2Vvdn3Kqb3U4e4lVnWqixplhO7YbQfW8B8Mp2L9gBM40-pTEzvl4vhY4MwgC6qD9s5CpdO2lvkOC-ZrKVm_KpdnRCgjZZKQJbBk17pP1LaI03bAddHIhqG8Ppe3MA97ht0lSYw_j_ma_TK3eVclLIf5YVlkOSQimt6jEmDASZWgkgMeevaRgVsjBdyHEyc_dgwwL9pin8vkWuHGbzbCL9N/4oy/RM8W-poZTJSYIBzJecNIqA/h0/h001.paf-RIzcQsj0495TsPc9mBaoOtA-KVnUwpwMxsO8z0E)
---
Friend, We have officially filed our petition signatures to run for re-election―collecting and submitting signatures from every city, village and township in the 12th congressional district. **In this re-election, we know what we’re up against: Billionaire bullies and a pro-genocide lobby that seek to silence our voices for justice and accountability.** Yesterday, I wrote to you about all that we have accomplished together, including critical investments in our communities. **But in the face of relentless attacks by this administration on our neighbors and our democracy, we must not rest in our struggle for humanity over aggression.** We’re demanding a government that takes on greedy price-gouging corporations, that restrains obscene billionaire wealth, that lowers the costs of healthcare, housing, food, and utilities, and that defends the very foundation of our democracy: our right to vote. Subject: I’m running for re-election to fight for you and our communities
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
I am officially running for re-election in Michigan’s 12th congressional district.
**This week, we filed our petition to be on the ballot, submitting the maximum-allowed 2,000 signatures, with people signing from every city and township in the district.**
This is what a people-powered campaign looks like: one that meets residents where they are and responds to their needs.
In my time in Congress, I’ve introduced and passed legislation that invests in clean water, stopped water shutoffs, and invests directly in our communities, including in senior and community centers. **In my district alone, we’ve invested $52 million:**
✔ $23.6 Million for Community Spaces _(parks, schools, health centers, green spaces, and more)_
✔ $12.3 Million for Water Projects _(lead pipe replacement, water lines/systems, pumps)_
✔ $6.6 Million for Housing _(affordable, home repairs, shelters)_
✔ $5.5 Million for Economic Development _(training, workforce, broadband, and more)_
✔ $2 Million for Roads
✔ $1.5 Million for Public Services _(fire department and equipment)_

**I am running for re-election because our work together in Congress is far from done.**
We’re demanding justice from Detroit to Gaza. We’re demanding ICE out of our communities and an end to forced family separation. We’re demanding an economy that puts everyday people first, not billionaires and greedy corporations. **And, instead of more blank checks for war and military aggression, we’re demanding investments in our communities here at home.**
I need your support, not just to power our movement to stand up to Trump, but to prepare for the re-election fight ahead.
**We saw what happened in the 2024 election when right-wing AIPAC millionaires flooded Democratic primaries, defeating two of our progressive allies.** That’s why we’re preparing now for our re-election, because we need voices in Congress who are willing to take on the billionaire bullies, corporate greed, and the pro-genocide lobby.

clean_body: I need your support, not just to power our movement to stand up to Trump, but to prepare for the re-election fight ahead. | | | Friend, We have officially filed our petition signatures to run for re-election―collecting and submitting signatures from every city, village and township in the 12th congressional district. In this re-election, we know what we’re up against: Billionaire bullies and a pro-genocide lobby that seek to silence our voices for justice and accountability. Yesterday, I wrote to you about all that we have accomplished together, including critical investments in our communities. But in the face of relentless attacks by this administration on our neighbors and our democracy, we must not rest in our struggle for humanity over aggression. We’re demanding a government that takes on greedy price-gouging corporations, that restrains obscene billionaire wealth, that lowers the costs of healthcare, housing, food, and utilities, and that defends the very foundation of our democracy: our right to vote. ** | With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib**** Date: Sat, Mar 14, 2026 Subject: I’m running for re-election to fight for you and our communities To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I am officially running for re-election in Michigan’s 12th congressional district. This week, we filed our petition to be on the ballot, submitting the maximum-allowed 2,000 signatures, with people signing from every city and township in the district. This is what a people-powered campaign looks like: one that meets residents where they are and responds to their needs. In my time in Congress, I’ve introduced and passed legislation that invests in clean water, stopped water shutoffs, and invests directly in our communities, including in senior and community centers. In my district alone, we’ve invested $52 million: ✔ $23.6 Million for Community Spaces (parks, schools, health centers, green spaces, and more) ✔ $12.3 Million for Water Projects (lead pipe replacement, water lines/systems, pumps) ✔ $6.6 Million for Housing (affordable, home repairs, shelters) ✔ $5.5 Million for Economic Development (training, workforce, broadband, and more) ✔ $2 Million for Roads ✔ $1.5 Million for Public Services (fire department and equipment) I am running for re-election because our work together in Congress is far from done. We’re demanding justice from Detroit to Gaza. We’re demanding ICE out of our communities and an end to forced family separation. We’re demanding an economy that puts everyday people first, not billionaires and greedy corporations. And, instead of more blank checks for war and military aggression, we’re demanding investments in our communities here at home. I need your support, not just to power our movement to stand up to Trump, but to prepare for the re-election fight ahead. We saw what happened in the 2024 election when right-wing AIPAC millionaires flooded Democratic primaries, defeating two of our progressive allies. That’s why we’re preparing now for our re-election, because we need voices in Congress who are willing to take on the billionaire bullies, corporate greed, and the pro-genocide lobby. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being by my side as, together, we demand a government that puts everyday people first. Always serving you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | **Jacky Rosen Democratic Strategy Memo
March 15, 2026**
---
**THE STATE OF THE SENATE**
---
* Democrats can take back the Senate majority and stop Trump's dangerous agenda if we **flip four seats.**

* The problem is that Trump won by more than 10 points in all but two states where Republicans are up for reelection – which means we've got a tough fight ahead of us.

* In addition to picking up four seats, Democrats also have to _defend_ several vulnerable seats to maintain our shot at taking back the Senate.

---
| | **KEY PICK-UP OPPORTUNITIES FOR DEMOCRATS**
---
* **Texas:** Republicans are in a messy primary brawl in Texas, which could give Democratic rising star James Talarico the edge we need to flip the Lone Star State.

* **Ohio:** Sherrod Brown is a strong working class voice and the most beloved Democrat in Ohio – and he is 2 points ahead in his race to make a comeback to the Senate.

* **North Carolina:** Though holding this seat is a top priority for the GOP, every single poll shows former Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper ahead of his Trump-backed opponent.

---
| | **WHAT DEMOCRATS NEED TO WIN**
---
* Trump's wealthy allies will soon be flooding all these battlegrounds with **millions of dollars** to tilt the scales in the GOP’s favor.

* That's why Democrats **can’t wait** any longer to kick our fundraising into high gear.

* We're **urgently calling on grassroots supporters like you **to help us power our fight to take back the Senate majority.

---
**My team has set a $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal we need to reach before midnight tonight to help Democrats win big in 2026 and stop the disastrous Trump-Republican agenda._[Please, chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can now to help Democrats flip the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127378184/607862577/-105825184?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5724-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjk1OWRiYy04ODIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YaaXIgmaUWx9UKjDWPpq87MxeHjxwoOCud2y5AofBOw=)_**

clean_body: I wanted to share these toplines with you | | | Hi friend, it’s Jacky. My campaign advisors just sent me our latest Strategy Memo, and I want to make sure top supporters on my team have a chance to take a look. That includes you. But before I give you the toplines: = | | = | | Jacky Rosen Democratic Strategy Memo March 15, 2026 THE STATE OF THE SENATE Democrats can take back the Senate majority and stop Trump's dangerous agenda if we flip four seats. The problem is that Trump won by more than 10 points in all but two states where Republicans are up for reelection – which means we've got a tough fight ahead of us. In addition to picking up four seats, Democrats also have to defend several vulnerable seats to maintain our shot at taking back the Senate. | | KEY PICK-UP OPPORTUNITIES FOR DEMOCRATS Texas: Republicans are in a messy primary brawl in Texas, which could give Democratic rising star James Talarico the edge we need to flip the Lone Star State. Ohio: Sherrod Brown is a strong working class voice and the most beloved Democrat in Ohio – and he is 2 points ahead in his race to make a comeback to the Senate. North Carolina: Though holding this seat is a top priority for the GOP, every single poll shows former Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper ahead of his Trump-backed opponent. | | WHAT DEMOCRATS NEED TO WIN Trump's wealthy allies will soon be flooding all these battlegrounds with millions of dollars to tilt the scales in the GOP’s favor. That's why Democrats can’t wait any longer to kick our fundraising into high gear. We're urgently calling on grassroots supporters like you to help us power our fight to take back the Senate majority. My team has set a $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal we need to reach before midnight tonight to help Democrats win big in 2026 and stop the disastrous Trump-Republican agenda.= | | = Thank you, friend. It means the world to me to have you on my team. Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also = to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help.
