name: Voter Action Project Research Team
subject: What do you think of ranked choice voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Bolts: Native Leaders Organize to Defend Alaska’s Ranked Choice Voting System [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Bolts_RankedChoiceVoting.png]
Friend - "Ranked choice" voting is a popular tool in the push to make the voting process more democratic and enable citizens to have a greater voice when they go to the polls.
If you’ve never heard of it, the explanation is simple : the voter gets to rank the candidates in the order they prefer them, instead of just picking one. This helps empower a diverse slate of candidates and also acknowledges that, if your first choice didn’t win, you’d certainly prefer a second candidate who more closely resembles your beliefs rather than having the other main party win by default.
The use of ranked choice voting is still being discussed, including states like Alaska, where an effort is underway to get rid of it.
With the debate continuing, we need to know how interested you are in fighting for the implementation of ranked-choice voting.
Do you approve of ranked choice voting?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=031526_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=031526_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=031526_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=031526_1&amount=20]

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Just weeks away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team, we are just weeks away from my end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. Several ultra-MAGA opponents have entered the race. And GOP-aligned Super PACs are already spending millions attacking me.

This is the fight ahead. And I need you by my side.

Before you turn in: [**Can you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before March 31 to help me win in Georgia?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104573?t=6&akid=23158%2E878179%2ERZJsLh) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104574?t=7&akid=23158%2E878179%2ERZJsLh)
---
When I first ran for Senate five years ago, it was because I believed the election of someone so deeply unfit for the presidency posed a danger to the country.

Many people said it couldn’t be done. But you believed — not just in me, but that our Republic is worth defending, and Georgia could lead the way.

Then we won. Not just a Senate seat, but the Senate majority for Democrats.

Now Trump has launched a power grab unprecedented in our history, abusing his power and trying to poison our Republic with fear and intimidation.

Americans are now living in fear of their own government.

I’m fighting back, but I can’t do this alone.

I need you with me.

[**Please, if you can make it work, split what you can between me and the Voter Protection Project before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104573?t=8&akid=23158%2E878179%2ERZJsLh)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Ossoff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104575?t=9&akid=23158%2E878179%2ERZJsLh)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104574?t=13&akid=23158%2E878179%2ERZJsLh)
As always,

Jon Ossoff
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23158%2E878179%2ERZJsLh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23158%2E878179%2ERZJsLh).**

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40984%2E3422442%2EJSKATR)
Peter, there are 50 days until ballots drop in California—and this race is tight.
Katie is up against a self-funding billionaire and opponents bankrolled by special interests. If we don’t act now, there’s a real chance two Republicans could advance to the general election.
**Katie is fighting for working families across California, not billionaires.**
Unlike her opponents, she doesn’t take corporate cash, lobbyist money, or write huge personal checks to her campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters who want a government that works for everyday Californians.
That’s why we need your help to keep Katie’s edge, pull ahead, and make sure she’s on November’s ballot.
**We’ve set a $15,000 goal to raise by tonight’s mid-month deadline to reach as many voters as possible before ballots drop.**
**[Will you chip in $5 today to help make this happen? Every dollar helps fight back against the billionaires and special interests trying to buy this race.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260315_1_ak.TvBNRh&refcode=em20260315-40984&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40984%2E3422442%2EJSKATR)**

Thank you,
Team Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260315-40984&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40984_3422442_JSKATR&akid=40984%2E3422442%2EJSKATR)**

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The message Charlie carried into eternity
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0y2auxc2j1hh0mdbyn2uq0ujb06k7ehwhoz1fahwe2k5biptkkcn7rjn0prft0rrpwd3d3lhj4&__stmp=tbydoj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0y2auxc2j1hh0mdbyn2uq0ujb06k7ehwhoz1fahwe2k5biptkkcn7rjn0prft0rrpwd3d3lhj4&__stmp=tbydoj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6wsid0efxisyes0ahhlo5yxs2p4x3wuic9u6oo23y2wgwi2uuhhrz9js4oppt4sw34yzugeuh8o4hegqeyfj77hntszv7z91cx0awi8bjb4uh21anjk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat561ig7uw2o903yinm35j3tqm6k99vsbhog0xjdrthxholrjitanopy7215a7lwuaplam3lo5og7su8sqq5aask2zu3kya733aucbvmmeuztd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbydoj&__onlt=h)

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. ** 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / MATERIAL RELATIONSHIP NOTICE: Presume the sender of this email has an affiliate or other material connection with the entities or individuals mentioned and may receive compensation for purchases made through related websites. Peter, I’m sorry to reach out on a Sunday, **but this can’t wait.** Our $20,000 mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight — and right now, we’re falling short. You and I have both seen the attacks on our state. We’ve heard the lies and watched as Georgia’s elections have been targeted. Georgia Republicans in Congress pushed through the “SAVE Act” — a bill designed to confuse voters, create barriers, and make it harder for eligible Georgians to cast a ballot. But here’s what gives me hope: **Georgians know how to fight back.** We’re building the largest voter protection operation in our state’s history. We’re preparing legal teams to challenge suppression in court. We’re deploying organizers to educate voters and protect every single ballot. And what we build here won’t just defend Georgia — **it will become a blueprint for the nation on how to fight back and win against these attacks.** [But to do that, we must hit our $20,000 goal before midnight tonight. Will you rush a donation right now to help us defend the right to vote and build a movement that can win in November and inspire the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127386973/607887303/-1655506158?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_031526_B1_MM4_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2FlYzAzOS05ZDIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IR8elyGMr74u7_WpKD1KQJZ7PU1k4NWV5uiDHvajz5Y=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

name: Wesley Bell
subject: In case there was any uncertainty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
I want to make one thing clear, Peter: Kristi Noem's firing as Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security doesn't end our fight against this reckless and corrupt administration.

Even with Noem gone, ICE is still operating under lax recruitment standards with little to no government oversight. **That should scare all of us.**

Right now, there's pressure in Congress to hand over more funding to ICE, and many of my spineless Republican colleagues are ready to be rubber-stamps.

Peter, I have said it before and I will say it again: **I will NOT fund cruelty and I will NEVER look away while our neighbors are terrorized.** Simply put, _there's no way I'll ever sign on to support Trump's deadly, dehumanizing agenda._

Standing up to this administration and its enablers means flipping the House blue this November. We need to ensure no more of Trump's yes-men like Noem make their way to Washington. To do that, I need to know that I can count on you fighting with me every step of the way. [**Before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help me keep this campaign in fighting clean_body: I want to make one thing clear, Peter: Kristi Noem's firing as Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security doesn't end our fight against this reckless and corrupt administration. Even with Noem gone, ICE is still operating under lax recruitment standards with little to no government oversight. That should scare all of us. Right now, there's pressure in Congress to hand over more funding to ICE, and many of my spineless Republican colleagues are ready to be rubber-stamps. Peter, I have said it before and I will say it again: I will NOT fund cruelty and I will NEVER look away while our neighbors are terrorized. Simply put, there's no way I'll ever sign on to support Trump's deadly, dehumanizing agenda. Standing up to this administration and its enablers means flipping the House blue this November. We need to ensure no more of Trump's yes-men like Noem make their way to Washington. To do that, I need to know that I can count on you fighting with me every step of the way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Let's get this done, Wesley = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

body:
We need your help to turn in an Oscar-worthy performance this year in our fight to stop Trump from rigging our elections.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXOJx7MiG_peXfSRjG-HPhheASSYqrIrnKTcXyo0QnrU3OZGwq0wm5WFNqkKUrxSw-cuGjKO8oPasoRVt20hJ1O_h2yY8jc9eys2GPK16C8U-FokjS_y5gQctpf3ts8sD-GSa5KrSizVi66Mpr3d9ar2Dg2KIc1doe38oWi3Z1-6jt_x5MCUaYJh3rcvQuhoWWdIYL3P2hzKiKAVqi7KIg==&c=Dayfni42B4i36LAXlcr6HTGUHY4-y4IwVzvzmH7_9Ain0cC6Jvk7Ug==&ch=jqfkIQa3ujjE5qoEdigpzFkMKJoGMQTCC7ww9PlE_DRYAmYOuwQTHw==)

Peter,
Tonight is the Academy Awards, and there are lots of great films and performances vying for an Oscar. (Side note: If you haven't yet seen Hamnet, do yourself a favor and watch it as soon as you can. But be prepared for tears of joy and sadness.)
No such ceremony exists for recognizing incredible feats in politics -- for good reason. Politics shouldn't be treated like Hollywood blockbusters; people's lives are at stake.
But since Donald Trump has reduced every serious national issue into bloodsport entertainment for his MAGA base, we thought we would ask if you could [take a minute to help us produce an Oscar-worthy performance this year](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXOJx7MiG_peXfSRjG-HPhheASSYqrIrnKTcXyo0QnrU3OZGwq0wm5WFNqkKUrxSw-cuGjKO8oPasoRVt20hJ1O_h2yY8jc9eys2GPK16C8U-FokjS_y5gQctpf3ts8sD-GSa5KrSizVi66Mpr3d9ar2Dg2KIc1doe38oWi3Z1-6jt_x5MCUaYJh3rcvQuhoPEoLc0qNE5sfI-YMS5R0uA==&c=Dayfni42B4i36LAXlcr6HTGUHY4-y4IwVzvzmH7_9Ain0cC6Jvk7Ug==&ch=jqfkIQa3ujjE5qoEdigpzFkMKJoGMQTCC7ww9PlE_DRYAmYOuwQTHw==) in our fight to stop Trump from rigging our elections:
Nominee: Colorado Draws The Line Category: Best Performance Against MAGA For: Campaign to Redistrict Colorado and Flip 3 GOP House Seats From Red to Blue
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXOJx7MiG_peXfSRjG-HPhheASSYqrIrnKTcXyo0QnrU3OZGwq0wm5WFNqkKUrxSw-cuGjKO8oPasoRVt20hJ1O_h2yY8jc9eys2GPK16C8U-FokjS_y5gQctpf3ts8sD-GSa5KrSizVi66Mpr3d9ar2Dg2KIc1doe38oWi3Z1-6jt_x5MCUaYJh3rcvQuho0T-oi8hcOaMlhG9abHinpw==&c=Dayfni42B4i36LAXlcr6HTGUHY4-y4IwVzvzmH7_9Ain0cC6Jvk7Ug==&ch=jqfkIQa3ujjE5qoEdigpzFkMKJoGMQTCC7ww9PlE_DRYAmYOuwQTHw==)
---
Today is our mid-March deadline and like Caesar's warning to beware the Ides of March, our optimism for redistricting Colorado and flipping three GOP seats from red to solid blue must come with a heavy note of caution: we could fail.
Now that we are drawing their attention, MAGA is coming in hot to stop us. Trump has repeatedly targeted Colorado for retribution. And when he sees that we are on the cusp of victory here, he'll call in Elon Musk and all the MAGA billionaires to come out in force to defeat us.
That's why we are asking for your support right now--we have to hit our targets this fundraising quarter to gather over 200,000 signatures spread out in each of Colorado's 35 state senate districts to get our measure on the ballot and in front of voters.
[Will you throw your support behind our effort to redistrict blue Colorado by chipping in $25, $50, or more today? With your help, we'll be on track to turn in an Oscar-worthy performance that will make Dems proud and turn the tide against Trump's vicious attacks on free and fair elections:](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WXOJx7MiG_peXfSRjG-HPhheASSYqrIrnKTcXyo0QnrU3OZGwq0wm5WFNqkKUrxSdOjR2Xp0TKgsqtZFJrfaq1z68cxS2bVvnO8NhOcipYslWOU18ThqXjDuOd-6-pbpFGmoCXTwJTzgDVvHeKwwdCZJCK7cWosCndyGlV2awJ83yhnwLdMrE6UfcrX9H-qaOm5qCfxtnlhojSso-j9pSKIVXK4jT6PW&c=Dayfni42B4i36LAXlcr6HTGUHY4-y4IwVzvzmH7_9Ain0cC6Jvk7Ug==&ch=jqfkIQa3ujjE5qoEdigpzFkMKJoGMQTCC7ww9PlE_DRYAmYOuwQTHw==)

name: DNC HQ
subject: Will you share your thoughts?
body:
---
Derek, We know your time is valuable, [**so this March 2026 Grassroots Priorities Survey will just take a minute.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260315-grassroots-priorities-survey/?refcode=em_20260315_6391_fr&amount=7&akid=6391%2E22930333%2EePsPBq) The DNC’s midterm election work is ramping up _fast_ , so we need to make sure we’re on the same page as our grassroots team of donors, volunteers, voters, and supporters. We know what Trump and his Republican allies’ priorities are: their billionaire donors, far-right super PACs, and their bottom line. **Our priorities? The well-being of the American people.** **That’s why we want to hear from you today: With your input, we’re better equipped to address your concerns and center the issues that matter the most to _you_.** Derek, Trump and the GOP know that the biggest threat to their power is a well-organized Democratic Party, and your feedback plays a critical role in that infrastructure. [**So, please, will you take just a minute to let us know what’s top of mind for you heading into midterms this year?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260315-grassroots-priorities-survey/?refcode=em_20260315_6391_fr&amount=7&akid=6391%2E22930333%2EePsPBq) **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260315-grassroots-priorities-survey/?refcode=em_20260315_6391_fr&akid=6391%2E22930333%2EePsPBq)** Thank you for your feedback, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Derek — As of 2:44 pm, we’re 84% of the way to our mid-month fundraising goal. But that last 16%? **That’s the whole ballgame right there.** We know 16% doesn’t sound like a lot — but it really is. Peter, Politics these days often rewards the loudest voices. Outrage travels fast. Cable news clips travel even faster. And too often, the politicians who spend the most time chasing attention are the ones who end up dominating the conversation. _That might work for Andy Ogles._ **But it’s not what Chaz has built his career on.** [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/D-cmEthXRdk5xBEKE_tsqg~~/AAUS1hA~/76mn43zdJH8coYa5OG0s44ufWznI8qj8sKkwvfFUmpOCc1Y-4lDi9PhD16tA9M6Swa1kwZkAxirLO-6kuG1AAkV2-V29T7djZ4vUKOjnN5uquKsYlzXV30AJmrkNU8oBcYTUk82GNzanNn6meZYIfUQV7Qr3uAzs2Fhf81uagkQ~)
As mayor, Chaz has focused on the basics: solving problems, bringing people together, and making sure the things people rely on every day actually work. Roads that need fixing. Schools that need support. Public safety. The kind of leadership that doesn’t always make headlines but makes communities stronger. The truth is, reasonable leadership doesn’t go viral. It grows one supporter at a time. **That’s why we set a goal tonight: 100 new grassroots donors before midnight.** The end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up in a few weeks, and those numbers become public. The stronger this campaign looks heading into that moment, the more seriously this race will be taken. **[Will you be one of the 100 by chipping in before midnight tonight?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/SUSmWY4pn9jAZI8T3yjAtQ~~/AAUS1hA~/NT-ocB6oHR4-JFfA8WNXw5fWcSXCRFPYsZ8jDWlHvOC2voOJPGJzKYPKzCAQTKXzDHKSzzgVqqjGpVUDLSoU-QstqHUyuX4rmLdLVrEOqSDlio3uPU3QcclQB4G1vBWb6f2zF3Ilj5HSjCQUfbj9V0UaujfJKRnlz87SHYNoruU~)** | | [BE ONE OF THE 100](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UQpOIaoEQKE290G5MmeVCg~~/AAUS1hA~/NT-ocB6oHR4-JFfA8WNXw5fWcSXCRFPYsZ8jDWlHvOC2voOJPGJzKYPKzCAQTKXzDHKSzzgVqqjGpVUDLSoU-eOikcTYIi04IpCBkDwenFPpbDyQt471yV1jbjgoix7oZDCw0lb4oAQib2yIljxl7LGAnPiqmLDddq_yx8TqDTQ~)

We have a big end-of-quarter deadline coming up and now that we’re officially halfway through the month, we’re coming up a bit short of where we’d like to be. I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot lately, and I appreciate you sticking with us. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
[Mark as Spam](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1wmofsd99qel9a58xdi6symsko12tmoa91lh0mfv9vk13ei5hj6nt3tex1zuvwx5xfdx5dyg3n5n6fnapwbl67f5p9r&__stmp=tbygsi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1wmofsd99qel9a58xdi6symsko12tmoa91lh0mfv9vk13ei5hj6nt3tex1zuvwx5xfdx5dyg3n5n6fnapwbl67f5p9r&__stmp=tbygsi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbygsi&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, “We’re not backing down.” This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. ** 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / MATERIAL TIE DISCLOSURE: You should presume the sender of this email has an affiliate or other financial relationship with the entities or persons noted in this message and may be compensated for purchases made on associated websites. Because voters deserve certainty that polling places will remain safe, accessible, and free from intimidation.
Free and fair elections depend on voters feeling safe when they show up to cast a ballot. Polling places should never become sites of intimidation.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I was evicted after an ICE agent called the police on me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
As a Congressman, it’s my JOB to hold our government to account.
But when I tried to fulfill my legal right to visit ICE facilities, I was evicted after a masked ICE agent called the police.
I'm an immigrant. My children are first-generation Americans. Every day, I see innocent, hardworking people being violently detained and uprooted from their communities – all to serve Trump’s sick political agenda.
For months, ICE agents have been wreaking havoc on our communities and operating without ANY accountability. And in front of our very eyes, this lawlessness has turned deadly.
This is not how a democracy treats people, NAME.
But the MAGA loyalists in the White House and Senate have made clear they have zero respect for Democracy, the law, or the basic rights of our neighbors.
If I've learned anything in my life as an immigrant in this country, it’s that success comes from translating our anger and worry into action.
That’s why I’m leading the fight to pass legislation restricting ICE agents from wearing masks that conceal their identities, allowing them to operate with zero accountability.
It’s why I’m demanding MAXIMUM oversight for ICE – now the highest-funded law enforcement agency under Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” – to make sure they’re respecting the law and our constitution.
It’s also why I’m running for Senate. Because we need leaders with a backbone to FIGHT BACK and stop Donald Trump before it’s too late.
Voting has already begun in my race, and it will be one of the FIRST opportunities of 2026 to strike a blow against Trump and ICE's agenda.
If you’re with me, please split $10 or $25 between my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild now to END Trump’s authoritarian MAGA agenda >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
CHIP IN TODAY TO DEFEAT MAGA EXTREMISM! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
Thank you for standing with me,
Raja Krishnamoorthi

clean_body: | | | Friend, We’re a few months into the election year, and boy, have I felt the support. With a growing list of endorsements from leaders I look up to and work beside every day, it motivates me to keep fighting for our community and state. I want you to read the email my team recently sent out about reaching our$5,000 mid-month fundraising goal before our deadline at midnight tonight. — Doris \-----Forwarded Message----- Friend, Senator Adam Schiff, Senator Alex Padilla, Congressman Robert Garcia, Congresswoman Lateefah Simon, Congresswoman Sara Jacobs, Mayor Kevin McCarty, the Sacramento-Sierra Building Trades, the Construction Trades Council, and more have all recently joined Doris’s long list of endorsements. They recognize that Doris has been fighting for civil rights her entire life, delivered real results for our communities and California, stood up to federal overreach, and secured funding and support where it’s needed most. It’s critical that we continue to uplift each other and fight together to defend democracy for our communities and protect every voice. And we hope that you will stand with them to support Doris. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Let’s do this. —Team Matsui As a Member of Congress, Doris works to ensure that the voices of her district’s constituents are heard in Congress, and fights for the needs of the Sacramento region. Paid for by Matsui for Congress

body:
It’s Andrea. Sorry to bother you on a Sunday, but I just got off the phone with my team, and I had to fill you in: [**Tonight we’re facing our first fundraising deadline since I launched my reelection campaign, and we’re still about $1,800 short of our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127389120/607893960/1485128568?refcode=email_031526_MMFR2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWU1MjU3ZC1hNzIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skSFJQzFtJvlomijBASfNshIGdKvirzxkwlT6vxWvE0=) Here’s the truth: Some campaigns can have weak mid-month and end-of-quarter showings. But not OR-06. National Republicans have targeted this seat for _years,_ and have spent millions to come within striking distance of flipping OR-06 TWICE. With this grassroots team by our side, I’ve been able to overcome the flood of GOP dark money both times. But this year, OR-06 is in the crosshairs again — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. I’m a major obstacle to the GOP’s plans to expand its fragile majority and advance Trump’s extreme agenda. _They won’t hesitate for a moment to flood this district with dark-money ads to replace me with a MAGA rubber stamp._ **_[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today: The truth is, we can only hold onto this seat and compete with the GOP’s deep pockets if we meet every goal we set. Can you chip in a couple of dollars before midnight to help us fill this budget gap? | | I originally went to the Middle East because there was a South Carolina family who was stranded. Because when your people are stranded in a war zone getting hit with missiles and rockets, **the only answer worthy of the office - worthy of our country - is to _get them out._** I have not slept. Not eaten much. And seen things. _I am grateful for every exhausting moment of it._ There are those who govern from a distance - who weigh the optics or wait for the situation to resolve itself - **and then there are those who get on a plane.** **I am the person who has always gotten on the plane.** **The families I traveled to Israel for are now safely home._Praise God._**

But then I learned about more families. Hundreds of families. Thousands. _Still stranded._ _**Seeing this conflict firsthand reminded me of what's at stake when the world becomes dangerous, and leadership becomes a question of character - not convenience.**_ I will never forget what I saw. What I learned. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | 155 Americans. 11 infants. 1 critical mission. I left Israel on a rescue flight full of Americans. | | | | I originally went to the Middle East because there was a South Carolina family who was stranded. Because when your people are stranded in a war zone getting hit with missiles and rockets, the only answer worthy of the office - worthy of our country - is to get them out. I have not slept. Not eaten much. And seen things. I am grateful for every exhausting moment of it. There are those who govern from a distance - who weigh the optics or wait for the situation to resolve itself - and then there are those who get on a plane. I am the person who has always gotten on the plane. The families I traveled to Israel for are now safely home.Praise God. But then I learned about more families. Hundreds of families. Thousands. Still stranded. Seeing this conflict firsthand reminded me of what's at stake when the world becomes dangerous, and leadership becomes a question of character - not convenience. I will never forget what I saw. What I learned. And the Americans who volunteered to help their fellow Americans, and those who are serving our nation patriotically tonight and always. Today, I’m asking that you pray with me. 🙏 For the Americans who are still waiting, begging, praying they’ll make it home safely. 🙏 For the troops risking their lives - and paying the ultimate sacrifice - to defend our freedoms.🙏 For the volunteers providing food, aid, shelter, and hope. 🙏Lastly, I ask that you pray for our leaders who didn’t get on the plane. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor | | Copyright © 2025 , All rights reserved.

body:
The American people deserve the truth. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127389544/607895689/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20260315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGJmYzViOS1hOTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riX2-_WMyijwywGcBS-GbK5ELB4Xbyq4Q54ibngLirY=&emci=69abc7b3-a920-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=10bfc5b9-a920-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045)
---
I don’t like to make a habit of emailing you on a Sunday but I wanted this to get to you sooner than later. A few days ago, with 15 of my Senate colleagues, I demanded answers from the Trump administration for removing exhibits about slavery, Native American history, and climate change from national parks across the country. Right now, Trump is trying to dumb down and cheapen our national parks with a sanitized version of history that serves his politics, not reality. I made it very clear: _our history is not his to erase._ The American people deserve the truth. And we can demand full accountability if we elect more effective, moral leadership in Washington and win back the Senate majority this November. Voters across the country are heading to the polls in some of the most important primary elections of this cycle in Pennsylvania, North Carolina, New Mexico, and more. The Democrats who win these nominations will go head to head with Republicans in November, and we need the right people in those races. **That won’t happen if people like you don’t get involved.** With our quarterly FEC deadline around the corner, your support today would go a long way. [**Can you pitch in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127389545/607895694/-1797390075?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20260315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGJmYzViOS1hOTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=riX2-_WMyijwywGcBS-GbK5ELB4Xbyq4Q54ibngLirY=) Our history belongs to the people, and I will keep fighting to make sure it stays that way. — Martin

clean_body: The American people deserve the truth. I don’t like to make a habit of emailing you on a Sunday but I wanted this to get to you sooner than later. A few days ago, with 15 of my Senate colleagues, I demanded answers from the Trump administration for removing exhibits about slavery, Native American history, and climate change from national parks across the country. Right now, Trump is trying to dumb down and cheapen our national parks with a sanitized version of history that serves his politics, not reality. I made it very clear: our history is not his to erase. The American people deserve the truth. And we can demand full accountability if we elect more effective, moral leadership in Washington and win back the Senate majority this November. Voters across the country are heading to the polls in some of the most important primary elections of this cycle in Pennsylvania, North Carolina, New Mexico, and more. name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Leigh McGowan wants you to join our fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
Leigh McGowan took to Facebook to talk about Trump’s power grab and how Virginia is responding — and she’s urging you to join our fight.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260315-335&t=1&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)
**_“It’s why I’m on here advocating for Virginians to vote YES on their upcoming amendment, to make sure that the 2026 midterms are decided fairly by the voters and not by politicians manipulating district lines...”_**
That’s how political influencer Leigh McGowan described Trump's recent attempts to take control of elections ([**you can watch her full Facebook video here**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/1254?t=2&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)). From demanding districts hand over their voter data, to his MAGA allies rigging state maps ahead of midterms, Leigh knows that we need to do everything possible to protect our democracy. **_The chance we have right now is through voting YES on Virginia’s redistricting amendment by April 21._**
[**__**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260315_2.lxY167&amount=3&refcode=20260315-335&t=3&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)
The amendment on the ballot aims to protect Virginians from Trump and MAGA’s voter silencing attempts, and give voters, _not_ politicians, the final say on congressional maps. Virginians for Fair Elections is working to educate voters ahead of April 21 to secure a YES vote on this amendment, but we can’t do it on momentum alone.
Correcting misinformation costs money — MAGA Republicans know this. It’s why they’re funneling millions in dark money into everything they can and muddying the waters in an attempt to confuse Virginia’s voters.
Your donations today will help us cut through the noise and make sure Virginians understand what they’re voting for. This amendment needs a YES vote to defend our democracy, and we’re ready to do everything we can to make sure that happens. [**So, if you’re ready to join the fight, please chip in whatever you can today.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260315_2.lxY167&amount=3&refcode=20260315-335&t=4&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260315_2.lxY167&amount=3&refcode=20260315-335&t=23&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)**
Trump is fighting for himself, **we’re fighting for you.**
Thank you for joining our cause,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=24&refcode2=335_12592_SJLWyY&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=26&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=335%2E12592%2ESJLWyY)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

The Illinois' Senate Democratic primary is on Tuesday — and the momentum is with us.
New polling shows Illinois Lt. Gov. **Juliana Stratton** has closed the gap and _put this race within the margin of error._

This momentum isn't a surprise. While her opponent spent over $25 million on paid media attacking her campaign, Juliana was showing up in Illinois communities, meeting with voters, and listening to their concerns — and they noticed.

A recent poll showed in a two-way head-to-head, Juliana leads Congressman Krishnamoorthi **37% to 32%.** That means if she has the resources behind her in the closing days of this race — she can win.

As lieutenant governor, Juliana has fought to protect Illinois families' livelihoods and their personal freedoms. And at a moment when Trump's cruelty, corruption, and chaos are hurting working people, voters want a candidate who will put their interests ahead of Washington's insider politics.

That's exactly what Juliana Stratton represents — bold leadership and a clear vision for the fight ahead.

So with just one week until the primary, we can't let up now. Your donation today will help fund the organizing, voter outreach, and last-minute communications that can make all the difference in a race as close as this one.

clean_body: Illinois’ primary election is just one week away. | = NEW: A 3X match for the month of March. Every online gift will be tripled through March 31 — until we reach $500,000 and unlock $1.5M for EMILYs List women. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Peter, The Illinois' Senate Democratic primary is on Tuesday — and the momentum is with us. New polling shows Illinois Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton has closed the gap and put this race within the margin of error. = = This momentum isn't a surprise. While her opponent spent over $25 million on paid media attacking her campaign, Juliana was showing up in Illinois communities, meeting with voters, and listening to their concerns — and they noticed. A recent poll showed in a two-way head-to-head, Juliana leads Congressman Krishnamoorthi 37% to 32%. That means if she has the resources behind her in the closing days of this race — she can win. As lieutenant governor, Juliana has fought to protect Illinois families' livelihoods and their personal freedoms. And at a moment when Trump's cruelty, corruption, and chaos are hurting working people, voters want a candidate who will put their interests ahead of Washington's insider politics. That's exactly what Juliana Stratton represents — bold leadership and a clear vision for the fight ahead. So with just one week until the primary, we can't let up now. Your donation today will help fund the organizing, voter outreach, and last-minute communications that can make all the difference in a race as close as this one. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team | = = = = = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. I know it's a weekend, but we can't afford to slow down right now – especially when we know this race could be decided by a razor-thin margin.

There's no way around it: Resources will be the difference between winning and losing this race. Dark money super PACs are spending record amounts to defeat us — so how we respond will make all the difference.

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: This is what gave Charlie strength
body:
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Unsubscribe](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vih4fjsoppkk51djh5xfmokrezq53kiyiflw2vzxtjow55wuu1ot8ahfpe2th56rb22xhjqizra77xty58&__stmp=tbyjdw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021br75lu5uald3vfg4wp3jfcw95kvdfcrwdh66zz2mh93jhb4s8jt6iz3zar2droyuai8rrb1qbr27gx32kyvf9be78zzxf7rv9a2iveb28n403qnzlzv7xaxwgjs2aq3ja&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkqn7wrbt7kvw07hu3ktccyfgnrp5j655gg06f16pgy21jmm0abx6970evl3zt9aturn32rcl32ceqb0jiftmg60kq0acb6336j4x6wtzwz8jfakqzk4xoap5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbyjdw&__onlt=h)

subject: Blatant election interference

body:
Trump ordered AG Pam Bondi to come after the 2020 voter rolls in Maricopa County. |
---
Donald Trump and his administration are committing blatant election interference right here in Arizona, Peter. Trump ordered AG Pam Bondi to come after the 2020 voter rolls in Maricopa County. **Because he’s a sore loser who is _STILL_ upset he lost that election. He’s _STILL_ claiming he won — he can’t drop it. ** And now, he’s using the power of the Oval Office to go after Arizona’s elections. Instead of working to lower costs for families struggling to make ends meet, _Donald Trump is interfering with Arizona’s elections to make sure he always gets the result he wants._ **We can’t let this authoritarian administration get away with this.** I’m fighting back with everything I’ve got to protect our free and fair elections, but I need you with me in this fight. **[Will you join me in calling on the Trump administration to stay away from Arizona elections? | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Ilhan Omar celebrates the deaths of slain Americans and Jews. She’s a sick, racist, USA-hating RADICAL. Peter , it’s Nancy Mace. I’m disgusted by Ilhan Omar. Instead of condemning the loss of innocent lives, she DEFENDS political violence and CHEERS for the deaths of those she disagrees with. Time and time again, we’ve heard her disgusting, disrespectful rhetoric about Jewish Americans. We’ve seen her side with MENTALLY ILL TRANNIES and stay silent when men in mini skirts shoot up Christian schools. It couldn’t be clearer: She HATES America, and she HATES patriots like you and me. This isn’t just a matter of Left vs. Right anymore. It’s a battle for good vs. evil. And I truly believe in my heart that Ilhan Omar wants to see our republic crumble. Ilhan Omar doesn’t deserve a seat at the table in Congress. We know that. But kicking her out is going to be an uphill battle that requires a TON of Republican momentum. I need 50,000 signatures from patriots like YOU to help BOOT RADICAL Ilhan Omar off her committees FOR GOOD. I only have 24 hours to prove the American people are on board with Omar’s complete removal. Remember— we’re fighting for the soul of our nation. The time for conservative silence is OVER. Hold The Line. — Nancy Mace | | | | | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor | | Copyright © 2025 , All rights reserved.

subject: National Republicans are already declaring victory in Michigan

body:

It’s Team Haley here, and we wanted to make sure you saw this, null:
National Republicans are already declaring victory in Michigan. **The chair of the NRSC just went on national TV and literally said: "We are going to win in Michigan."**
Here’s how we got here:
**First:** Republican megadonors – including a Texas oil billionaire – poured millions into this race to back the Trump-endorsed Mike Rogers.

**Then:** Polling showed Haley in a statistical tie with Rogers.

**Now:** The GOP is saying Michigan is their best shot to save their Senate majority – and they’re acting as if they’ve already won.
null, here’s what they’re counting on: that Haley’s grassroots supporters won’t show up.

Let’s prove them wrong.

Team Haley

Peter, I’m writing to you today not just as the Speaker of the House, but as a fellow Patriot who is deeply concerned about the future of our country. My team recently presented me with a list of influential leaders from across the nation, and your name was specifically highlighted. [**Your dedication to your community has not gone unnoticed, and that is why I am personally asking for your name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: One last push
body:
If Abbott wins, he'll be the longest-serving governor in Texas history.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
I’ll keep this short, because our mid-month deadline is only hours away.
Here is what’s at stake: Greg Abbott is running for a **fourth term** , and if he wins, he’ll become the**longest-serving governor in Texas history.**
Imagine that. A permanent governor who works for billionaires, not families. A permanent “Greg Abbott Corruption Tax.” A permanent attack on our public schools.
**[We have just hours left to prove that Texans don't want this. Will you chip in $5 before midnight?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260315_2_finalmm.2waDQo&refcode=em20260315-764&amount=5&t=1&akid=764%2E299639%2EtidfBQ)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260315_2_finalmm.2waDQo&amount=5&refcode=em20260315-764&t=2&akid=764%2E299639%2EtidfBQ)
The polls show us in a statistical tie with Abbott — within three points.
_Momentum is on our side._
Unfortunately, momentum doesn’t pay for field organizers or billboards. We need resources to counter Abbott’s well-funded attacks. He’s sitting on millions that he’s ready to spend to hold onto power for another four years.
We don’t have to match him dollar-for-dollar. We just have to put up a fight.
I’m asking you to help us close this final gap and get one step closer to electing a governor that works for Texas.**
**
**[Every dollar you donate is a step away from another four years of corruption and a step toward the state we deserve. Rush $5 now to help us hit our $25,000 goal.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260315_2_finalmm.2waDQo&refcode=em20260315-764&amount=5&t=3&akid=764%2E299639%2EtidfBQ)
**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260315_2_finalmm.2waDQo&amount=5&refcode=em20260315-764&t=22&akid=764%2E299639%2EtidfBQ)
Thank you,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260315-2&t=23&refcode2=764_299639_tidfBQ&akid=764%2E299639%2EtidfBQ)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I am going to fight this with everything I have. But don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump.
Team: I’m writing to ask you for $5.
That’s right: just $5.
$5 because I’ve had enough of Trump and Hegseth’s attacks on our Constitution.
$5 because Donald Trump wants to stamp out any and all opposition, and he’s willing to undermine your First Amendment rights to do it.
$5 because he’s sent Pete Hegseth after me, and he’s moving ahead with a sham investigation to drag my name through the mud and destroy what I fought for during my 25 years in uniform.
I am not going to break. I am going to fight this with everything I have. But don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump.
Trump wants us living in fear. I don’t intend to let him win. I need your help.
**[Can you make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, between my campaign and Chris Pappas to help power our work against Trump, Hegseth, and anyone else who would take away our liberties?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260315_2.n-9Bwl&refcode=em20260315-2&t=1&akid=5560%2E582294%2EAo7Dj-)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260315_2.n-9Bwl&amount=5&refcode=em20260315-2&t=2&akid=5560%2E582294%2EAo7Dj-)**
**[Chip in more »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260315_2.n-9Bwl&refcode=em20260315-2&t=3&akid=5560%2E582294%2EAo7Dj-)**
Thank you,
Mark

name: Team Taylor
subject: What can we say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260315-1233&t=1&akid=1241%2E294397%2EdjGYdD)
What can we say to earn your support?
_What if we told you that..._ Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election isn’t in November, **it’s this April**?
That means we have far less time than most campaigns to reach voters across the state.
_What if we reminded you that..._ a recent poll showed **66% of voters are still undecided**?
That means every conversation, every ad, every outreach effort makes an impact.
_Finally, what if we revealed that..._ **even $5 has the potential to decide the outcome of this election**?
It’s true. When you pitch in $5, and someone else pitches in $5, and another person does too. That's how we build a movement that can take on the right-wing special interests pouring money into this race.
[**So with all of this in mind, can you chip in $5 or any amount to help us reach undecided voters and elect Judge Chris Taylor?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/146?c0=em_ms_jct_20260315_2_ak.aDnUWR&refcode=em20260315-1233&t=3&akid=1241%2E294397%2EdjGYdD)

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
