subject: Could The Iran War Disrupt Global Agriculture?
body:
Everyone's talking about oil; we need to talk about fertilizer.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..XWvHJ1igBrjKAJE76ekihxZ7FxHXKyvDATkSHNCiVwA?) for more
---
[](https://substack..TcyyfjizF74VJttTKrGWh5kSbljnM9ZXXIWTyh6-EtE?)
---
# [Could The Iran War Disrupt Global Agriculture?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=190959693&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwOTU5NjkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM2MTAyODUsImV4cCI6MTc3NjIwMjI4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MCBtEA-iEyeogvdhTsps5IUwoBHSBc_o8W_m8js8M44)
### Everyone's talking about oil; we need to talk about fertilizer.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Mar 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=190959693&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwOTU5NjkzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzYxMDI4NSwiZXhwIjoxNzc2MjAyMjg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.EXLIBtLYJAhQ6FhpR-qmFxQ883tfa_T9b2ahwDioQy0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=190959693&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwOTU5NjkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM2MTAyODUsImV4cCI6MTc3NjIwMjI4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MCBtEA-iEyeogvdhTsps5IUwoBHSBc_o8W_m8js8M44&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=190959693&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwOTU5NjkzLCJpYXQiOjE3NzM2MTAyODUsImV4cCI6MTc3NjIwMjI4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MCBtEA-iEyeogvdhTsps5IUwoBHSBc_o8W_m8js8M44)
---
| | [](https://substack..mYn6n1iZ3RIWL4gXpdlc1qRSLf66boI82BBMjG4pxYE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/could-the-iran-war-disrupt-global?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22710edf-fb7b-45d5-af97-873c3145c623?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Since the U.S. and Israel began striking Iran on February 28, many market prognosticators and geopolitical analysts have focused on casualties, disruptions to shipping, Iran's erratic missile launches, and of course, the price of oil. Others have focused on the geopolitical implications of the war, how it's impacting financial markets, and the possibility of politically problematic inflation during a midterm election year. I don't mean to diminish the importance of any of these topics, but there's another crisis unfolding that far too few people are thinking about -- the impact of the Iran war on global food supplies.
The Strait of Hormuz is _de facto_ closed. The 21 miles of water connecting the Persian Gulf to the rest of the world has been deemed too risky for insurance companies to insure against loss given war risks. Shipping companies have stopped transiting through the area. As has been widely discussed, [about 20% of global consumption](https://substack.com/redirect/cb25a1b6-5682-4765-bcc5-6a8d821451cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) passes through it. But so does LNG, to the tune of [about 20% of global LNG trade](https://substack.com/redirect/8e4ca26c-011b-4b28-aa84-6bb7bdab63e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
What does that have to do with fertilizer? Natural gas is the primary requirement for ammonia, which is the building block for all nitrogen fertilizers. And natural gas isn't just _part_ of the cost--it's [70 to 90 percent](https://substack.com/redirect/0c4c2c5f-a044-4727-9954-7f2a103fab2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This explains why Middle East countries produce nearly [49% of global urea exports and 30% of ammonia exports](https://substack.com/redirect/53e051bd-4c7e-44a4-8f99-ff56f0105ec0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It's also why [35% of global fertilizer raw materials pass through the Strait of Hormuz](https://substack.com/redirect/ddafbf84-9322-467a-ae50-a3c1e9c15b0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[](https://substack.com/redirect/83bf96e2-76ce-45ce-bb4f-a154baaae44a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We've already seen gasoline prices jump. Food prices will probably be next, in large part because of the timing. You see, the Iran War and the subsequent closing of the strait happened just as America's farmers are preparing for the Spring planting season. More fertilizer is used in North America during the Spring than at any other time of the year, and the application impacts crop yield. It's also worth noting that [vessels from the Persian Gulf take 30 days to reach the U.S. Gulf coast](https://substack.com/redirect/1a15d650-0c82-46ed-a2cc-62627b97ece5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Disruptions today will almost certainly impact the peak planting windows in late March and April.
And let's not forget that fertilizer isn't a minor line item on a farmer's budget, which means it's a substantial component of the cost of the food we eat. It represents [33 to 44 percent of corn costs and 34 to 45 percent of wheat](https://substack.com/redirect/2552126e-49b1-41a5-9bc2-260e574b3c68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When fertilizer prices jump 30% in two weeks, that's the difference for many farmers between a making or losing money. (Separately, don't forget that farms also use a lot of energy to power machines, too.) The only way to make this work is for agriculture prices to rise.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c960ef55-ead3-4c1e-940a-dbe6d3124bcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Surely there's another option, you might think. Can't farmers just forego fertilizers? Before answering that question, it's worth highlighting the importance of fertilizers vis-a-vis crop yield. [According to the ](https://substack.com/redirect/2203b48b-80e0-4c0e-8bb7-84c94b131c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_**[Agronomy Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/2203b48b-80e0-4c0e-8bb7-84c94b131c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_[, approximately 40-60% of the commercial crop yield in North America is attributable to the use of fertilizer](https://substack.com/redirect/2203b48b-80e0-4c0e-8bb7-84c94b131c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The flip side of this research finding is that without the use of fertilizers, crop output would fall substantially.... leading to higher prices.
**Regardless of how farmers choose to navigate the fertilizer price shock, the outcome seems inevitable: agriculture prices are going to rise ...and food prices will follow.**
And lest we think this is an America only problem, consider the fact that [three-quarters of all countries import more than half their fertilizer](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2af909-2fb9-441a-93d9-c9c5b7b077c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). India, Bangladesh, Thailand, Indonesia--these are countries where a fertilizer price spike translates directly into whether families eat. Higher inflation may have political impact on the US midterm elections, but elsewhere in the world it might generate famines and/or social unrest. Let's remember that the Arab Spring began with the self-immolation of a street vendor in the face of rapidly rising food prices and while the protests eventually focused on democracy, the Egyptian slogan of "Bread, Freedom, Social Justice" captured the link to food.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a86adb12-00ee-4937-bf61-c71b313f1301?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For years, I've been publicly concerned about the threat to fertilizers. In fact, I even gave a speech titled "The End of Cheap Food" in 2014 in which I highlighted the risks of a concentrated phosphate market, noting that Morocco had 70%+ of the proven phosphate rock reserves on planet Earth. This made the country, I argued, more powerful vis-a-vis fertilizers (and therefore food) than OPEC was with respect to oil. And while Morocco had been relatively stable, I noted that the country's dispute with the Western Sahara was a source of potential instability and therefore concern. While conceding the long-term risks, critics of my ideas **rightfully** noted reserves were _potential_ production, not production, and therefore the short-term risks were limited.
Nevertheless, I maintained a constant concern about fertilizer disruption and how the ripples could generate food price spikes that could generate unrest. I even hypothesized in my 2018 predictions that surging animal protein demand would lead to pressure on feed and grain, driving some countries to create strategic fertilizer reserves. See link below.
* * *
## [18 Global Developments to Watch Over The Next Five Years](https://substack.com/redirect/84500add-0165-4ab5-b2af-0f67a269d158?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| January 4, 2018
[](https://substack.com/redirect/84500add-0165-4ab5-b2af-0f67a269d158?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[2017 was a year marked by a series of seemingly seismic shifts, many of which disrupted the status quo. Robert Mugabe's 37 year (mis)rule of Zimbabwe ended; sexual harassment made headlines globally, and American tax policies were reformed. The war on corruption accelerated, with notable casualties surfacing in Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, South Korea, and ...](https://substack.com/redirect/84500add-0165-4ab5-b2af-0f67a269d158?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/84500add-0165-4ab5-b2af-0f67a269d158?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
We don't have **strategic fertilizer reserves.** We stockpile oil. We don't stockpile ammonia. The pipeline Saudi Arabia built to bypass Hormuz and export through the Red Sea? [It's for oil, not fertilizer](https://substack.com/redirect/305ba8f6-be99-4816-a524-70c30131837d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Because fertilizer has less value per ton than crude, a ship captain brave enough to dash through a war zone would rather carry oil.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Gn5cfzkdr8Ozcr_9zgsKPu1Bt7gECanUTP-5_hjm3EY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=190959693)
The Iran War will surely reshape the Middle East. It will reshape energy policies and oil price spikes provide political motivation to pursue nuclear and other alternative energies. But the war will also reshape the price of bread in Nairobi, rice in Dhaka, and corn in Iowa.
The chain is simple: closed strait -> gas shock -> fertilizer spike -> farm cost surge -> food inflation -> hunger. Each link is already in motion. The strait has been closed for two weeks. The fertilizer prices have already moved up substantially. The planting window is closing. Wars end, but famines linger.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Gn5cfzkdr8Ozcr_9zgsKPu1Bt7gECanUTP-5_hjm3EY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=190959693)

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/a12ef7a9-dd6a-43ff-92e5-06e1ae421d59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/27ea25e3-8870-4e0d-803d-7acc6b5d9f36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/e01a0c6a-987f-4eb4-bf42-4dd077d9d32e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/1bb87fe2-f379-4582-9385-97d8001904f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I don't mean to diminish the importance of any of these topics, but there's another crisis unfolding that far too few people are thinking about -- the impact of the Iran war on global food supplies. The Strait of Hormuz is de facto closed. The 21 miles of water connecting the Persian Gulf to the rest of the world has been deemed too risky for insurance companies to insure against loss given war risks. Shipping companies have stopped transiting through the area. As has been widely discussed, passes through it. But so does LNG, to the tune of . What does that have to do with fertilizer? Natural gas is the primary requirement for ammonia, which is the building block for all nitrogen fertilizers. And natural gas isn't just part of the cost--it's . More fertilizer is used in North America during the Spring than at any other time of the year, and the application impacts crop yield. It's also worth noting that . Disruptions today will almost certainly impact the peak planting windows in late March and April. And let's not forget that fertilizer isn't a minor line item on a farmer's budget, which means it's a substantial component of the cost of the food we eat. It represents . name: Nellie Pou
subject: Can I be honest with you?
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Hi friend,

I know you're probably sick of these fundraising emails. I am too. So I wanted to ask, can I be honest with you?

Yes, we have an end-of-quarter deadline at the end of this month.

Yes, it's the first end-of-quarter deadline since the newest MAGA recruit entered our race.

And yes, we do have a goal to hit by midnight tonight.

So I'm simply asking, can you chip in $5 to help us get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260315_np_MM_final_l1&amount=5]

CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260315_np_MM_final_b1&amount=5]

GIVE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260315_np_MM_final_b2]

Thanks for having my back.

— Nellie Pou
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.

Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/QcG518LlG0yfilVoJO5ZLg2?unsubscribedata=M2yOkVRpizhVZIttAEVDnwJn9wpygE2KcwR6NfbTgs1Sr2dygF0FHFHLa74TinIqTSUTFc19rAaWK05XPU86YhhPaRzNEyQ7qHVuti1VG8HclbEotsdR%2FO%2BdQ0SfD1GAvk8iOGTYMRMoyaattcQVTI2HrsApJ%2BKKaRnupniHtGwgAeyJiXLzOvsC0aPRp9Nw0H0OSawWnnm9nR2TbxOkMw6Q%2FyQ5CpKkjMKoSl%2FwQ88k0nDTaEXK02RUtzWPKPVmb3Nm7rA23zGiXNO8oYJbuH%2F9Kmpsn20ld0IfQ6b%2B%2ByQ9i5D3xG%2FEnJU%2BTKyRh7IA2cBVj4mWVAir1lg6lg3IYLbnkK8eT9QE3S0FPTYjLH5i0iJpMQyZhA3AT%2BziVjkQaeUvRT4savglJZ9dc%2FofWV0w0ma2O57cte37PSbDfvHwkVtDYUExvijvDawUpYxS] . Sec of War Pete Hegseth **[tore into the fake news media](https://substack.com/redirect/c8f1e933-67cf-4e14-93e4-ad41e67a37da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a Friday morning press conference, calling them out for one-sided negative coverage of President Donald Trump's Iran strikes.
"Here's what your headlines should read if we had an actually patriotic press!!" Hegseth exploded.
## [Watch the tense moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/c8f1e933-67cf-4e14-93e4-ad41e67a37da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c8f1e933-67cf-4e14-93e4-ad41e67a37da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c8f1e933-67cf-4e14-93e4-ad41e67a37da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
# **Netanyahu mocks assassination rumors with coffee shop video, flashing five fingers to debunk AI claims**
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu **[posted a video Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/ba680c76-d8f8-4440-a31f-c862382d1fb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** buying coffee and joking about calories to dismiss bogus online claims he'd been assassinated by Iran, which began after conspiracy theorists claimed they spotted him with six fingers during a speech and concluded it was AI-generated. "They say I'm what?" Netanyahu said, clearly showing five fingers on both hands while making small talk about the war: "We are hitting Iran very hard, even on this day, and in Lebanon, we are continuing."
[| | | | | Benjamin Netanyahu - בנימין נתניהו
---
@netanyahu
אומרים שאני מה? צפו >>
| 2:34 PM * Mar 15, 2026 * 2.16M Views7.28K Replies * 6.31K Reposts * 31.6K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/3618d9f4-2919-4ee0-82f2-d9fdb2bc2514?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Why it matters:** The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps vowed to kill Netanyahu amid the conspiracy theories, with Iranian state media running the headline "IRGC vows to pursue and kill 'child-killer' Netanyahu if he is still alive." Israel joined the US in launching war against Iran on Feb. 28 and has struck Hezbollah in Lebanon, with the IDF claiming Saturday it killed two senior Iranian intelligence officers. President Trump boasted to ABC News about killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, saying "I got him before he got me. They tried twice ... I got him first."
* **The backdrop:** Iran has launched rockets and drones at Israel, some penetrating its missile defense systems, while questions remain about whether Khamenei's son Mojtaba--quickly named the next supreme leader--is alive or in control. U.S. Ambassador to the UN Mike Waltz told CNN "it's unclear that he really has control of the country, if he's even alive at this point."

* * *
# **Russia launches massive missile and drone attack on Ukraine, killing 6 as Iran conflict distracts from peace efforts**
Russia hammered Ukraine **[with around 430 drones and 68 missiles on Saturday,](https://substack.com/redirect/75f1a910-c655-468c-8033-6a2b86771251?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** killing six people including five in Kyiv region where President Zelensky said Russian forces targeted energy infrastructure but also damaged residential buildings, schools and businesses, leaving 15 injured. Most missiles and drones were downed by air defenses, though one person was killed and three injured when Russian-guided bombs hit Zaporizhzhia later in the day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75f1a910-c655-468c-8033-6a2b86771251?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Why it matters:** Saturday's strikes come as the Iran conflict has distracted international attention from a U.S.-backed peace push in the four-year war, which Kyiv says Moscow has no interest in ending. Zelensky warned "Russia will try to exploit the war in the Middle East to cause even greater destruction here in Europe, in Ukraine," repeating his call for partners to boost air-defense weapons production as stocks diminish from defending against Iranian strikes in the Gulf.
* **The damage:** Ukraine's Energy Ministry said consumers in six regions were without electricity after the overnight strikes, part of Russia's winter campaign to weaken resolve by leaving major cities without power or heating as Moscow's troops press a battlefield offensive demanding Kyiv cede territory. The attack prompted NATO member Poland to scramble jets to protect its airspace, while Moldova denounced a Russian drone intrusion into its border airspace. Local resident Natalia Fetko, 57, whose building was damaged, said "there's no way Russia will stop. Nothing is enough for them."

* * *
# **Over 300 TSA officers quit during federal shutdown, causing hours-long airport delays as DHS blames Democrats**
More than 300 TSA officers **[have quit since the government shutdown began Feb. 14,](https://substack.com/redirect/c356d3fc-bd51-4405-9a1c-fb80baecf1bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while many others are taking unscheduled absences, with some airports seeing call-out rates as high as 53% (Houston Hobby Airport on March 8) and double-digit averages nationwide. Major airports including JFK (21% call-out rate), Atlanta International (19%), and New Orleans (14%) have seen travelers standing in security lines for hours, with Chicago O'Hare and Fort Lauderdale showing massive lines Sunday morning.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c356d3fc-bd51-4405-9a1c-fb80baecf1bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Why it matters:** The troubling rates were logged even before TSA officers missed their first paycheck Friday, with some airports advising travelers to arrive up to five hours before flights last weekend. The DHS has issued videos played over airport security lines blaming Democrats for delays, saying "you may be experiencing longer-than-average wait times due to the ongoing Democrat shutdown of TSA and the Department of Homeland Security" and urging passengers to "thank the dedicated men and women of the TSA" who "showed up to work despite having missed paychecks."
* **The pushback:** Some airports including JFK, LaGuardia, and Newark Liberty International declined to play the DHS video, calling it "partisan in nature." The current struggle has persisted for nearly a month after Senate Democrats refused to fund the DHS budget without reforms to ICE and Border Patrol.

* * *

body:

name: Tobias Read
subject: REPORT: DOJ sues Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260315em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260315em]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260315em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260315em]
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260315em]
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
It's unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Let me be clear: I did not and will never hand over Oregonians’ private data. I will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
I have gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies want to weaponize the federal government against me — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.
Grassroots support is our firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 by our mid-month deadline at midnight to demonstrate our response to this abuse of power.
Can you help ensure my campaign is ready for this fight and send a donation now to defend Oregon and have my back? I will continue communicating directly about protecting our elections, and that takes resources. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260315em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260315em]
Trump’s DOJ lost this last round and we await their next step. But we know they won’t stop meddling in our elections.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260227em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260227em-rs]

Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Breaking report about DOGE 🚨

body:
It was a scam
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127392180/607903094/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTgzMTBhMi1iOTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdMZp0YVVNMorfNeYKT7Mw32P0eB9YAv-iBhKA10IjY=)
I recently released an Oversight report with a simple message: **Donald Trump’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” is a scam.**
**It was never about efficiency, saving money, or reform. It was always about making billionaires richer while working families foot the bill.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127392181/607903095/789508428?refcode=260315_RG_doge-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTgzMTBhMi1iOTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdMZp0YVVNMorfNeYKT7Mw32P0eB9YAv-iBhKA10IjY=)
Since DOGE was created, the Trump Administration has cost taxpayers billions in damage, waste, and chaos — while quietly funneling at least $81 million into DOGE operations with virtually zero transparency or accountability.
That’s your money. And what did Americans get in return?
❌ Public services disrupted.
❌ Federal workers pushed out.
❌ Sensitive data put at risk.
❌ Billionaire insiders cashing in.
They slapped a shiny name on it and called it “efficiency.” But let’s be honest — this is a reckless takeover of our government by corrupt elites who see public service as a business opportunity.
**I’m the the top Democrat on Oversight. I take that job seriously. And I am not going to sit quietly while Trump dismantles critical public services and hands the keys to his billionaire friends.**
**[But if we’re going to hold this Administration accountable, I need you with me. So please, will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help us continue this investigation and fight back against Trump’s corruption?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127392182/607903096/789508428?refcode=260315_RG_doge-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTgzMTBhMi1iOTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdMZp0YVVNMorfNeYKT7Mw32P0eB9YAv-iBhKA10IjY=)**

clean_body: It was a scam = I recently released an Oversight report with a simple message: Donald Trump’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” is a scam. It was never about efficiency, saving money, or reform. It was always about making billionaires richer while working families foot the bill. = Since DOGE was created, the Trump Administration has cost taxpayers billions in damage, waste, and chaos — while quietly funneling at least $81 million into DOGE operations with virtually zero transparency or accountability. That’s your money. And what did Americans get in return? ❌ Public services disrupted. ❌ Federal workers pushed out. ❌ Sensitive data put at risk. ❌ Billionaire insiders cashing in. They slapped a shiny name on it and called it “efficiency.” But let’s be honest — this is a reckless takeover of our government by corrupt elites who see public service as a business opportunity. I’m the the top Democrat on Oversight. I take that job seriously. And I am not going to sit quietly while Trump dismantles critical public services and hands the keys to his billionaire friends. = = Thank you, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Times moves faster when you're doing something you really believe in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter,

I was sitting down earlier thinking about everything that's happened this year so far, and honestly, it's been a blur.

We've met so many people across the district. We submitted our petitions to officially be on the ballot. And now, we've just been named a Red to Blue race. Even just typing that out feels a little surreal.

I think time moves faster when you're doing something you really believe in. And the truth is, running this campaign has been a blast. I get to work alongside the most incredible team, and together we share this deep belief that our district deserves better and that we can actually make it happen.

Campaigns don't just begin in November. Rome wasn't built in a day, and neither is a campaign that will be strong enough to win and deliver real change. What makes the difference is having people behind you who believe in what you're building.

You've been with me every step of the way. You've seen the early days and the big announcements. You've stood by me in the small moments in between that most people never even think about until Election Day.

And tonight is another one of those moments. We're coming up on our mid-month deadline, and I would be so grateful to continue counting on your support as we keep this campaign charging toward our end-of-quarter deadline at the end of March. Will you chip in before midnight to help us reach our $15,000 goal and stay strong? >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cb-q1-2026?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127392218/607903246/-2011951990?refcode=em26_260315_MM3_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260315_MM3_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=44cb0bee-b920-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGNiMGJlZS1iOTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXn8-60GMYZDsLlYlnXYaeh-gz7bKuUy4Jvu1zzYSj4=)**

Thank you for believing in me and for being part of this. It means more than I can say.

Christina

So I wanted to take a minute to reflect on the incredible journey that led me here. **[SECURE VP MEMO](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/IxM3ht0M5oT1Ri8Xn72Ao8U5VMyswwsrTkhdvgjSOFrrThSEMW0bhq-5uRgCe_yK8t6jLSK7kAVQEF-fthA6teprWCJUkgdURaSNc7irSpAdCJ44b2y8sl7ACyauTaoVhUz9U914PQL2fDO0fw6pqevu9XMCoNjAYsCyHj9OsqzRiDp5kT7tKP8FnNdXNwgrxV1mp3iTaPYBRcI6hdBQ-DFEkeVIv6UmIuT_Zg_thf_ShM8_vqgcbW34-7jjNn5BA6iAgD0qvtuOy0SerQUYin_SNbMTLurgJbnA0gCt_wHNtn4Vwzz1Li5mm2KOPVnJP38xPKaSDWyvT-XlKEGmNCLqdWhJVsINZulkx2pBHpE4QiHyIwGRYWieZXcUBEYAmFk3gKndwR_4y-zikGDnGWmbWO7i7P4TVPV8O2ID5DuSkkJ3OPYdJ8ZlTG5sLlsYmiW-9iMpnAZryfC-Lxc_L4ZqYwLH6t8X1RnwRv4Sxc7_MqBS3xTGVxDZrlzCe6-u_kcKW9w8maJpvQCHUPeFdgNHziz0dIaoEC1Is5s2k_BOTwgmOhdp1ZxroJF66hdw-aiIfyfJSOoZ5s0HiMHM721szjTGDUViQ9EXi7g6C5g7H1y8_q27NFuQiA80Go34lbXRUPG-F8vkmb16e-XsiGsuH-FUfstW2yyjqv9yOQi8hUnBDKU5TC0OOoTxu7lPFidoZOJH8BVwPnHeFNPoM8v6DsvwSTnB9Zgy8gTvxyK308kunCWO-kExvbhjiUZdRJVTKqW5ciIRCnTIlPnrM60p7KkJnT0SfOAZPqcArEZ32HvLzvhB02qdonAgZpaeziInS39ELeI6Uo2eOopaI-RUHDMlJJmzfT3eM1g0ZnKCYUKuzNW6RaaSni2e2A-Ddrk0VFh7nkExZk2z-lMycPalMrOb1Sa66XH-qtoVWGdwpC8f_DYTvGA9G381J0EV1iudjTFcCTFJz8oxQ9X2cSUHkKydyYD2odzyKnWU_HCvmYpcQcjWq0xaGBdfEh78kVMPjYMqXPvZedJztjLOqnQ2hK-a2tVed68SauMl0WDUj2trdjNr03f1kgm7UcWAZ_YP6X3WZnaE4MRHOWpY6v3tca4KnjlSERLn3OOx9ZTEOZCBRtV0UTPvLZPXEMP3Kd_vGnYL3NK270p0_wSfyR-cdC8CtrlXM57UMrQvo7j6shdmYZYDf2sGGEuD_kxe1kXILdjJXwV4q7dkSy4zk_f-rPLiP-Z3DwvsMbFk2JLZ_kp3XOyIKOpgqjj373QYqluK-eUq2kwuG5h5TJFv4NhY9zrbh5XLDSz1A5hRAd-VQQbx-agM_9Ih6zWsInQd6i4gmecjgbhjC6yepZ5gQvMJVp9Vruu28m-YCFfr6HMJ7YblNzX7qYZfJ1RoPMuBYWjTgm8T4Dctfr-seHBQ-zfT81SMSCkfMjR3c_w6zB4luuIyiPUXeLXPRUavoQp_vD4Ld10jNaNIDoKbtG65d-Rx3IzotAMEifhZLR3ptreKDsJXr0k45meuhpWg6FwCh5EJCCI/r7dED_9YnfYD8RbCqY_hKi-q971yF2hk/18)** Hillbilly, author, Marine, Senator -- and thanks to you, VICE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES. Who would've thought a kid from Middletown could one day make it to the White House? Not me, never in my wildest dreams. As you probably know already, I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth like so many of the career politicians I've had the misfortune of working with in the D.C. swamp. I grew up poor, in the Rust Belt, in a small Ohio town that had been losing jobs and hope for generations. My Mamaw -- God rest her soul -- would go into medical debt just to put food on the table. Some nights, she didn't even have enough money to turn on the heat in the dead of winter. In Middletown, hard-working families that gave everything they had to achieve the American Dream watched helplessly as their jobs were shipped overseas. The statistics tell you that kids like me face a grim future - that if they're lucky, they'll manage to avoid welfare. I was one of those kids with a grim future, but through hard work, grit, determination, and the love of my grandparents, I made it out. First to the Marines where I was deployed to Iraq, then to Yale where I met my incredible wife, and eventually all the way to the U.S. Senate where I faithfully served the great people of Ohio. The greatest honor of my lifetime began when President Trump asked me to join his ticket. He said we had to save the country -- and that together, we could win and we could govern. After a whirlwind campaign and a decisive victory, we took office with a clear mission and a mandate from the American people. From day one, we got to work delivering on the promises we made. Now, nearly 400 days into this administration, we've been tested, challenged, and called to lead in serious moments. We've stayed focused, fought for our agenda, and worked every day to put America first. Almost 400 days later, we're proud of what we've accomplished and even more determined about what comes next. President Trump and I are committed to keeping the American Dream alive for future generations and restoring this country's great promise. But we want to hear directly from you about how we're doing. That's why today, I'm asking you to take a moment to complete our Official Approval Poll. Your feedback matters, and we need to know if we're delivering on the promises we made. ******[Please take just a minute to submit your response and make your voice heard. clean_body: | | We've detected an attempt by external filters to block all communications from JD Vance. We can't afford to lose another top MAGA Patriot during this year's midterms. This will only take a few minutes!! ********\--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Vice President JD Vance Subject: I wrote this for you before our 400th day in office To: Peter, As I approach my 400th day in office, I've been reflecting on just how much we've accomplished together -- and with so much on my mind, I'm truly overwhelmed with gratitude. So I wanted to take a minute to reflect on the incredible journey that led me here. Hillbilly, author, Marine, Senator -- and thanks to you, VICE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES. Who would've thought a kid from Middletown could one day make it to the White House? Not me, never in my wildest dreams. As you probably know already, I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth like so many of the career politicians I've had the misfortune of working with in the D.C. swamp. I grew up poor, in the Rust Belt, in a small Ohio town that had been losing jobs and hope for generations. My Mamaw -- God rest her soul -- would go into medical debt just to put food on the table. Some nights, she didn't even have enough money to turn on the heat in the dead of winter. In Middletown, hard-working families that gave everything they had to achieve the American Dream watched helplessly as their jobs were shipped overseas. The statistics tell you that kids like me face a grim future - that if they're lucky, they'll manage to avoid welfare. I was one of those kids with a grim future, but through hard work, grit, determination, and the love of my grandparents, I made it out. First to the Marines where I was deployed to Iraq, then to Yale where I met my incredible wife, and eventually all the way to the U.S. Senate where I faithfully served the great people of Ohio. The greatest honor of my lifetime began when President Trump asked me to join his ticket. He said we had to save the country -- and that together, we could win and we could govern. After a whirlwind campaign and a decisive victory, we took office with a clear mission and a mandate from the American people. From day one, we got to work delivering on the promises we made. Now, nearly 400 days into this administration, we've been tested, challenged, and called to lead in serious moments. We've stayed focused, fought for our agenda, and worked every day to put America first. Almost 400 days later, we're proud of what we've accomplished and even more determined about what comes next. President Trump and I are committed to keeping the American Dream alive for future generations and restoring this country's great promise. But we want to hear directly from you about how we're doing. That's why today, I'm asking you to take a moment to complete our Official Approval Poll. Your feedback matters, and we need to know if we're delivering on the promises we made. **** ** Peter, together we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you and may God bless you, Vice President JD Vance Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

It’s a hard time to ask for support, and I don’t take that lightly. But I want to level with you about what this moment looks like.

We’re watching a war unfold in the Middle East that could escalate into something even more catastrophic. Gas and grocery prices are squeezing families. Revelations from the Epstein files continue to point to powerful men abusing their positions with no accountability. Trump and his allies are using every tool they have to stall progress and claw back power.

So we have to ask: = | | = This November is our best opportunity to flip the Senate and put an end to Trump’s disastrous agenda that puts working families in harm’s way. But we can’t do that without holding the line here in Colorado. Trump and MAGA Republicans know what’s at stake in this race, and they’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to flip this seat back to red and tighten their grasp on Washington. In 2020, they spent nearly $50 million trying to beat us. Now with control of the Senate on the line, we’re bracing for MAGA money to come pouring into Colorado as we get closer to this election. name: Team Kelly
subject: Please — let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
March is an official FEC deadline month — the first of the year. What that means is, when it’s over, we are legally required to report how much we’ve raised AND the number of donations we received online.
#

Team —
I’ll get right to it: At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you for a donation.
But before I do, let me explain why. I know I owe you that much.
So, here’s the truth:
March is an official FEC deadline month — the first of the year. What that means is, when it’s over, we are legally required to report how much we’ve raised AND the number of donations we received online. It’s all going to be public.
Everyone will be watching — the press, our opponents, and our allies as well. They all want to know if we can put together the kind of team we’ll need to face off against Trump and the entire executive branch.
Today, the 15th, is the midpoint to that FEC deadline. What we raise today will determine whether we’re in line to hit our goals and have everything we’ll need to take the fight to Trump. We can’t afford to miss those goals. We have to show strength, because that’s the only thing people like Trump understand.
And that is why I am humbly asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign? It would give me some real peace of mind to know we’re on track to hit our goals before we’re legally required to report those numbers.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mar26.Zy8qu0&refcode=em260315-2-90&t=1&akid=6391%2E6688874%2EfiRfpt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-mar26.TgVnIR&amount=5&refcode=em260315-2-90&t=2&akid=6391%2E6688874%2EfiRfpt)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-mar26.TgVnIR&refcode=em260315-2-90&t=3&akid=6391%2E6688874%2EfiRfpt)**
---
****
This is a really important month, so thank you in advance.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=6391%2E6688874%2EfiRfpt).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

# **__Not once.__**
#

# **__Not twice.__**
#

# **__SEVENTY-FOUR times!__**

****
**President Trump made it clear 74 times that Iran can NEVER have a Nuclear weapon.**
He warned them again and again.

| **“After Midnight Hammer, they were warned to make no future attempts to rebuild their weapons program, and in particular nuclear weapons, yet they continue. They’re starting it all over... One thing is certain: I will never allow the world’s number one sponsor of terror, which they are by far, to have a nuclear weapon.”** **
****“They can’t have nuclear weapons. It’s very simple. You can’t have peace in the Middle East if they have a nuclear weapon. And they can’t have a nuclear weapon, and they’ve been told that very strongly.”** **
****“We don’t want any enrichment. We don’t want enrichment.”** **
****“Number one, no nuclear.”** **
****“I’ve said Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon — I’ve said that for 15 years, long before I decided to do the political thing.”** **
****“I hope they’re not trying to build up again, because if they are, we’re going to have no choice but very quickly to eradicate that buildup.”**
---

****
**_Warning after warning..._** **__**
**_But Iran refused to listen._** **__**
__So President Trump had to act before it was too late.__ ____
To protect America and our allies, President Trump launched Operation Epic Fury to stop Iran’s nuclear threat before it could put millions of lives in danger.

Now we need to know something important:
Do YOU stand with President Trump?

clean_body: President Trump made it clear 74 times that Iran can NEVER have a Nuclear weapon. Take MAGA Poll >>> | | | | Not once. Not twice. SEVENTY-FOUR times! ** President Trump made it clear 74 times that Iran can NEVER have a Nuclear weapon. He warned them again and again. | “After Midnight Hammer, they were warned to make no future attempts to rebuild their weapons program, and in particular nuclear weapons, yet they continue. They’re starting it all over... One thing is certain: I will never allow the world’s number one sponsor of terror, which they are by far, to have a nuclear weapon.” **“They can’t have nuclear weapons. It’s very simple. You can’t have peace in the Middle East if they have a nuclear weapon. And they can’t have a nuclear weapon, and they’ve been told that very strongly.” “We don’t want any enrichment. We don’t want enrichment.” “Number one, no nuclear.” “I’ve said Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon — I’ve said that for 15 years, long before I decided to do the political thing.” “I hope they’re not trying to build up again, because if they are, we’re going to have no choice but very quickly to eradicate that buildup.” ** Warning after warning... But Iran refused to listen. So President Trump had to act before it was too late. __ To protect America and our allies, President Trump launched Operation Epic Fury to stop Iran’s nuclear threat before it could put millions of lives in danger. Now we need to know something important: Do YOU stand with President Trump? ** It only takes 10 seconds. We hope to show President Trump where you stand. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.

But she’s not letting that stand in her way. 👉 Instead, Nancy stands up for EVERY veteran like me who’s been forgotten. 👉 She stands up when the Trans Mob corners her for speaking God’s truth.👉 She stands up when they try to let biological men compete in women’s sports. 👉 She stands up when other Republicans stay silent. And now, she’s standing up for YOU. Peter, for the people of South Carolina—and America—we need fighters right now who are willing to step into the fire and stand for America First principles. Nancy is all that and MORE. Right now, she needs your backup. Nancy’s not running to make friends. She’s running to win. To fight. To serve. I trust her. I’m standing by her. I hope you will, too. With Respect, Ret. Lt. General Mike Flynn | | | | | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor | | Copyright © 2025 , All rights reserved.

name: Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
subject: Cop faces life in prison thanks to disgraced DA
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15278472/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZXZTempFdDlkbQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMTU/LbmNsdlI0U2Vxbw/qP2hpZHM9bmNrTkJTdjBkYzE3NWxscw/gabcxNg/saj4311a135)
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Friend, Maybe you saw recently that a gunman opened fire outside a crowded bar in Austin, Texas, killing 3 innocent Americans. **Police officers responded in 57 seconds, running into the danger. They swiftly took down the gunman, saving countless lives.** Those officers should be commended for their heroic efforts in the face of danger and tragedy. But instead, the radical District Attorney in Austin nearly put those officers before a grand jury until public outrage made him back off. Why? Because the police shot the gunman. And DA Jose Garza – who has made a career out of bringing bogus charges against cops – requires all officer-involved shootings to go before a grand jury. [**If you agree that even considering murder charges against these heroes is beyond outrageous, I urgently need your help today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) My name is Jason Johnson and I am the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). For over 30 years, LELDF has helped wrongly accused officers clear their names and get their lives back. We have a long record of success – getting charges dropped, winning at trial, and when all else fails, securing presidential pardons. **And right now we’re defending another Austin Police Officer who is fighting for his life.** _**Officer Chance Bretches is a decorated police officer. A loving husband. An amazing father.**_ He volunteers his time back in the community he swore an oath to protect. **Chance is everything woke leftists hate** – so, Garza has launched not one but TWO WITCH-HUNTS to put Chance behind bars for life:
---
1. In 2019, before Garza was in office, Chance was dispatched to arrest a known drug trafficker. The trafficker resisted arrest forcing Chance to use physical force to handcuff him. He was cleared by SIX different internal investigations. But upon taking office in 2021, Garza charged Chance with aggravated assault. He faces life in prison.
2. In May 2020 during the George Floyd riots, Chance was assigned to perform crowd control and issued a non-lethal beanbag launcher. When a rioter began throwing rocks at officers, Chance discharged his beanbag launcher. One of the beanbags injured another rioter’s hand – and Garza once again charged Chance with aggravated assault. He faces life in prison in this case, too.

---
Multiple investigations prove Chance followed his training and department protocols to a tee. **_But Garza won’t back down. He wants Chance to go to prison for the rest of his life._** **[That’s why I’m urgently turning to pro-police patriots like you to help Chance fight back.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** You see, Chance is scheduled to go on trial in the beanbag case in less than 90 days which makes your support today critical. This trial will cost approximately $150,000 – and that’s just the first trial. The date is still pending for the other. Meanwhile, LELDF currently supports more than a dozen other officers. [**Can I count on you to pitch in just $25, $50, or $100 to save this hero?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) I don’t have to tell you what happens to police officers in prison...they're targeted by violent criminals. **_This political witch-hunt against a good cop – an outstanding man – is a slap in the face to every American who respects the rule of law._** DA Garza showed us his true colors when he considered murder charges against the officer who stopped an active gunman from taking more lives in a crowded bar. **Now it’s time to stop him – and a send a message to all progressive prosecutors – before he ruins another good officer’s life.** Thank you for standing with Officer Chance Bretches and all the wrongly accused officers LELDF supports.
---
| | Gratefully,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---
P.S. I wish I could say what’s happening to Officer Chance Bretches is unheard of – but the truth is that LELDF is supporting more than a dozen other wrongly accused officers right now. And we expect at least 10 of those cases to go to trial this year. **[So, please make your best possible gift to allow LELDF to support Chance and all the other officers relying on us. Thank you again for your support!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **STAND WITH CHANCE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_ [**Join our sustaining members by making a monthly gift to LELDF today!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---|---|---
© Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
[Privacy Policy](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
---

---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We cannot take our foot off the gas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When I think about all of the progress we’ve made in our fight for gun safety, I think of you.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=1&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)
**_A message from Gabby Giffords_**
_To Top Democrats_

Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords. I have an important — and timely — ask before you get back to your weekend:
Will you consider pitching in $5 to GIFFORDS PAC before our mid-month deadline expires at midnight? I’ll explain more below, but if that’s all you need to hear, you can make a donation by clicking this link:
**[https://go.giffords.org/go/Mid-Month](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=2&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)**

When Mark and I were deciding whether to start an organization focused on gun safety, we could have never imagined where it would take us.
GIFFORDS was founded thirteen years ago with one goal in mind: To save lives from senseless gun violence. In the years since, we’ve helped organize a national political movement that’s passed hundreds of gun safety laws and gone toe-to-toe with the gun lobby.
When I think about all of the progress we’ve made in our fight for gun safety, I think of you.

It’s through the support of folks like you that we have the resources to overcome the gun lobby’s attacks and elect gun sense champions across the country.
_Now as we head into the midterms, we are counting on your support more than ever._
The NRA is already endorsing candidates for the November elections, and outside groups are launching new ads to help get them over the finish line.
We need more resources to defeat their candidates and elect a gun sense majority in states across the country. That starts with hitting tonight’s fundraising goal.

**So I’m asking one last time:**[**Can you pitch in $5 to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight? The amount we can raise today will have a big impact on our fight to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=3&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&amount=5&t=4&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)**
---
****
| **[Donate $27](https://go.giffords.org/go/61945?c0=giffords-em-q12026.MY7ihZ&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=5&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q12026.xIe8uE&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=6&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q12026.rrR0ZT&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=7&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q12026.yDhc38&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=8&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&refcode=em260215-2-b&t=9&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M)**
---
****

Thank you for your support.
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=11314%2E3935704%2E6cRI_M) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Team,

We’re halfway through one of the biggest months of this campaign.

March is the last end-of-quarter month before voting starts, and we can’t afford to wait until the last minute to build the momentum we need. We have to push now.

Strong fundraising right now shows the strength of our grassroots movement and helps power the work we need to do to reach voters before the primary.

That’s why we set a goal of 500 grassroots supporters before midnight tonight — and we’re so close.

Right now, we only need 42 more supporters to get there.

About Marlene Galan-Woods
Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress.

clean_body: [] Team, We’re halfway through one of the biggest months of this campaign. March is the last end-of-quarter month before voting starts, and we can’t afford to wait until the last minute to build the momentum we need. We have to push now. Strong fundraising right now shows the strength of our grassroots movement and helps power the work we need to do to reach voters before the primary. That’s why we set a goal of 500 grassroots supporters before midnight tonight — and we’re so close. Right now, we only need 42 more supporters to get there. Can you chip in now to help us hit our goal and go into the primary strong? [] Give $25 >> [] Give $50 >> [] Give $100 >> [] Give $250 >> [] Give $500 >> [] Give other >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately Thank you, Team Marlene [] About Marlene Galan-Woods Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress. body:
Self-funders. Out-of-State PACs. Political Insiders. |
**Self-funders.
Out-of-state PACs.
Political insiders. **
Fellow Patriot, this is who is trying to control the race for the next Attorney General here in Texas.

I can tell you one simple truth: **Texans don't like being pushed around, and we sure don't like people trying to buy our state.**

In the Republican primary for Texas Attorney General, millions of dollars were poured into this race by people who think they can buy power in Texas.

They think if they spend enough money... they can drown out the voice of the people.

But Texans know better.

Fellow Patriot, it's time to show these out-of-touch outsiders that our movement is strong. I need YOU and grassroots supporters to send a loud, clear message that we're not backing down and we're going to win.

I am setting an aggressive goal of adding 102 new grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours.

If you haven't joined this movement yet, that's ok. **[Now is your chance to step up in a big way – even if it's just a couple of bucks.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=70df55519f864e8194d520a5e3dbd32b&_e=LOMaCVfs0_LnQymiUKIMYVfPqmL-LKAnskrHJ7dHdeQoYhxsqQE-TOll2Ha_Ww5c94EE3K3AX-n1k8o59XS5LKE0aJwmwEnOL-cJWj-xR_splIHP6CXSUPrM0cnM7caqutsLu062qbz6t4RTw5dkgL_Kla8nZ1FdibUFaOJcXMtv2BtbJdOO7aD8wXgwcwLaOsOO-amkyHZ1QStqFF2ITUYcnrYNZolaHzn7q2plEHjUuFsr9wo5dPyeIu4Z1XapzlldfZavUvcU3ZGAWz0nmCtSlfKFUsuK2bGBD8-10kWj9sPCzmXgM-t7_CS0nPkEnymb93tBx2-85ddikXuTXES4ol_n5QJhuR9zT_rPp-dNvptpLZIY719MctyqvCEo1LTCP5onJdfhUBLzZv-VGzLLxLsPmjPPFsq8y-b-rgWHr7LUH3dJ08EbVw2UikcMCzatOpk-9o6hh19SGznkDpFhZ4C6COrVf98LRO-5tiZLh6VRUjCNYI2aDyfO8eWDJPZoeL4d3wcfA2wV9IhNeQ5pVIgycVKsKvfvGVRQYPp9M1nrIezWlpVzIXMlrzfd0SX4szNP9iMsrolviRMD9OlL6q1lhBP_0j2ZDVPKDBj3kF8k5RVg7VTY2La0tHMqBkxamIu1Ouiq8sCXWK7YJrVI49cjD2CAZmN0nUl5I_k%3D)**

I've spent my career fighting for this state - taking on Washington bureaucrats, standing up for border security, defending election integrity, and stopping radical policies that threaten Texas.

And because of your support, we forced this race into a runoff. We overcame a $16 million hurdle.

But here's the bad news, Fellow Patriot. _**The same people who tried to buy the first round are preparing to spend even more.**_

But this campaign has never been about big money. It's about Texans.

The people who knock doors. The people who spread the word. The people who believe our state is worth fighting for.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Not the email I wanted to send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Peter,
No BS: this isn’t the email I wanted to send tonight.
My campaign is approaching our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight, and we’re still short of our $15,000 goal. With only 50 days until ballots drop, we need to reach this goal and grow our lead right now.
The polls are close, and it’s going to be an all-out sprint through primary day.
For starters, my billionaire opponent has poured nearly $80 million into his campaign—and you can be sure that number will keep growing as we get closer to Election Day.
Plus two Republicans continue to place near the top of the polls. If our campaign doesn’t reach more voters, these Republicans could box Democrats out of the November ballot altogether.
Peter, I’m the only candidate in this race who’s unbought by corporate money and not running to do the billionaires’ dirty work. I’m a single mom running to fight for working families like my own. But I need your help to win this race.
If you are able, donate $5 to my campaign today to help us reach our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal. Use the link below to chip in.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Peter ,
If you ever wonder, "Does my vote actually matter?” just listen to this:
Last week, a Democrat won the mayoral race in Boca Raton, Florida – 30 minutes from Mar-a-Lago – by 5 VOTES.
The seat hadn't been held by a Democrat in over 30 years, and by just a handful of votes, it flipped into Democratic hands in Trump’s own backyard.
That's the entire GOTV PAC model. We contact low-propensity voters – the people who only vote in presidential years, or who've never voted at all and make sure they turn out. Not because every race is decided by 5 votes, but because some of them are, and you never know which ones until it's over.
If you can spare $10, $35, or $50 – that's what funds the work that finds the voters who will decide races like this one. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03152026]

---|---|---
* * *
_**By David Shuster**_
Donald Trump has long maintained a remarkable faith in the healing power of bluster. To hear him tell it, the world's knottiest problems can be solved with a raised voice, a wagging finger, and the occasional bombing campaign. Unfortunately for the American taxpayer and the global economy, reality is less obedient than MAGA world.
The latest proof has arrived in the form of a staggering oil shock--an economic calamity as old as the modern petroleum age and just as predictable. The escalating war with Iran has rattled the global energy market like a brick through a greenhouse window.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a8e1ccb3-4e47-46fa-a983-693fa6e96ab7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Oil tankers are getting hit by Iranian drones and missiles, cargo insurance companies are yanking premiums, and the Persian Gulf bottleneck has caused crude prices to leap above 100 dollars a barrel. The consequences are spreading outward with the elegance of an oil slick.
The key issue involves the narrow maritime obstacle known as the Strait of Hormuz, through which 20% of the world's oil must pass.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2f2074e2-03ae-4768-85aa-90287c478ae1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When militaries start fighting anywhere near that corridor (or elsewhere in the Persian gulf) the global economy tends to develops a nervous twitch. Traders panic, prices soar, and economists begin dusting off their lectures about inflation, recession, and the delicate mechanics of supply shocks.
Relatedly, we are now witnessing the exact outcome that any halfway attentive student of history might have predicted.
That's because oil is not merely a commodity. It is the bloodstream of the modern petroleum rigged economy. Raise oil prices and the entire organism begins to wheeze.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07c26fba-d6c2-44f6-9de1-28ff1b464f69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Gasoline becomes more expensive, trucking costs climb, airline prices rise, food costs creep upward, and every factory from Detroit to Dusseldorf recalculates their margins. What begins at the oil well soon arrives, like clockwork, at the supermarket checkout.
And at this very moment, the American public is discovering a small but painful fact: Donald Trump's geopolitical adventure in Iran is squeezing all of us with personal financial costs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf0176cd-5ce4-4bec-8814-2e82fe648124?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Only months ago, Dementia Don was congratulating himself on cheap gasoline, which he treated as proof of his economic wizardry. Cheap gas, in the Trump fantasy world, was the natural product of his leadership-- just as sunshine was presumably the result of his morning tweets. Now that fuel prices are rising sharply, the Trump explanation has shifted.
"The United States is the largest Oil producer in the World, by far, so when oil prices go up, we make a lot of money."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7627b1d3-cf8a-4135-adc4-60e154b0068d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We? You mean the billionaire oil companies and their investors make a lot of money. The working class actually loses money through higher costs.
In fact for most citizens, high oil prices behave very much like a tax. Every extra dollar spent filling the tank is a dollar unavailable for groceries, rent, or the modest entertainments that make life more tolerable. When tens of millions of households undergo this small but persistent squeeze, the broader economy begins to sag. Restaurants see fewer diners, retailers move less merchandise, and the general hum of commerce drops in volume.
Economists have known this for half a century.
* * *
_If you 're enjoying this piece and want more independent journalism that calls out the corruption and incompetence infecting our politics..._
_**[consider becoming a paid subscriber.](https://substack.com/redirect/f74ba762-f887-4a01-b4ea-4bf756227d13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
_Your support keeps this platform independent --**[and helps us keep exposing the truth.](https://substack.com/redirect/f74ba762-f887-4a01-b4ea-4bf756227d13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Subscribe Now!](https://substack.com/redirect/6b4fa4ac-c98a-436b-9ce1-3d0eea6eef68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5e49d56c-28d7-483a-a6df-aa1aaf56394c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the 1970's, the oil shocks of that time provided a frightening tutorial on how an energy crisis can produce the most unpleasant of economic ailments: inflation coupled with stagnation. Prices rise even as growth falters, leaving policymakers with the charming choice between tightening the screws or letting the patient (consumers) languish.
Yet the Trump administration appears genuinely astonished that the war against Iran has disturbed oil markets. One imagines the generals warned Trump ahead of time that bombs and oil tankers rarely coexist peacefully, prompting Trump to briefly open his eyes before falling back asleep.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a5110268-773a-483a-8b16-f9c838a38f35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Or if Trump was awake, he nodded and went back to the pressing concern of posting insults on social media.
Meanwhile, the global economy--an intricate web of supply chains and financial nerves-- is reacting as it always does when the energy spigot begins to sputter.
Markets are trembling, businesses are hesitating, and governments are scrambling for emergency solutions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/684001b9-6d61-480e-b292-2c6b7a50672f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And so the Trump administration has now come full circle. A war launched in the name of strength and power has prompted Orange Man and his goons to grovel and desperately hunt for additional barrels of crude.
History, of course, is repeating itself. The old lesson--that war in the Middle East carries severe economic risks--was available to anyone with an internet connection, google, and the patience to read a few pages about the twentieth century. But such sober considerations or lessons have never been a priority in Trump world, especially amidst the intoxicating appeal of swagger.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43e9f50e-126b-48fa-9949-015ea1cba07a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And Trump has always demonstrated that swagger is his governing philosophy.
The tragedy is that the financial consequences of this mess will not be shouldered by the architects of the Iran war. The costs will fall instead upon the people who must pay more for gasoline, groceries, and electricity while the world's most vital energy corridor keeps getting rattled by bombs, missiles, and suicide drones.
Donald Trump may still declare victory. He has always claimed success regardless of the evidence.
But in the harsher arithmetic of economics, winning is harder to manufacture. When oil prices spike, growth falters, and household budgets strain, the verdict tends to be rendered not in political speeches but in personal financial struggles.
And for tens of millions of Americans across the political spectrum, those struggles are piling up.
* * *

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
[ stdin# ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor
Hi, I know you get a lot of emails from me. So I wanted to
take a step back and tell you a little bit more about me and why I’m
running to be the next Governor of Michigan.

Ever since I was a student, I knew I wanted to fight for justice and make
a difference. I’m the daughter of two special education teachers. I was
raised in a working class family that instilled in me the values of hard
work, opportunity, and serving others.

It’s why I started my career investigating threats to democracy and civil
rights in the US and abroad.

It’s why I became a law clerk in Detroit, fighting to protect and defend
people’s civil rights and freedoms.

It’s why as Dean of Wayne State University Law School, I worked to ensure
all students could afford their education, froze tuition, and expanded
scholarships.

And it’s why as Secretary of State, I’ve fought to make everyday life
easier for all Michiganders, secure our elections, and expand voter
access.

But I know our work is far from finished. So now, I’m running for Governor
to make sure Michigan is a place where everyone – from our kids to our
seniors – can stay and thrive.

I know that government works best when it’s there when you need it, and
gets out of the way when you don’t. So here’s my promise to you: when we
win this election, I will use every tool available to make life easier:
expand rural healthcare options, build more housing, take on the utility
companies who raise our rates, make childcare free, and ensure anyone can
afford to live in the best place to call home.

But here’s the truth: Michigan is one of the most competitive states in
the entire country, and our opponents have the backing of big billionaires
and special interests. I can only win this race with your support, so
today, I’m asking:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3217?t=1001&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y ]Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to power our campaign for
Michigan and make sure we have the resources to win?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3218?t=1002&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y ]Donate $5 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3219?t=1003&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y ]Donate $25 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3220?t=1004&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y ]Donate $50 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3221?t=1005&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y ]Donate $100 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3222?t=1006&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y ]Donate $250 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3217?t=1007&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y ]Other →

Thanks for reading,

Jocelyn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
Unsubscribe: https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=1008&akid=1557%2E181023%2EP0Ff8Y

[PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
