name: Justice Democrats
subject: Kat needs your urgent help to win on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The Illinois Democratic primary elections are two days away, and a new
poll shows support for Justice Democrats-endorsed candidate Kat
Abughazaleh surging in Illinois’ 9th district.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260315-2-ka.t_DB1j&refcode=em20260315-37564&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37564%2E1203867%2E7srObM ]Bluesky post by Alex Harrison: IL-09 POLL: In the 2nd Evanston
Roundtable/PPP primary poll, Daniel Biss is unmoved at 24% and Kate
Abughazaleh has jumped to 20%, narrowing the gap to 4%. Laura Fine falls
to 14%, Mike Simmons up to 10%. Undecideds still sizable at 17%. Polled
March 9-10, MOE 3.6%.

It’s going to be an all-out sprint to the finish on Tuesday. In this
crowded and competitive primary, Kat needs a large plurality of votes to
win.

And that won’t be an easy feat with AIPAC spending more than $1 million
against us.

The Israel lobby is terrified by Kat because she represents a movement of
Democratic voters fed up with sending endless taxpayer dollars to fund
Israel’s genocide of Palestinians and regional war against Iran and
Lebanon.

Kat is a proud Palestinian-American committed to achieving a Free
Palestine, ending U.S. complicity in the genocide in Gaza and the
occupation of the West Bank, and putting a stop to more endless wars.

AIPAC sees the momentum and knows Kat can win — that’s why they’re
panicking and funneling money to shady super PACs with vague names to
flood the district with ads and mailers against her in these final days of
the race.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260315-2-ka.t_DB1j&refcode=em20260315-37564&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37564%2E1203867%2E7srObM ]We need more grassroots resources NOW to fight back and get Kat’s
pro-peace message out before we run out of time. With only 2 days left,
rush a split donation of $5 or more to Justice Democrats
and Kat’s campaign →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260315-2-ka.t_DB1j&refcode=em20260315-37564&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37564%2E1203867%2E7srObM ]Contribute $5

Electing Kat would be a massive upset against AIPAC and the Democratic
establishment, but it will only happen if we the people come together and
show that we’re more powerful than the Israel lobby and its far-right
megadonor-funded super PACs.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260315-37564-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37564_1203867_7srObM&akid=37564%2E1203867%2E7srObM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37564%2E1203867%2E7srObM

The Israel lobby is terrified by Kat because she represents a movement of Democratic voters fed up with sending endless taxpayer dollars to fund Israel’s genocide of Palestinians and regional war against Iran and Lebanon. Kat is a proud Palestinian-American committed to achieving a Free Palestine, ending U.S. complicity in the genocide in Gaza and the occupation of the West Bank, and putting a stop to more endless wars. AIPAC sees the momentum and knows Kat can win — that’s why they’re panicking and funneling money to shady super PACs with vague names to flood the district with ads and mailers against her in these final days of the race. [ ]We need more grassroots resources NOW to fight back and get Kat’s pro-peace message out before we run out of time. With only 2 days left, rush a split donation of $5 or more to Justice Democrats and Kat’s campaign → [ ]Contribute $5 Electing Kat would be a massive upset against AIPAC and the Democratic establishment, but it will only happen if we the people come together and show that we’re more powerful than the Israel lobby and its far-right megadonor-funded super PACs. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Political analysts were stunned. National media started paying attention. Democrats across the country celebrated. But now...I'm staring at our fundraising numbers and honestly... _I 'm confused._ Donations have slowed to a trickle. **_Meanwhile, Trump 's allies are already pouring money into this race to stop us before the April 7 runoff._** **_Did people stop paying attention? Do people think the hard part is over? Do people think someone else will step up?_** Republicans are unifying behind one candidate. MAGA money is coming in fast. And if we fall behind right now, we could lose all the momentum we just built. [**I need grassroots supporters to step up immediately. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: required by law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, it's Jon Ossoff. _Can you take a minute to hear me out?_
At the end of this month, my team and I are facing our campaign's most important fundraising deadline yet and one of the biggest tests of the strength of the movement we've built here in Georgia.
After March 31, we're required by law to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) — and shortly after, those numbers will be made public.
This will be the first time that our 2026 fundraising numbers will be public, and because I am Trump and MAGA's #1 target in the midterms, _our fundraising report will be the most scrutinized in the entire country._
If we fall short of our goals ... if our numbers look weak ... Republicans will seize the opportunity to flood the airwaves with _even more attack ads_ designed to distort my record. Attacks we can't afford at this point in the campaign.
We have to show everyone that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable. And that means we have to put up a _staggering_ number of grassroots donations when we file our FEC report.
So I'm personally asking:
**[Will you make a contribution to my reelection campaign before our critical FEC deadline at the end of the month?_Every donation counts._ Whether it's $10 or $100, thank you for chipping in at this critical moment in the race.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260315-2-f&t=1&akid=1864%2E5691347%2EPcHov1)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260315-2-f&t=2&akid=1864%2E5691347%2EPcHov1)**
Sincerely,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=1864%2E5691347%2EPcHov1) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1864%2E5691347%2EPcHov1) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

| | | [Beth Farnham for Congress](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com) | [Read on blog](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F03%2F15%2Fpa-13-you-crushed-it%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=b36f78d7fb10a2ee5cc61a8e354e4d04&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F6546&sr=0&signature=cf435f456437748bcfa60dbdb43aa67e&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)

# [PA-13, You CRUSHED it!](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/03/15/pa-13-you-crushed-it/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on March 15, 2026
---
| **District Round-up 03.08.26**
---
Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=76885a0ec876113213729b6b350995b5b6cb5b0243c4b87aa1f21a263cb8e0d1&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=de58bdbcba740017cd55fcf3b1182d91&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)**
---
| | |
---
**Petition Season Success!**
---
Many, many thanks to All Who Signed Petitions and especial thanks to Those Who Circulated Petitions.
---
Team [Beth Farnham for Congress](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d4efb8e98fc454514e8564bffa58df8eeb5ba7dbfc70a2da315ea42ad9ce6e4b&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=299b74d5e36f2d474956309b84158c2f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0JldGhGYXJuaGFtZm9yQ29uZ3Jlc3M/X190bl9fPS0lNURLKkY&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58) turned in 2,243 signatures to Harrisburg on Monday, overperforming the required number by 123% and 2024’s number by several hundred signatures!
---
Because of you, my name will be printed on the Democratic ballot for the May 19th primary election.
---
Special shout-out to Campaign Manager Jack Stansbury who was with me every step of the way!
---
For registered Republicans – please write my name on the ballot for US Representative 13th District and color in the corresponding oval instead of voting for multimillionaire John Joyce who votes against us Everyday Americans in his pitiful deference to Trump.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=101bc4d919cfd4d10cd5a0b2bfc2be42c0a9736164351cbda75298ea20d23a22&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=76109e9f53d28b44706da1d274a03915&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2hhc2h0YWcvY2hvb3NlZGVtb2NyYWN5P19fZWVwX189NiZfX3RuX189Kk5LKkY&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58) !
---
Photo credit: Jack Stansbury
---
| | | |
---
Wondering how I would vote compared to multimillionaire John Joyce? Here’s a snapshot. More detailed information can be found near the end of this newsletter.
---
| **Doorknocking for Caleb McCoy!**
---
Many thanks to the Team Caleb for PA for a terrific door-knocking session to get out the vote for Caleb McCoy in PA House District 79 on March 17th – St. Patrick’s Day!
---
It was a productive time speaking to voters about Caleb’s fight to lower costs for hard-working families and provide services like childcare and expanded community college options.
---
I even got to catch up with PADEMS Chair, Eugene Depasquale who ran for PA Attorney General in 2024! Bonus – I got to meet Representative Napoleon Nelson of Pennsylvania’s 154th State House District.
---
Together, we #ChooseDemocracy!
---
Photo credit: Liz Green
---
| |
---|---
[https://www.tiktok.com/@bethfarnhamforcongress/video/7617282573194087710](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b839d120f630394b382208f3bea68cf860a4945cf494f7b9d48cb70a93b76666&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=085502749bb8d4cfd21556875153db35&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGlrdG9rLmNvbS9AYmV0aGZhcm5oYW1mb3Jjb25ncmVzcy92aWRlby83NjE3MjgyNTczMTk0MDg3NzEw&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)
| **Volunteering at Little Daisy’s Closet**
---
Yesterday, I volunteered at Little Daisy’s Closet in Chambersburg. Families in need in Franklin County can take away quality clothes, shoes, and other essential items for free.
---
Because our current representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, voted to remove Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits from over six thousand constituents in our 13th District, families in need will increase their spending on food and therefore decrease their spending on other important items like clothes for growing children. Indeed, charity shops like Little Daisy’s Closet are seeing an uptick in numbers of those whom they serve.
---
During my shift, I also heard a harrowing story about a family that’s been very negatively impacted by the kidnapping and deportation of one of their beloved family members. More details to follow as I am able to release them.
---
Please vote me into office on November 3rd so we can actually:
---
* Help the poor
* Feed the hungry
* Heal the sick
* Welcome the Stranger.

No matter how they arrived at those circumstances.
---
Together, we #ChooseDemocracy!
---
| |
---|---
Photo credits: Vince Horst and Desi Ortiz
---
| **Two PA State House Districts in PA-13!**
---
Lastly, the Special Election on March 17th isn’t just for voters in the 79th State House District of PA, it’s also for voters in the 193rd State House District of PA. Please vote for Todd Crawley if you live in the 193rd District on Tuesday.
---
Both elections will be an indicator of how our 13th Congressional District is increasing Democratic voteshare on the way to November’s election. May our neighbors #ChooseDemocracy!
---
|
---
| **Legislative Comparison**
---
Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison and why!
---
| **Legislation**| **Joyce’s vote**| **US House Result**| **How Beth would have voted**| **Rationale for Beth’s vote**
---|---|---|---|---
[**H Con Res 38**
Directing the President pursuant to section 5(c) of the War Powers Resolution to remove United States Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities in the Islamic Republic of Iran](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4b1749de017165ec1498cae3c2c397c9634d9826c1688abc1ca24bd8bc733122&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=e57048428b8c741d4620476362e707d1&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtY29uY3VycmVudC1yZXNvbHV0aW9uLzM4L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| No| Failed| Yes| Only Congress has the power to declare war and with good reason. Many representatives of The People must agree it is in the best interests of our nation to invoke the high costs, threats to our national security, and tests of our allyship with other nations that a war often brings. Most certainly, war should not be declared by the whims of a mad king.
[**H Res 1099**
Reaffirming Iran remains the largest state sponsor of terrorism](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b77a92613721f278928e7c16fc288c6051830ee4de38d7979fcbf97c9d3afad2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a02c702357ec6c57c358ceb08d18c0aa&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi8xMDk5L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Based on alleged training, fincancing, providing weapons, and safe havens of Islamic Jihad, Hamas, Hezbollah, and Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine, it is reasonable to believe that Iran remains the largest state sponsor of terrorism. This did not justify Trump’s attack without a plan on Iran, however.
[**HR 7744**
Department of Homeland Security Appropriations Act, 2026](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f8732ea80a023fa46e80ed83c4b9226d0ff72e2872a7309c970f0904315f3118&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=cc5bc27cf8d4349e32844ed835cd6e46&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC83NzQ0L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| No| Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (I.C.E.) must be abolished and Customs and Border Protection must be reformed before DHS is granted another penny. With the staggeringly low standards in hiring practices for ICE, there is no redemption for those who will readily forgo Due Process. Moreover, overstaying one’s visa to the point of an “illegal” status is a misdemeanor and not worthy of the incredible cruelty and defiance of human rights and dignity that ICE currently persues. Immigration courts must be properly staffed and the immigrant-to-citizen path must be clearer to obtain.
[**H Res 1100**
Directing the Committee on Ethics to preserve and publicly release records of the Committee’s review of violations or alleged violations of clause 9 (as it pertains to acts of sexual harassment) and clause 18 of rule XXIII of the Rules of the House of Representatives](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=49d55c5656d17b7f01ed183982dd33f753b5922a93d335f80975575e00653d33&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b0ee8af2be90f30f2a750b2827b86f2c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi8xMTAwL3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Motion Agreed| Yes| Publicly releasing such records too soon can compromise the identity of victims.
[HR 6472 – Territorial Student Access to Higher Education Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=92aa0b778634a8f614e5a11566037200d231b7c596ed6c244bbff00db1475bd9&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=9ca56f3b2c6c9ee1cc1ba2451855e669&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC82NDcyL3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Students in US territories should not have to pay more than in-state tuition to attend institutions of higher learning.
[S 723 – Tribal Trust Land Homeownership Act of 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d4911096ee527818cd5c7b3e3fc53ed30218d579707d9e34d9802c4473fd41af&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6204f55c6ff16e49f7ae61750c9fc901&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3Mvc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwvNzIzL3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Native Americans deserve the opportunity to own property on tribal land through the mortgage process.
[HR 4758 – Homeowner Energy Freedom Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1a8581d215f44c1b228e68fbcb6476b1f2ba30b8bbe10dbb84a55b3f17589670&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=666253cc25170fd558c483ee991c72e1&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80NzU4L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| No| This Bill repeals many home efficiency programs that helped homeowners save energy by ending: the high-efficiency electric home rebate program, efficiency contractor training grants, funding for specific state building codes.
[HR 4626 – Don’t Mess With My Home Appliances Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=47bdc27ed65ed81ee2e498c944a22df0cdbf94ce3bc3bbe39aba55c7874d68a8&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1708dfa955c3b3e7232db2b87f4a1147&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80NjI2L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| No| The Bill eliminates the DOE look back for reviewing and making periodic standards every six years in addition to revoking standards of efficiency.
[HR 6329 – Information Quality Assurance Act of 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fbe402ddf46151c93d653ce8c19569481408f471973e6263c80399295bcceb8c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=8eb35770839d1f93657c52169b8d3f0c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC82MzI5L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| Yes| It’s just common sense to for the Office of Management and Budget to revise policy and require federal agencies to rely on the best reasonably available information and evidence.
[S 2503 – Rotorcraft Operations Transparency and Oversight Reform (ROTOR) Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ee73b13c08443101b0ba6b245ebc528d9dda055d61ae55ffd7bc54471054fb51&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2a8ec3d04075946bf584b7e8a65e0e0f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3Mvc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwvMjUwMy90ZXh0&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| No| Failed| Yes| Relatives of those killed in the January 2025 crash supported this bipartisan Senate Bill because it is more stringent than the Graves House Bill.
[HR 2189 – Law-Enforcement Innovate to De-Escalate Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=3b342a15749b5e93ecbfc85081e1f2b2665f6d60f8a4cab99e14cc5c1e4237ec&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a75f756ba04de30e6e2909e0ec03deb1&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8yMTg5L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| No| While less-than-lethal weapons are ostensibly less lethal than many firearms, they can still be lethal, especially when converted through kits designed for that pu
rpose. Repealing the power of the Gun Control Act to now allow convicted criminals, including domestic abusers, to create these “ghost guns” increases danger to American communities, especially by those who have not changed their ways.
[H J Res 72 – Relating to a national emergency by the President on February 1, 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e24cb06f2cbf4ae8559667dee82000fae59e2db7b25526164499b70c73f6bd47&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=ab5a6858941c75deb06383b457d7564f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi83Mi90ZXh0&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| No| Passed| Yes| Agree with Rep. Bacon that Trump’s unjustified tariffs on China, Mexico, and Canada “have been a ‘net negative’ for the economy and are a significant tax that American consumers, manufacturers, and farmers are paying.” and that “Article I of the Constitution places authority over taxes and tariffs with Congress for a reason, but for too long, we have handed that authority to the executive branch. It’s time for Congress to reclaim that responsibility.”
[S 1383 – Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=eaa43208d5abe29649bcf5b6bad39eb95adbcbbe03e8996906dadb7b7118e322&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d1f2f656485cb47193e039a1d2d14ea2&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3Mvc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwvMTM4My90ZXh0&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed | No| Suppresses the votes of married women especially whose names do not match those on their birth certificates by requiring passports as proof of citizenship instead, in the event of registration for change of address, name change, change of political party, or unjust removal from voter rolls. Cost and burden of passport is virtually poll tax with disparate impact against women.
[HR 1531 – Pressure Regulatory Organizations To End Chinese Threats to (PROTECT) Taiwan Act ](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=58faa9ed17a10dc29b84fe308ddadebbfeb1ddf69137fbdc716c8d92b60e6046&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=992db07bc640f7860f660c4db0705efa&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8xNTMxL3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Requires Department of the Treasury, the Federal Reserve, and the Securities and Exchange Commission to exclude China from the Group of Twenty;
the Bank for International Settlements;
the Financial Stability Board;
the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision;
the International Association of Insurance Supervisors; and
the International Organization of Securities Commissions, if China poses threat to Tawain or US interests.
[HR 6644 – To increase the supply of housing in America, and for other purposes](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=99280a4e8a553c47de157ed028e299dcbad5f4997f5570114d54242a09c3f28b&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=82a49decea523705d7606b61ae0d84e9&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC82NjQ0L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Expanding available finance programs for affordable housing. Restricts veterans’ disability benefits from being considered as source of income.
[H J Res 142 – Disapproving the action of the District of Columbia Council in approving the D.C. Income and Franchise Tax Conformity and Revision Temporary Amendment Act of 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=a798bb15538295ea3b3ed74025cf805c393fce8c3c2099c96e2ad78bc1c37837&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=726d0e4064786fafda8247a7e308cbb0&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi8xNDIvdGV4dA=&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| No| OBBBA decreased DC’s “overall stability and revenue streams of economic base” and the decoupling was allowable through Home Rule.
[HR 4090 – Critical Mineral Dominance Act ](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=a580394aeecf7cbc6a3f73b7e5c058019c0b1939d0151370d95a0bfeb7245b4b&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=3dded47ea0c0ddf6e2374063d7db5a9b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80MDkwL3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| No| Sweetheart deals to foreign mining corporations is contrary to American interests and security. Nor should we violate our protected public and tribal lands to do it.
[HR 7148 – Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2026](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e83ffd9a6446393e787560d2c4a02ab0487873047e81ea665d82900942e12525&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=c504cdbad29cd13c38f6879230912613&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC83MTQ4L3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| No| Because there has been no correction of masked agents of I.C.E. using lethal force for imaginary reasons, I.C.E. must be abolished. It is unconscionable that the United States keep supplying funding to masked agents of the state who murder Americans on our public streets with no accountability. This is contrary to ideals born of the American Revolution.
[HR 3123 – Ernest Peltz Accrued Veterans Benefits Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2034c4f51dfffeead4fc602e7c0cb45c82c23285ca93f545b310c38f4746038a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6546&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d6042c07bdd43597fe03b497ddbc050e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8zMTIzL3RleHQ&email_id=de4fba0112363baf6de9e9fc4db84b58)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Living dependents of the veteran who died deserve the pension payment that was destined to him/her, yet unpaid.
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
---
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
---
Sincerely,
---
Beth
---

clean_body: District Round-up 03.08.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you... | | | | | or ---|---|--- By Elizabeth Farnham on March 15, 2026 | District Round-up 03.08.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: | | | Petition Season Success! Many, many thanks to All Who Signed Petitions and especial thanks to Those Who Circulated Petitions. Team turned in 2,243 signatures to Harrisburg on Monday, overperforming the required number by 123% and 2024’s number by several hundred signatures! Because of you, my name will be printed on the Democratic ballot for the May 19th primary election. Special shout-out to Campaign Manager Jack Stansbury who was with me every step of the way! For registered Republicans – please write my name on the ballot for US Representative 13th District and color in the corresponding oval instead of voting for multimillionaire John Joyce who votes against us Everyday Americans in his pitiful deference to Trump. Together, we ! Photo credit: Jack Stansbury | | | | Wondering how I would vote compared to multimillionaire John Joyce? Here’s a snapshot. More detailed information can be found near the end of this newsletter. | Doorknocking for Caleb McCoy! Many thanks to the Team Caleb for PA for a terrific door-knocking session to get out the vote for Caleb McCoy in PA House District 79 on March 17th – St. Patrick’s Day! It was a productive time speaking to voters about Caleb’s fight to lower costs for hard-working families and provide services like childcare and expanded community college options. I even got to catch up with PADEMS Chair, Eugene Depasquale who ran for PA Attorney General in 2024! Bonus – I got to meet Representative Napoleon Nelson of Pennsylvania’s 154th State House District. Together, we #ChooseDemocracy! Photo credit: Liz Green | | ---|--- | Volunteering at Little Daisy’s Closet Yesterday, I volunteered at Little Daisy’s Closet in Chambersburg. Families in need in Franklin County can take away quality clothes, shoes, and other essential items for free. Because our current representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, voted to remove Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits from over six thousand constituents in our 13th District, families in need will increase their spending on food and therefore decrease their spending on other important items like clothes for growing children. Indeed, charity shops like Little Daisy’s Closet are seeing an uptick in numbers of those whom they serve. During my shift, I also heard a harrowing story about a family that’s been very negatively impacted by the kidnapping and deportation of one of their beloved family members. More details to follow as I am able to release them. Please vote me into office on November 3rd so we can actually: Help the poor Feed the hungry Heal the sick Welcome the Stranger. No matter how they arrived at those circumstances. Together, we #ChooseDemocracy! | | ---|--- Photo credits: Vince Horst and Desi Ortiz | Two PA State House Districts in PA-13! Lastly, the Special Election on March 17th isn’t just for voters in the 79th State House District of PA, it’s also for voters in the 193rd State House District of PA. Please vote for Todd Crawley if you live in the 193rd District on Tuesday. Both elections will be an indicator of how our 13th Congressional District is increasing Democratic voteshare on the way to November’s election. May our neighbors #ChooseDemocracy! | | Legislative Comparison Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison and why! | Legislation| Joyce’s vote| US House Result| How Beth would have voted| Rationale for Beth’s vote ---|---|---|---|--- | No| Failed| Yes| Only Congress has the power to declare war and with good reason. Many representatives of The People must agree it is in the best interests of our nation to invoke the high costs, threats to our national security, and tests of our allyship with other nations that a war often brings. Most certainly, war should not be declared by the whims of a mad king. | Yes| Passed| Yes| Based on alleged training, fincancing, providing weapons, and safe havens of Islamic Jihad, Hamas, Hezbollah, and Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine, it is reasonable to believe that Iran remains the largest state sponsor of terrorism. This did not justify Trump’s attack without a plan on Iran, however. | Yes| Passed| No| Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (I.C.E.) must be abolished and Customs and Border Protection must be reformed before DHS is granted another penny. With the staggeringly low standards in hiring practices for ICE, there is no redemption for those who will readily forgo Due Process. Moreover, overstaying one’s visa to the point of an “illegal” status is a misdemeanor and not worthy of the incredible cruelty and defiance of human rights and dignity that ICE currently persues. Immigration courts must be properly staffed and the immigrant-to-citizen path must be clearer to obtain. | Yes| Motion Agreed| Yes| Publicly releasing such records too soon can compromise the identity of victims. | Yes| Passed| Yes| Students in US territories should not have to pay more than in-state tuition to attend institutions of higher learning. | Yes| Passed| Yes| Native Americans deserve the opportunity to own property on tribal land through the mortgage process. | Yes| Passed| No| This Bill repeals many home efficiency programs that helped homeowners save energy by ending: the high-efficiency electric home rebate program, efficiency contractor training grants, funding for specific state building codes. | Yes| Passed| No| The Bill eliminates the DOE look back for reviewing and making periodic standards every six years in addition to revoking standards of efficiency. | Yes| Passed| Yes| It’s just common sense to for the Office of Management and Budget to revise policy and require federal agencies to rely on the best reasonably available information and evidence. | No| Failed| Yes| Relatives of those killed in the January 2025 crash supported this bipartisan Senate Bill because it is more stringent than the Graves House Bill. | Yes| Passed| No| While less-than-lethal weapons are ostensibly less lethal than many firearms, they can still be lethal, especially when converted through kits designed for that pu rpose. I’m hoping you’ll join me.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127393485/607907587/2105508926?refcode=ea.c88b5833-c120-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.c88b5833-c120-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4OGI1ODMzLWMxMjAtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pztZfvqib5Ru8oykjgnr9F0ITNboRjd-BEohewZ7D0c=) Friends, I've been arrested several times in my life for standing up for what's right. **_Not once did I do it alone._** Every act of courage I've ever taken has been made possible by people willing to show up alongside me. That's what this movement is all about. People showing up for each other, for our planet and democracy, and for the future we all deserve. That kind of solidarity is what turns conviction into real change — the kind that can break the fossil fuel industry’s grip on our politics and the politicians who do their bidding. **That’s why I turn to you as often as I do. I’ve seen the power of ordinary people coming together for a better future, but with time running out, I have to ask:** **[Can I count on your first $3 donation to JanePAC today? clean_body: I’m hoping you’ll join me. | = Friends, I've been arrested several times in my life for standing up for what's right. Not once did I do it alone. Every act of courage I've ever taken has been made possible by people willing to show up alongside me. That's what this movement is all about. People showing up for each other, for our planet and democracy, and for the future we all deserve. That kind of solidarity is what turns conviction into real change — the kind that can break the fossil fuel industry’s grip on our politics and the politicians who do their bidding. That’s why I turn to you as often as I do. I’ve seen the power of ordinary people coming together for a better future, but with time running out, I have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your support means the world to me. A donation to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC goes directly toward electing the climate and democracy champions who will fight for the future we all deserve. In solidarity, xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

**Peter, this is Lt. General Mike Flynn. I need your eyes on this _right now._** I’m sending a **warning message** to every America First patriot— _because what happens in this upcoming Governor’s race will decide the future of our movement._ **Peter** , I know what it’s like to fight for my life. I know what it's like to be politically persecuted. **So does Nancy Mace.** **[Before I explain why I’m endorsing her for Governor, I want to tell you about her.](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg1047-ag3739-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzEwNDciLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMzczOSJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3238333634&utm_medium=email&utm_term=ionian&xunv=ionian&xutm=02015101)** **At 17, Nancy dropped out of high school. ** She didn’t come from a silver-spoon background. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

Peter,

While the rise in popularity of politicians like Zohran Mamdani and his socialist policies might have come as a shock to many, I've been warning people about it for years.

Younger Americans do not know what socialism means.

When younger Americans think of "socialism," they think it means Sweden and Denmark.

They didn't grow up during the Cold War. They don't remember the Soviet Union. Or Stalin's Gulags or the Warsaw Pact. They couldn't even tell you what the initials U.S.S.R. stood for, or that Nazi is the abbreviation of National Socialist.

**Young Americans need to hear about socialism, real socialism, from someone who experienced it firsthand. I can think of no one better than Ayn Rand.**

Rand wrote novels like _We The Living_ , which dramatized the inhumanity of the Soviet system -- and most importantly, _Atlas Shrugged_ , which dramatized what would happen if socialism came to America. Rand's immense success in making the moral case for capitalism led my friend, the late Ed Crane, to call her "the greatest all-time recruiter for the liberty movement."

The challenge is that young people simply aren't reading novels anymore. In the 70s, 70% of young people read fiction daily for fun -- today, less than 12% do.

That's where The Atlas Society comes in. They bring Ayn Rand's ideas to life for new audiences in innovative ways, including animated videos, viral social media, graphic novels -- even music videos. Plus online courses and live events.

I told Jennifer Grossman, The Atlas Society's CEO, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this month to introduce more young minds to Ayn Rand's ideas.

[If that’s all you need to hear, then please send an urgent donation of $10 or more to The Atlas Society to introduce the ideas of Ayn Rand to a new generation. Every $10 donated helps The Atlas Society reach 2,000 young people online!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/CCuUAX-AYkySAyIWAJ1JIhJc0WdgNKBKapBxtOQ_qmvEQ6lS1c2JvElusahCR4S07X275kHZJJnMGlL2OeDZO3mfaP5p1rM5dkeP_TwCyy0KYyy0l9uhbr1PbMu5XkBVxgjELd09zlvGMEnGc6S7YnHhit9Y3VgSXzBMlnMi4IG3QSialQj-2O6H534g0Y2ysdAPulR7oiQRxhodMGvFhcKRZZdM5nr1yFahif9BUuKsy33kTYJsHYr1YHiEZL17AyK0mGELO6Oqp0y3x3DmWaDWBt7x1CrBkIbDiiZJWru5aMKFIZ9tZ6LpqWbzdkKNLHkuwtD8b_0Q_GcxAB5OMAUj01E_CXvhaAHxtC9iIaygFguXb1I1qSaczpTtdjSD5ZNKSOnrAKi9TpQS1xomOOyb7tRjASe6E9VfhbY_Ycuv4mTc5nIY_l-E8DrCec_vQuBpjwORkQDh4qcZnhsrX58Sb35hPkB9CfwaLZzAgIZ-_O4XbgP5vEooJalJnsnckc07Z9cL7dQPSwcVR8-FXYr8fJNG5XKFZC7v6rslKvMjK3nR7Q8ahS3SmwZCLufbSzKDdrHOIrZtKWleFTXKuz3oB_tYB7Y5-779Fa8oymWed5Lt2wPfRaJ1ssoQKSb7uz_Zm_owYpNJZkXVmSyVdf6unxSnzZSczjkllteRv9EJngrOeYMwQMIfru9Rox63CyLhFDtqbk3D0jdzNq1eBLna4-ku5RR_5AOAUPiPRC5D_m8k8tf96t2ZYmKRBxfQQNhMRXPkGxmniqSMNYSKda-eq35qcr2dBXQWKkew0NQoH7NZdhFQ5u5wl7ZbHf4v6PTMA6VpdCg/FNxryJcX5zbrUCjxM6-5SERWCOVcKtHq/18)

[Donate](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/HkPQMZwXnQJn0EQOFp0V7rVw94OQd_q1nPifHNneiJt-3bHYx9MwSooGvXEDVj4K1qB7KbquAMNqfQYVHK1P9yqb6pLpwWkE_SPOTb0uDGLmBSlzyDqhMXlPh2_jBc8tJjUR0C59vIVBzRcVW9OgNRmpGOzxPsgpCorRh1M8z0EEoRbL1w1OT3j97x2LS_ZCzA-FJdpJRtorqhbb9ycv_YkdX-IUsRBAymZO-IgO3p41nKwbrWQ0x8PWU6NKO2cf872cRGeNNDxzNwAUd6ESKU6tWmh_LQ0rPengU0poPeWI5sLn5jIE26StIhog8Q4hME_LcgdRhfaO0CXtvugEWtrIqvPaN4VEaWv7Fr4uC7bOSb-lQGvxv1mQq20vspD4-mFpGlKQfsKqEOXIaRtK1SNZ2FHAdr7hDGHOaNBNMW-y3XJyYgWicU2OmMnjWuuVba1hnuDdVqIGSd7ALIsH8Nh-_ZI4qGiP_Y7oaEYxPtUai7aoh8g-SvRwUo6dXx7Bm6HDlGsFXgav59va3TB6wPAW-UP2xJwAdipyll1e-YZC1wKBg7yDakFfWtA10kLCsBTrjWQMZ-gxNLeBnOC6ZPVWNGbSo6GqlqS20JSBe4K2dVFohO8snUmHFhRBuKM4JTkJoTeT5_Y4XCY8kQx6K-XK0z1GlSjP3kRqnTQU8RtLDgbDSIZryWHNylwB2OLjrbkP7_4nrxX4I7aE78gNmoB14Jacam796Fa9wppkC9hshxX4s7y0SOlBVIWrXLI2pnklC5I6X4rPXOR77sXmeQg60rJk-I9eDvNi0TWWwmTSc74JphpTBe_IOkIOrQodC34V8kNimEKTEwKhoR_7dQ/YdplDY9Ue3-W0hGHG8zg0XyUTJ5f3Noa/18)

Otherwise, please let me explain why I believe The Atlas Society and its leadership are best suited to combat the rise in popularity of these harmful ideologies.

First, Jennifer and I go back more than 35 years, when she was a White House Speechwriter, and Americans for Tax Reform was in its founding era. She's one of the most innovative, effective, and persevering executives I know. Over the past decade, she's built The Atlas Society into a juggernaut for freedom.

**The Atlas Society is the ONLY non-profit adapting Rand 's works into media that appeals to young Americans. **

Just one example: their animated book trailer for _Atlas Shrugged_ drew 12 million views, and DOUBLED sales of the novel! They're currently producing a full-length feature film of Anthem, Rand's dystopian novella.

I believe in their great work because I've seen the impact they've had.

It's why I've collaborated with The Atlas Society on various discussions and interviews, including speaking at their student conferences, doing interviews on their podcast, and even doing stand-up comedy at one of their fundraising galas!

clean_body: Peter, While the rise in popularity of politicians like Zohran Mamdani and his socialist policies might have come as a shock to many, I've been warning people about it for years. Younger Americans do not know what socialism means. When younger Americans think of "socialism," they think it means Sweden and Denmark. They didn't grow up during the Cold War. They don't remember the Soviet Union. Or Stalin's Gulags or the Warsaw Pact. They couldn't even tell you what the initials U.S.S.R. stood for, or that Nazi is the abbreviation of National Socialist. Young Americans need to hear about socialism, real socialism, from someone who experienced it firsthand. I can think of no one better than Ayn Rand. Rand wrote novels like We The Living , which dramatized the inhumanity of the Soviet system -- and most importantly, Atlas Shrugged , which dramatized what would happen if socialism came to America. Rand's immense success in making the moral case for capitalism led my friend, the late Ed Crane, to call her "the greatest all-time recruiter for the liberty movement." The challenge is that young people simply aren't reading novels anymore. In the 70s, 70% of young people read fiction daily for fun -- today, less than 12% do. That's where The Atlas Society comes in. They bring Ayn Rand's ideas to life for new audiences in innovative ways, including animated videos, viral social media, graphic novels -- even music videos. Plus online courses and live events. I told Jennifer Grossman, The Atlas Society's CEO, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this month to introduce more young minds to Ayn Rand's ideas. Otherwise, please let me explain why I believe The Atlas Society and its leadership are best suited to combat the rise in popularity of these harmful ideologies. First, Jennifer and I go back more than 35 years, when she was a White House Speechwriter, and Americans for Tax Reform was in its founding era. She's one of the most innovative, effective, and persevering executives I know. Over the past decade, she's built The Atlas Society into a juggernaut for freedom. The Atlas Society is the ONLY non-profit adapting Rand 's works into media that appeals to young Americans. Just one example: their animated book trailer for Atlas Shrugged drew 12 million views, and DOUBLED sales of the novel! They're currently producing a full-length feature film of Anthem, Rand's dystopian novella. I believe in their great work because I've seen the impact they've had. It's why I've collaborated with The Atlas Society on various discussions and interviews, including speaking at their student conferences, doing interviews on their podcast, and even doing stand-up comedy at one of their fundraising galas! Thank you, Grover Norquist P.S. If you still aren't convinced, let me tell you what will happen if young Americans fail to learn these important lessons. Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace socialism and a culture of envy, entitlement, victimhood, and resentment. Young Americans lack the historical context to understand socialism 's outcomes. Ayn Rand's works challenge the ideas of socialism and teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their own understanding of the virtuous life. The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. |

subject: You probably don’t hear this often
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Here’s the reality.
|
| With just two weeks until our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, we’re going to say something you won’t hear from most campaigns:
---

**Please don’t donate just because we’re in your inbox.** We’re building a team of supporters who truly believe in Mandela’s vision of the Wisconsin Way, and we want you to join us because you’re excited about what the future holds.
---

**Here’s the reality:** our far-right opponent Tom Tiffany and his MAGA backers aren’t slowing down. In fact, the dark money flowing into this toss-up race is only ramping up. And they’re counting on Democrats to sit this one out.
---

And if we come up short on our monthly fundraising goal, it sends a message that their hopes of buying this race are working. **But we don’t believe that for a second.** **[So please, don’t donate just because this is another email asking for your support.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.Ye988L&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_031526_B1_DontDonate&t=10&akid=5931%2E196590%2EGXCktk)** | | [DONATE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.Ye988L&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_031526_B1_DontDonate&t=11&akid=5931%2E196590%2EGXCktk)
---

But if you believe Wisconsin deserves leadership that fights for working families and want to prove that grassroots power is stronger than corporate PACs, then we’re asking you to chip in today. Barnes HQ

name: Kim (personal)
subject: I couldn't do this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
A personal ask before the deadline:
I wanted to reach out personally before our deadline tonight, Peter.

I am genuinely grateful for you—each and every day. I would not be in Congress fighting for you without your belief in me and faith in the work we're doing together.

This job isn't about headlines or politics for me. It's about the families I meet across our district who are worried about their healthcare costs, their kids’ futures, and whether Washington, D.C. politicians are actually listening and doing the jobs they were hired to do. Getting to represent WA-08 is not a responsibility I have ever taken lightly.

My team just told me we are really close to hitting our mid-month fundraising goal, and that we truly just need one more push before midnight tonight to cross the finish line. name: Ami Bera
subject: Peter, I wanted to reach out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

I wanted to reach out to you personally.

The FEC deadline at the end of this month really matters for our campaign.

I won’t pretend these deadlines are my favorite part of the job. I became a doctor to help people. I ran for Congress to serve Northern California families. But the reality is that these public fundraising reports shape the narrative about the strength of our campaign and our ability to win this seat.

**And in moments like this, I think about the people who’ve stood with me before — supporters like you.**

_[**If you’re able, I’m personally asking: will you chip in $15 (or any amount that feels right) to help us finish this quarter strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127394470/607910868/309730286?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_20260315_FR_PreEOQ_0_6MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDZkZmI4Yi1jNDIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViCkCR4gnLYjjOXsqncArwLNLKlDMLVmUKbBFWbiktU=)_ **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127394471/607910869/309730286?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_20260315_FR_PreEOQ_0_6MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDZkZmI4Yi1jNDIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViCkCR4gnLYjjOXsqncArwLNLKlDMLVmUKbBFWbiktU=)**
No matter what, I’m grateful you’re part of this team. Your support — whether it’s a donation, your time, or your vote — is what makes this work possible.

Let’s keep fighting for affordable health care, evidence-based policy, and opportunity for every family.

Be well,
Dr. Ami Bera

subject: I’m coming to you as a last resort…

body:
Peter - It's Newt Gingrich.

name: Hong for Wisconsin
subject: Introducing Sustainer Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong
body:
Stories from inside our movement
# [](https://francescahong.com?refcode=em20260315-2613)
Peter,
Welcome to Sustainer Sunday — a new series featuring stories from the people who are powering our campaign to create permanent affordability in Wisconsin.
Meet Steve Caves from Dodge County:
[](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260315.LTsSdC&refcode=em20260315-2613&t=1&akid=2613%2E105371%2E0I1f08)
* * *
_I met Fran on November 1st at an event in Beaver Dam.__After listening to her speak for 15 minutes, I felt like my political ship had come in. I had no intentions of joining anyone's campaign team, but after hearing her speak, I turned to her campaign manager and said: "The spirit is calling me to help this woman win."_
_I was 100% in agreement with Fran's platform. I felt what was in her heart. I was amazed at her boldness and passion she had to help the marginalized, the poor, the middle class, and the working people. The biggest thing I felt was: "She is one of us."_
_When I finally had a chance to speak with Fran one on one, I looked her square in the eyes and said: "Your intelligence will win you this election."_
_When I heard her speak, I said to myself, Fran is "close enough to perfect" for me._
_I've lived in Mayville almost my whole life and born in Beaver Dam, only a few blocks from where I met Fran. I was in the petroleum business my whole life — I sold fuel around Dodge County to farmers, commercial accounts and provided heating oil and propane to homeowners. My parents owned Caves Oil Company out of Mayville. I grew up in the business._
_This election could be life and death for some people. I think about my friend who died because he wouldn't go to the hospital over a high deductible. I think about people who are suicidal and can't get mental health care, and people in the LGBTQ community who can't get their needs met. I'm doing this for the younger generation, so they have the same standard of living I had when I was young._
— Steve Caves, Dodge County
* * *
**[We're so grateful for supporters like Steve.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260315.LTsSdC&refcode=em20260315-2613&t=2&akid=2613%2E105371%2E0I1f08)**
**[If his story moved you, become a sustainer today.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260315.LTsSdC&refcode=em20260315-2613&t=3&akid=2613%2E105371%2E0I1f08)**

With gratitude,
Team Hong

clean_body: Stories from inside our movement Peter, Welcome to Sustainer Sunday — a new series featuring stories from the people who are powering our campaign to create permanent affordability in Wisconsin. Meet Steve Caves from Dodge County: I met Fran on November 1st at an event in Beaver Dam.After listening to her speak for 15 minutes, I felt like my political ship had come in. I had no intentions of joining anyone's campaign team, but after hearing her speak, I turned to her campaign manager and said: "The spirit is calling me to help this woman win." I was 100% in agreement with Fran's platform. I felt what was in her heart. I was amazed at her boldness and passion she had to help the marginalized, the poor, the middle class, and the working people. The biggest thing I felt was: "She is one of us." When I finally had a chance to speak with Fran one on one, I looked her square in the eyes and said: "Your intelligence will win you this election." When I heard her speak, I said to myself, Fran is "close enough to perfect" for me. I've lived in Mayville almost my whole life and born in Beaver Dam, only a few blocks from where I met Fran. I was in the petroleum business my whole life — I sold fuel around Dodge County to farmers, commercial accounts and provided heating oil and propane to homeowners. My parents owned Caves Oil Company out of Mayville. I grew up in the business. This election could be life and death for some people. I think about my friend who died because he wouldn't go to the hospital over a high deductible. I think about people who are suicidal and can't get mental health care, and people in the LGBTQ community who can't get their needs met. I'm doing this for the younger generation, so they have the same standard of living I had when I was young. — Steve Caves, Dodge County With gratitude, Team Hong Email us: mailto:info@francescahong.com

We’re still running short of tonight’s goal, but if just half the folks reading this email chip in, we’ll reach it in no time.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127394534/607911153/1751931448?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&refcode=email_031526_five&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThkNzU2YS1jNTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_sKHu7ODi6DhAJF3rb50Z-ISVlU8jHWKg5-20HYG_o=) Listen: if you need a little more context before reaching into your pocket — hell, I don’t blame you if you do — I wanted to share a few facts about this reelection campaign:
1. **The far-right will raise HUGE sums of money.** The only way we can keep up is if folks like you step up and chip in. No, I’d never expect you, or anyone else for that matter, to donate to every email I send out. But THIS email? When our mid-month deadline is just hours away? _This would be a great time to show your support._

2. **Pennsylvania is an expensive state to compete in.** We’re talking about 46,000 square miles, multiple major media markets, and millions of voters to reach out to. So earning folks’ support in all 67 counties? It’s going to take a lot of resources.

3. **Donations from emails like these make up a HUGE portion of our total fundraising... but only a fraction of folks who read these messages actually give.** This is the moment we need to change that, Derek. I don’t blame you if you’ve clicked away from an email (or ten of them) before. But I need you to step up and get off the sidelines today.

[_**Please, can you donate $5 or whatever sounds right to you before time runs out? We need as many people as possible to join this campaign before our midnight deadline, and the best place to start is with a small donation of just a few bucks.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127394535/607911154/1751931448?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&refcode=email_031526_five&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThkNzU2YS1jNTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_sKHu7ODi6DhAJF3rb50Z-ISVlU8jHWKg5-20HYG_o=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/127394536/607911155/1751931448?amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode=email_031526_five&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThkNzU2YS1jNTIwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_sKHu7ODi6DhAJF3rb50Z-ISVlU8jHWKg5-20HYG_o=)

clean_body: If just half the folks reading this chip in, we’ll hit our goal in no time = 🖐️ Five bucks, Derek! = Listen: if you need a little more context before reaching into your pocket — hell, I don’t blame you if you do — I wanted to share a few facts about this reelection campaign: 1. The far-right will raise HUGE sums of money. The only way we can keep up is if folks like you step up and chip in. No, I’d never expect you, or anyone else for that matter, to donate to every email I send out. But THIS email? When our mid-month deadline is just hours away? This would be a great time to show your support. 2. Pennsylvania is an expensive state to compete in. We’re talking about 46,000 square miles, multiple major media markets, and millions of voters to reach out to. So earning folks’ support in all 67 counties? It’s going to take a lot of resources. 3. Donations from emails like these make up a HUGE portion of our total fundraising... but only a fraction of folks who read these messages actually give. This is the moment we need to change that, Derek. I don’t blame you if you’ve clicked away from an email (or ten of them) before. name: Eric Burlison for Congress
subject: RE: Join Congressman Burlison at the Ballpark
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Burlison for Congress]()
body:
I want to personally invite you to join me for a very special evening...

| | | | | | |
Peter ,
Just a quick note. We're down to a handful of spots left in the suite for March 23rd.
If you've been thinking about joining us, now is the time. I’d love to have you there. Reach out to Jeremy and he'll get you taken care of.
—Eric
————————————————————[Original email below]
---
|
---
[|
---](https://ericburlisonforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b6500a115da3c4344522b1e48&id=b7b900dd0c&e=5f9dc01b8c)
| | Peter ,
I want to personally invite you to join me for a very special evening — a private suite at Hammons Field as the Springfield Cardinals take on the St. Louis Cardinals.
**Monday, March 23 · First Pitch 6:05 PM****Hammons Field — Springfield, MO**
This is a rare chance to watch two Cardinals teams face off from an exclusive suite — and to spend the evening with fellow conservatives who are committed to keeping Missouri's values front and center in Washington.
Suite tickets require a minimum donation of $1,000 per person, and we only have 18 spots available. Once they're gone, they're gone.
Food and drinks are provided.
**[SECURE YOUR TICKET]**
To reserve your spot, reply to this email or call/text Jeremy directly. He'll get back to you with everything you need to secure your ticket.
Jeremy Cadyjeremy@boltadvantage.com(417) 597-3838
I hope to see you out there on the 23rd. It's going to be a great night.
For Missouri,

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=191075618&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkxMDc1NjE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzM2MTc2NTgsImV4cCI6MTc3NjIwOTY1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.YLOsX1mALEt0GyUiyseBEm_Hp82naSL25Yrtf26uD-A)
---
| | [](https://substack..84GrvYjnRjoJbEvNnasZHbA4D8OGLKEJwLmjZNb-1Tk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/the-connecticut-education-establishment?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

March 15, 2026
The Connecticut Democrats are pushing legislation with the Orwellian name "An Act Concerning The Provision Of Equivalent Instruction" [(HB 5468)](https://substack.com/redirect/66eab9a8-e83e-499c-bd78-c58ae5c6be5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that will require families who wish to withdraw from the public schools for home schooling to receive approval from the Department of Children and Families (DCF). This would be equivalent to appointing a reincarnated Jeffery Epstein to head The Federation to Promote Chastity.
The ostensible impetus for this legislation is the death of Jacqueline "Mimi" Torres-Garcia, an 11-year girl who was withdrawn from the Farmington Public Schools to be home schooled. Her body was discovered later in plastic container. Advocates for this law state this may not have happened had the DCF monitored this poor girl's situation.
The problem with this reasoning though is that the DCF had been monitoring this child's welfare since she was born to her mother, Karla Garcia, who was in a detention center at the time of her birth. Jacqueline was placed with relatives until the mother won custody when she was nine, with the approval of the DCF.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e92688fd-13d2-4a48-af89-191b3e495f7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Jacqueline Torres-Garcia whose decomposed body was found a year after she was killed
But when the police found her body, it was so decomposed that the time of death was estimated to be one year earlier! Where was the DCF?

Now, you will probably think I am making this up, but I am not. The DCF conducted [a video call](https://substack.com/redirect/a3fa4fba-5df1-4b77-bef5-62b8d00bb52c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the mother and concluded everything was fine. But the DCF did not see the child during the call. Why? Because the child was already dead!

Now any reasonable person would state the problem here is that the DCF is incompetent. And this person would have a point. In fact, Connecticut's top child welfare positions, the Commission of DCF and the Head of the Office of the Child Advocate has been vacant for two years! Our Democratic politicians are too busy mollifying their base of AWFULs (Angry White Female Upscale Liberals) by screeching at President Trump rather than doing the job the taxpayers are paying them to do.
But as the Democrat Rahm Emanuel famously said, "Never let a crisis go to waste." And the Democrats are not about to allow poor Jacquelyn's death go to waste without promoting their agenda.
Thus, this legislation [allows an organization](https://substack.com/redirect/3e98f0d0-ef5f-4245-bafc-99622b822f87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the benign-sounding name the State Education Resource Center (SERC) to adjudicate whether homeschoolers have sufficient "demonstration of equivalent instruction."
And who is the [SERC](https://substack.com/redirect/b3f19fee-e1e4-4f47-9709-94e92c94de68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? I'll give you a clue with a title from the syllabus from their training manual:
LGBTQIA+ Inclusive and Affirming Practices to Cultivate Belonging and Mattering: A Four-Part Professional Learning Series

In other words, the Democrats proposing this legislation want to make sure their liberal agenda is imposed on home schoolers.

And what if they don't? According to [the legislation](https://substack.com/redirect/66eab9a8-e83e-499c-bd78-c58ae5c6be5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):

The department [DCF] shall disclose records, subject to subsections (b) and (c) of this section, without the consent of the person [the home schooler] who is the subject of the record, to:

The Attorney General, any assistant attorney general or any otherlegal counsel retained to represent the department (DCF) during the course of a legal proceeding involving the department or an employee of the department;

Translation: If home schoolers do not comply, a man with a gun will knock on their door. (unless they can afford a high-priced lawyer)
When two-year-old Liam Rivera had his [head smashed ](https://substack.com/redirect/2177ffff-4c44-4157-874a-1a07249dfe66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in and his body stuffed in a plastic bag by the same man who broke his arm when he was six months old, there was no outcry by the Democrats. Why? Because this child's murderer was by an illegal who was not turned over to ICE (Immigration Custom Enforcement) because the Democrats passed a law that prohibits it. Of course, the DCF was nowhere to be found.
In an ideal world, our public schools would teach our children to read, write, learn basic math and understand history, science, geography and civics. Bullying would be severely punished. Those who prefer other schools would receive vouchers. Then the [25,000 families](https://substack.com/redirect/06d80fbe-cdb2-476d-867d-c468533ff4c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who opted for home schooling in Connecticut would be much less. But our education leaders are not concerned with educating our children. They are political activists promoting their world view.

---
